Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab:

  • Mengumpulkan, membersihkan, dan mengelola data penjualan dari berbagai sumber terkait.

  • Berpartisipasi dalam proyek-proyek peramalan penjualan (sales forecasting) dan analisis segmentasi pelanggan.

Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 Sistem Informasi, Teknik Informatika dan Ilmu Matematika

  • Diutamakan yang berpengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun sebagai Sales Data Analyst atau Data Analyst

  • Terbuka juga untuk fresh graduate yang berminat terhadap Data Analysis dan terbiasa mengolah data dalam jumlah besar

  • Mahir mengolah data dalam jumlah besar menggunakan Excel (Pivot, HLookUp, VLookUp, IF, dll)

  • Mampu menggunakan setidaknya satu alat visualisasi data, seperti Power BI, Google Looker Studio atau Tableau

  • Memiliki pemahaman yang kuat tentang konsep dan metrik penjualan (misalnya, konversi, rata-rata nilai transaksi, retensi pelanggan)

  • Keterampilan analitis dan pemecahan masalah yang kuat, dengan perhatian terhadap detail

  • Kemampuan komunikasi yang sangat baik, baik lisan maupun tulisan, untuk menjelaskan hasil analisis kepada berbagai User

title: Sales Data Analyst Staff

description: PT Vasa, a management consulting firm based in Semarang supporting the Pennyu Group (water solutions industry), is looking for a Data Analytics professional who can turn numbers into decisions.This role is not for passive report makers — you will become the analytical first contact for multiple clie...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT Vasa, a management consulting firm based in Semarang supporting the Pennyu Group (water solutions industry), is looking for a Data Analytics professional who can turn numbers into decisions.

This role is not for passive report makers — you will become the analytical first contact for multiple client companies. You will work closely with business users, management, and technical teams to develop dashboards, automate reporting, interpret business needs, and provide insights that support operational and strategic decisions.

Minimum Qualifications :

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or related fields.

  • Minimum 1–2 years experience in Data Analyst, Business Intelligence, Reporting Analyst, or similar roles (Fresh graduates with strong portfolio are welcome to apply).

  • Familiar with SQL for data querying and validation.

  • Experience using BI/visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or Looker Studio.

  • Able to process, clean, and validate data from multiple sources.

  • Comfortable working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel) for reporting and analysis.

  • Understand basic business KPIs (sales, operational, financial, profitability).


Job Description :

  • Build and maintain monitoring dashboards for client CV/PT companies (revenue, profit, operational KPIs)

  • Present sales, operational, and financial data accurately and objectively

  • Create data visualizations for Monthly Service Reports and COO Monthly Reports

  • Develop automated and scheduled reports to improve reporting efficiency

  • Provide proactive data-driven insights and recommendations, not just reports

  • Translate vague or unstructured business requests into clear analytical briefs

  • Perform data quality checks before reports and dashboards are published

  • Train internal users on how to read, interpret, and use dashboards effectively

  • Collaborate with Data Engineers regarding data requirements and dataset structure

  • Optimize the use of AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.) as part of daily analytical workflows


Preferred Qualifications (nice to have) :

  • Experience working with ERP data (Odoo is a plus).

  • Familiarity with Python or automation scripting is a plus.

  • Experience supporting management or executive-level reporting.

description: Mid Data Analyst & VisualizationHeyRCG is a marketing and consultancy agency supporting the growth of businesses in tourism and hospitality. With teams in Melbourne and Bali, we work as a true extension of our clients — collaborative, curious, and passionate about helping people thrive.Our data team...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Mid Data Analyst & Visualization

HeyRCG is a marketing and consultancy agency supporting the growth of businesses in tourism and hospitality. With teams in Melbourne and Bali, we work as a true extension of our clients — collaborative, curious, and passionate about helping people thrive.

Our data team builds and maintains data products with quality and scalability at the core. We work primarily on Snowflake and Microsoft Fabric, and we expect everyone on the team to take ownership of what they ship.

Key Responsibilities

  • Analyze marketing performance data (campaign ROAS, KPIs, trends) across multiple clients

  • Design and build interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI (via Microsoft Fabric) and/or other BI tools

  • Write SQL queries against Snowflake and Fabric data models to support analysis and reporting

  • Collaborate with the data engineer to define data requirements and validate data products

  • Translate business questions into structured analyses and present findings clearly

  • Maintain documentation for reports, metrics definitions, and data sources

Required Skills & Experience

  • 2–5 years in a data analyst or BI role

  • Strong SQL skills — you write your own queries and understand the data you’re working with

  • Proficiency in at least one major BI/visualization tool — Power BI strongly preferred given our Fabric stack

  • Experience working with Snowflake or a modern cloud data warehouse

  • Ability to communicate insights clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences

  • Comfortable working across multiple clients and managing priorities independently

Nice-to-Have

  • Experience with Microsoft Fabric (Direct Lake, semantic models, dataflows)

  • Python for analysis or automation tasks

  • Background in marketing data — Meta Ads, Google Ads, attribution models

  • Familiarity with tourism or hospitality metrics and reporting

What We Expect From Everyone on the Data Team

  • Ship with quality — work is tested, documented, and reviewed before it goes to stakeholders

  • Build for scale — solutions account for growth in data volume and client count

  • Follow team standards — naming conventions, Git workflows, and code reviews are non-negotiable

  • Communicate proactively — flag blockers early, ask good questions, and share context with the team

  • Take ownership — you care about the output, not just completing the task
title: Data Analyst

description: Our client is one of the world's most diversified healthcare corporations, with a premier global footprint in the medical devices and surgical innovation sector. Known for their world-class talent development and high-performance culture, they drive medical breakthroughs that set new standards of ca...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Our client is one of the world's most diversified healthcare corporations, with a premier global footprint in the medical devices and surgical innovation sector. Known for their world-class talent development and high-performance culture, they drive medical breakthroughs that set new standards of care. Joining their Indonesian supply chain team offers a unique opportunity to manage a sophisticated matrix portfolio, collaborate with regional stakeholders, and accelerate your career within a prestigious, globally recognized organization.

The Marketing Analyst is responsible for supporting marketing initiatives through content and presentation creation, analyzing data using Power BI to support decision-making, and coordinating with regional and global teams to ensure project alignment and contract compliance.

Key of responsibilities:

  1. Marketing Initiative: Create project initiatives and presentation materials, prepare presentations/reporting, support content / media creation.

  2. Data Analytics & Reporting: Generate detailed reports using Power BI highlighting key findings, risks, and data insights to assist in decision-making processes & present during global meeting.

  3. Collaboration: Work closely with global teams to align on objectives and ensure all contract requirements are met.

  4. Coordinate and lead meetings with regional/global project teams.

Requirement:

  1. Education: Bachelor’s degree

  2. Experience: 1-3 years proven experience in marketing initiative programs, experience in B2B marketing activities & converting marketing leads to sales in medical equipment industries.

  3. Strong analytical skills with attention to detail to identify market sizing & opportunities.

  4. Proficiency in Excel & Power BI for data reporting.

  5. Excellent in communication for both the local language and English.

  6. Highly detail to work independently and proactively.

  7. Strong organizational skills and the capability to manage multiple tasks.

  8. High level of responsibility and commitment to meeting all deadlines, ensuring timely completion of task.

  1. Marketing Initiative: Create project initiatives and presentation materials, prepare presentations/reporting, support content / media creation.

  2. Data Analytics & Reporting: Generate detailed reports using Power BI highlighting key findings, risks, and data insights to assist in decision-making processes & present during global meeting.

  3. Collaboration: Work closely with global teams to align on objectives and ensure all contract requirements are met.

  4. Coordinate and lead meetings with regional/global project teams.

Requirement:

  1. Education: Bachelor’s degree

  2. Experience: 1-3 years proven experience in marketing initiative programs, experience in B2B marketing activities & converting marketing leads to sales in medical equipment industries.

  3. Strong analytical skills with attention to detail to identify market sizing & opportunities.

  4. Proficiency in Excel & Power BI for data reporting.

  5. Excellent in communication for both the local language and English.

  6. Highly detail to work independently and proactively.

  7. Strong organizational skills and the capability to manage multiple tasks.

  8. High level of responsibility and commitment to meeting all deadlines, ensuring timely completion of task.
title: Marketing Analyst

Cleaning data to remove "noise" or corrupted records to ensure high data integrity.Statistical Analysis: Using statistical tools to interpret data sets, paying partic...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities (Duties)

  • Data Collection & Cleaning: Gathering data from primary and secondary sources and maintaining databases. Cleaning data to remove "noise" or corrupted records to ensure high data integrity.

  • Statistical Analysis: Using statistical tools to interpret data sets, paying particular attention to trends and patterns that could be valuable for diagnostic and predictive analytics.

  • Reporting & Visualization: Creating dashboards and visualizations (using tools like Tableau or Power BI) to communicate findings to stakeholders and management.

  • Process Improvement: Identifying areas for improvement in data collection or business processes based on data findings.

  • Collaboration: Working with the Tech team to improve data warehouse structures and with the Commercial/Management team to define new process improvement opportunities.

Job Specifications (Requirements)

A. Knowledge & Skills

  • Technical Skills: * Proficiency in SQL (required for data extraction).

    • Strong knowledge of programming languages such as Python or R.

    • Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, or Google Data Studio).

    • Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (Pivot Tables, Power Query, Macros).

  • Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze large datasets and apply logical thinking to solve complex business problems.

  • Communication: Ability to translate technical findings into plain English for non-technical stakeholders.
title: Data Analyst

description: We are ABRIHET and currently seeking a motivated candidate to be part of our growing operation based in Surabaya, East Java. Candidates will be filling the position of Master Data Engineer (Analyst) with details below.Key Responsibilities:Designing and implementing data integration workflows using E...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are ABRIHET and currently seeking a motivated candidate to be part of our growing operation based in Surabaya, East Java. Candidates will be filling the position of Master Data Engineer (Analyst) with details below.


Key Responsibilities:

  1. Designing and implementing data integration workflows using ETL tools such as Azure data Factory, Airflow, dbt.

  2. Transforming data to meet the requirements of the target system or data warehouse.

  3. Loading transformed data into a data warehouse or other storage systems for reporting and analysis purposes.

  4. Collaborating with Data Analysts to ensure that data integration solutions support the organization's reporting and analysis needs.

  5. Monitoring and optimizing data integration processes to ensure that data is loaded efficiently and accurately.

  6. Ensure effective communication and collaboration across cross-functional teams involved in data projects.

  7. Contribute to documentation, standards, and policy development while coordinating testing and validation efforts.


Qualifications & Requirements:

  1. A Computer Science or equivalent education.

  2. 3+ years with Azure (Data Factory, Data Lakes).

  3. Data engineering & analysis

  4. Data profiling, SQL, Power BI, Excel (Power Query, Power Pivot)

  5. Familiarity with SAP or D365

  6. Retail or production experience is a plus

  7. Expertise in driving compliance, risk mitigation, and high-quality IT solutions.

  8. Fluency in English (both written and spoken).
title: Master Data Engineer (Analyst)

description: Jobdesk:1. Mengolah, menganalisa, dan menginterpretasikan data penjualan secara berkala untuk kebutuhan monitoring dan reporting.2. Membuat dashboard, visualisasi data, serta laporan analisa yang informatif dan mudah dipahami guna mendukung pengambilan keputusan management.3. Melakukan forecasting, ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Jobdesk:

1. Mengolah, menganalisa, dan menginterpretasikan data penjualan secara berkala untuk kebutuhan monitoring dan reporting.

2. Membuat dashboard, visualisasi data, serta laporan analisa yang informatif dan mudah dipahami guna mendukung pengambilan keputusan management.

3. Melakukan forecasting, proyeksi data, serta memberikan insight dan rekomendasi strategis berbasis data untuk meningkatkan performa bisnis dan efektivitas operasional.

4. Berkolaborasi dengan berbagai divisi dalam pemenuhan kebutuhan data dan analisa bisnis dengan memastikan akurasi, konsistensi, serta validitas data.

5. Mengembangkan metode analisa dan monitoring data untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan kualitas pengambilan keputusan perusahaan.


Kualifikasi:

1. Pendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Statistika,Teknik Informatika,Matematika, atau jurusan lain yang relevan (fresh graduate are welcome)

2. Berpengalaman minimal 1-2 tahun dibidangnya

3. Memiliki kemampuan dan pemahaman dalam penggunaan Python, MySQL, dan Spreadsheet, analisis statistik, dan visualisasi data

4. Mampu berkolaborasi dan berkomunikasi dengan baik antar tim untuk mendukung kebutuhan analisa dan reporting bisnis.

5. Memiliki laptop pribadi

6.Bersedia ditempatkan di Yogyakarta

description: Job Description:Mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan menganalisis data dari berbagai sumber internal maupun eksternal, termasuk data kompetitor, segmentasi pasar, serta preferensi pelanggan.Menyusun dan mengembangkan dashboard serta laporan analisis untuk memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja bisnis secara berka...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

  • Mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan menganalisis data dari berbagai sumber internal maupun eksternal, termasuk data kompetitor, segmentasi pasar, serta preferensi pelanggan.

  • Menyusun dan mengembangkan dashboard serta laporan analisis untuk memantau dan mengevaluasi kinerja bisnis secara berkala.

  • Mengidentifikasi tren pasar, pola data, serta peluang bisnis yang relevan sebagai dasar pengambilan keputusan strategis.

  • Memberikan dukungan analisis data kepada tim manajemen dan unit kerja terkait dalam penerapan pengambilan keputusan berbasis data (data-driven decision making).

  • Berkolaborasi secara aktif dengan berbagai departemen (Marketing, Finance, Operations, dan departemen lainnya) untuk memastikan keselarasan analisis dengan kebutuhan bisnis.

  • Membantu perumusan dan pengembangan strategi bisnis berdasarkan hasil analisis data yang komprehensif.

  • Menyajikan dan mempresentasikan hasil analisis data kepada stakeholder secara jelas, sistematis, dan mudah dipahami.

Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 dari jurusan Statistik, Matematika, Bisnis Manajemen, Data Science, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Industri, Business Analytics, Business Information Technology atau jurusan sejenis lainnya

  • IPK minimal 3.00

  • Fresh graduate atau memiliki pengalaman kerja maksimal 1 tahun

  • Memiliki kemampuan untuk mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan menganalisa data yang didapatkan dari berbagai sumber

  • Memiliki pemahaman tools pengolahan data seperti SQL, Excel, Python atau tools lainnya

  • Memiliki pemahaman tools untuk visualisasi dashboard seperti Power BI, Tableu, Looker, atau tools sejenis lainnya

  • Memahami konsep dasar statistik dan dapat mengidentifikasi pola, tren, serta peluang bisnis

  • Memiliki kemampuan interpersonal yang baik dan dapat bekerja dalam tim

  • Bersedia untuk bekerja dalam ikatan kerja
title: Business Analyst Trainee Program

description: Join us and take charge as a Business/ System Analyst!Dive into requirements, design, testing, and more. Apply now for this exciting opportunity!In this role you will:Actively involved in business requirement analysis/user storiesMeet with business users throughout the organization to understand the...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Join us and take charge as a Business/ System Analyst!

Dive into requirements, design, testing, and more. Apply now for this exciting opportunity!

In this role you will:

  1. Actively involved in business requirement analysis/user stories

  2. Meet with business users throughout the organization to understand their business objectives, technical challenges and data needs, and prepare functional design document

  3. Leading review sessions with business users to review functional design

  4. Develop and maintain system level artifacts, such as flow diagrams, process diagram, and current and proposed state diagrams

  5. Intensive discussion with development team to ensure the development as per functional design

  6. Doing application testing and SIT

  7. Leading User Acceptance Testing

  8. Leading End User Training

  9. Write and maintain related project documentation

  10. Manage postproduction support activities

Profile:

  1. Detail person and strong logic

  2. Willingness to take ownership of highly challenging tasks and problems

  3. Thorough and analytical problem-solving skills

  4. Effective communication and interpersonal skills

  5. Have sense of leadership

Requirements:

  1. Bachelor's degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, or related major with GPA > 3.00

  2. Fresh Graduates are welcome to apply

  3. Having internship experience as Business Analyst, System Analyst, or Functional Consultant is a plus

  4. Having knowledge in software development methodology

  5. Dynamic and result oriented team player

  6. Have decent English
title: Fresh Graduate Business Analyst

title: DATA ANALYST

description: Jago Coffee is a mobile coffee company serving freshly brewed coffee across Indonesia through fully electric coffee carts operated by our Jagoans. We combine quality coffee, technology, and micro-entrepreneurship by empowering aspiring business owners with accessible opportunities while connecting t...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Jago Coffee is a mobile coffee company serving freshly brewed coffee across Indonesia through fully electric coffee carts operated by our Jagoans. We combine quality coffee, technology, and micro-entrepreneurship by empowering aspiring business owners with accessible opportunities while connecting them directly with customers through our digital platform.

What You'll Do:

  • Work closely with the Co-Founders (CTO) to identify key business priorities and growth opportunities.

  • Streamline and improve data collection processes.

  • Collaborate with the Engineering team to enhance user event tracking and data storage strategies.

  • Process and clean data to support accurate analysis.

  • Analyze data using tools such as SQL, Excel, and Python.

  • Create reports, dashboards, and visualizations to generate actionable insights.

  • Present findings and recommendations to the leadership team.

  • Build dashboards to help teams track and achieve company KPIs.

Job Requirement:

  • 3-4+ years of experience as a Data Analyst or Product Analyst.

  • Strong verbal and written communication skills.

  • Experience working in a fast-paced startup environment.

  • Familiar with project management tools such as Asana, Trello, or Notion.

  • Proficient in SQL and dashboard creation.

  • Experience with Python is a plus.

As a Data Analyst Intern, you will play a key role in extracting, analysing and interpreting da...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We have an exciting opportunity for a Data Analyst Intern and a Digital Media Intern to join the team at PT Himalaya Wellness Indonesia, a leading wellness company in Kelapa Gading, Jakarta. As a Data Analyst Intern, you will play a key role in extracting, analysing and interpreting data to drive strategic business decisions. As a Digital Media Intern, you will be responsible for creating engaging content and managing the company's digital presence across various platforms. For IT Intern, you will develop software in Himalaya.

What we're looking for

  • Pursuing a degree in any major

  • For Data Analyst Intern: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a keen eye for detail

  • For Digital Media Intern: Strong in online media like Tiktok, Shopee, etc.

  • For IT Intern: Strong in doing coding and developing the apps.

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

  • Passion for the health and wellness industry

  • Good in English because this role will report to Expatriates

What we offer

At PT Himalaya Wellness Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. You'll have the opportunity to work alongside a talented team, gain valuable experience, and contribute to the growth of a dynamic and innovative company. We offer competitive compensation, opportunities for professional development, and a range of employee benefits to support your well-being.

About us

PT Himalaya Wellness Indonesia is a leading provider of high-quality health and wellness products in Indonesia. With a focus on natural ingredients and sustainable practices, we strive to empower our customers to live their best lives. Our mission is to inspire and enable people to achieve their full potential through our range of innovative products and services.

Apply now to become a part of our dynamic team!

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

  • Passion for the health and wellness industry

  • Good in English because this role will report to Expatriates

What we offer

At PT Himalaya Wellness Indonesia, we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. You'll have the opportunity to work alongside a talented team, gain valuable experience, and contribute to the growth of a dynamic and innovative company. We offer competitive compensation, opportunities for professional development, and a range of employee benefits to support your well-being.

About us

PT Himalaya Wellness Indonesia is a leading provider of high-quality health and wellness products in Indonesia. With a focus on natural ingredients and sustainable practices, we strive to empower our customers to live their best lives. Our mission is to inspire and enable people to achieve their full potential through our range of innovative products and services.

Apply now to become a part of our dynamic team!

description: We are looking for:Talented and analytical individuals who want to develop experience and manage data integrity in large-scale projects.Having good communication skills and the ability to translate complex database logic into clear business language and interactive visual stories.Having a self-disci...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for:

  • Talented and analytical individuals who want to develop experience and manage data integrity in large-scale projects.

  • Having good communication skills and the ability to translate complex database logic into clear business language and interactive visual stories.

  • Having a self-discipline to maintain timeline, work schedule, and high attention to detail.

  • Eager to learn and adaptable to collaborative data tools, modern data environments, and business intelligence platforms.


Job Responsibilities:

  • Construct and maintain comprehensive Data Dictionaries and Data Catalogs for multi-application integration.

  • Design, build, and maintain interactive business intelligence dashboards and data visualizations.

  • Perform thorough data profiling to identify, analyze, and resolve data inconsistencies.

  • Verify and reconcile data accuracy strictly between source systems and target dashboards.

  • Collaborate with business and technical teams to align data insights with business goals.

  • Manage, query, and optimize large-scale databases to support business intelligence needs.


Requirements & Qualifications:

  • High-level expertise in SQL Querying, including Complex Joins, Aggregations, and Window Functions.

  • Proven experience in data visualization and dashboard development using Apache Superset.

  • Experience in creating customized, interactive charts using Apache ECharts.

  • Proven experience in building and managing Data Dictionaries* and Data Catalogs for complex system integrations.

  • Strong experience in handling PostgreSQL* and ClickHouse databases (highly prioritized).

  • Exceptional attention to detail, specifically in data verification and cross-system auditing.


Nice to have:

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills in handling big data.

  • Familiarity with front-end visualization customization or advanced dashboard design.

  • Ability to understand business requirements and translate them into technical database logic.

  • Basic knowledge of data pipelines, ETL processes, or modern data stack architectures (e.g., Medallion Architecture).
title: Data Analyst

description: KUALIFIKASI:Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Matematika, Statistika, atau jurusan terkait.Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun di bidang retail analyst, merchandise analyst, inventory analyst, atau posisi terkait menjadi nilai tambah.Menguasai Microsoft Excel (Pivot Table, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, IF, SUMIF...
jobDescriptionHtml:
KUALIFIKASI:

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Matematika, Statistika, atau jurusan terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun di bidang retail analyst, merchandise analyst, inventory analyst, atau posisi terkait menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Menguasai Microsoft Excel (Pivot Table, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, IF, SUMIFS, dan formula analisa lainnya).

  • Memiliki kemampuan problem solving dan analytical thinking yang baik.

  • Mampu bekerja dengan deadline dan menangani beberapa laporan sekaligus.

  • Teliti, terorganisir, dan memiliki kemampuan follow-up yang baik.

  • Terbiasa bekerja sama dengan banyak divisi seperti showroom, gudang, dan produksi.


JOBDESC:

  • Mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan memperbarui data penjualan showroom secara berkala (harian, mingguan, dan bulanan).

  • Melakukan analisis data penjualan untuk menentukan kebutuhan produksi dan membuat RO (Repeat Order) bulanan.

  • Membuat analisis serta laporan kebutuhan produksi berdasarkan tren penjualan dan performa produk.

  • Melakukan update weekly income dan perencanaan penjualan/store performance.

  • Menganalisis performa produk best seller, slow moving, dan produk baru.

  • Membuat review dan evaluasi produk baru satu bulan setelah distribusi ke showroom/store.

  • Membuat dan menganalisa data RO per semester sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan.

  • Melakukan analisis item dan assortment produk untuk pembukaan showroom/store baru.

  • Memastikan akurasi data stock antara gudang dan showroom.

  • Membuat laporan analisa penjualan, stock, dan performa produk secara berkala.

  • Memberikan rekomendasi berdasarkan hasil analisa data untuk meningkatkan penjualan dan efektivitas distribusi barang.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim showroom, gudang, produksi, dan purchasing terkait kebutuhan data dan distribusi barang.

  • Menangani kebutuhan data adhoc dari management atau departemen terkait.

description: Responsibilities:·       Develop, publish, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, tailored to meet specific business objectives and decision-making needs.·       Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand strategic goals, operational processes, and KPIs, leveraging...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

·       Develop, publish, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, tailored to meet specific business objectives and decision-making needs.

·       Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand strategic goals, operational processes, and KPIs, leveraging strong business domain knowledge to translate those needs into effective technical solutions.

·       Work cross-functionally with product owners, operations, finance, and IT teams to gather requirements, define data needs, and deliver impactful analytical outputs.

·       Translate business requirements into scalable data models, SQL queries, and reporting logic, ensuring alignment between data outputs and business expectations.

·       Write, optimize, and maintain SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, validation, and analysis across multiple data sources.

·       Ensure high standards of data accuracy, completeness, and consistency, applying robust validation, reconciliation.

·       Enforce and contribute to data governance policies, including data cataloging, metadata management, access control, and documentation of business logic and data definitions.

·       Support migration efforts from legacy reports/dashboards to centralized BI platforms, ensuring minimal disruption and maintaining historical data continuity.

·       Automate manual reporting processes and streamline data workflows, using tools such as Power BI, SQL, Power Automate, or Python.

·       Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize the performance of reports and dashboards, ensuring they are reliable, timely, and responsive to user needs.

·       Educate and empower end users across departments to interpret dashboards, use self-service analytics tools, and apply data insights effectively in their roles.

·       Stay informed about industry trends, tools, and best practices to continuously improve analytics solutions and bring innovation to the organization’s data strategy.


Qualifications:

·       Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Analytics, Economics, or a related field.

·       Proven experience in data analysis, root cause investigation, and data quality validation, with a strong understanding of data lifecycle and integrity.

·       Proficient in SQL for data extraction, transformation, and analysis; experience with Python for data processing, automation, or scripting is highly desirable.

·       Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure data services, such as Azure Data Factory, Azure SQL Database, and Azure Synapse Analytics; familiarity with GCP or AWS platforms is a plus.

·       Strong expertise in Power BI for developing dashboards, data models, visualizations, and DAX calculations to support business decision-making.

·       Good understanding of data governance, data quality assurance best practices.

·       Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail, with a commitment to delivering clean, accurate, and actionable data.

·       Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex business requirements into clear technical specifications and analytical solutions.

·       Effective stakeholder management, capable of working with both technical and non-technical audiences to gather requirements, deliver insights, and drive data-driven decisions.

·       Experience working in cross-functional teams within Agile, Scrum, or other project-based environments, with an ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines.

title: Data Analyst Specialist (Marketing)

description: Are you someone who enjoys solving problems and making things run smoothly behind the scenes? We’re looking for a Technical Analyst to join our team and support a dynamic client in the vacation rental industry. In this role, you will help investigate technical and data-related issues, support users,...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Are you someone who enjoys solving problems and making things run smoothly behind the scenes? We’re looking for a Technical Analyst to join our team and support a dynamic client in the vacation rental industry. In this role, you will help investigate technical and data-related issues, support users, and ensure pricing accuracy and synchronization across connected platforms. The responsibilities below outline the core focus areas of this role.

We offer a hybrid working arrangement, combining remote flexibility with in-office collaboration to help you stay productive while staying connected with the team.

What You'll Be Doing
Handling Technical Issues (Reactive)
Investigate technical and data-related issues reported by users or internal teams. You will analyze problems, replicate scenarios, identify root causes, and propose clear solutions or requirements to support implementation by the development or related teams.

Ensuring Pricing Accuracy & System Alignment
Work closely with data and integration processes to ensure pricing, fees, taxes, and related information remain accurate and consistently synchronized across connected systems and partners. You will help investigate discrepancies, validate data flows, and support corrective actions when needed.

Proactive Monitoring & Improvement
Regularly review system behavior and data patterns to identify potential inconsistencies or areas for improvement. You will highlight findings and suggest preventive steps to improve reliability and data quality.

Documentation
Document your findings, processes, and resolutions clearly to support knowledge sharing and reduce recurring issues.

Team Collaboration
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to validate solutions, clarify requirements, and resolve issues in a structured and timely manner.

What You Bring
- A Curious and Analytical Mind - You enjoy understanding how systems work and figuring out why something behaves a certain way.
- Clear Communication (English & Bahasa Indonesia) - You can explain technical topics in a clear and structured way, both verbally and in writing.
- Technical Skills - Experience with SQL, APIs, and Google Workspace is required. Familiarity with Python, PHP, or AWS is a plus.
- Team-Oriented Attitude - You are comfortable working with others and sharing information openly.
- Organized Working Style - You keep track of your work and maintain clear documentation.

Your Background
1. A degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related technical field.
2. At least 1 year of experience in tech support, software development, QA/testing, SaaS, or a similar environment.
3. A willingness to learn, take initiative, and grow in a structured technical role.
title: Technical Analyst

description: About the JobPT Dwiasri Graha (Brand: Forsch Medical) is a medical device company committed to delivering quality healthcare products across Indonesia. We are seeking analytical and data-driven individuals to join us as a Data Analyst Officer. An independent role and collaborating across all busines...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Job

PT Dwiasri Graha (Brand: Forsch Medical) is a medical device company committed to delivering quality healthcare products across Indonesia. We are seeking analytical and data-driven individuals to join us as a Data Analyst Officer. An independent role and collaborating across all business functions.

Responsibilities / Tasks

  • Collect data from various internal and external sources completely and accurately

  • Clean, standardize, and prepare data for analysis

  • Analyze sales, distribution, and sales activity data to identify patterns, trends, and root causes of events

  • Create dashboards, charts, and routine reports (weekly and monthly) that are easily understood by management and non-technical stakeholders

  • Provide concrete, actionable, data-driven business recommendations

  • Actively collaborate with various departments to ensure the data used is relevant and valid

  • Serve as a bridge between data and business operational needs

Your Profile / Qualifications

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Systems, Management, or a related field

  • Experience: Min. have internship experience in data analysis or business intelligence. Must attach portfolio of data analysis projects.

Technical Skills and Soft Skill:

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, advanced formulas, dashboards)

  • Strong data storytelling, detail-oriented, able to handle multiple deadlines simultaneously, and proactive in identifying data issues

  • A plus: Data visualization tools: Power BI and/or Tableau

  • A plus: Understanding of business processes in the medical device distribution industry

Competencies We Value

  • Integrity (Mandatory)

  • Curiosity (Mandatory)

  • Analytical Thinking (Mandatory)

  • Business Acumen

  • Achievement Orientation

  • Teamwork & Collaboration

What We Offer

title: Data Analyst Officer

description: Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab1. Pengolahan dan Analisa Data· Mengumpulkan dan mengolah data penjualan dari berbagai unit bisnis.· Melakukan analisa revenue harian, mingguan, bulanan, dan tahunan.· Menganalisa trend visitor, transaksi, average spending, occupancy, dan performa penjualan.· Membuat perbandi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab

1. Pengolahan dan Analisa Data

· Mengumpulkan dan mengolah data penjualan dari berbagai unit bisnis.

· Melakukan analisa revenue harian, mingguan, bulanan, dan tahunan.

· Menganalisa trend visitor, transaksi, average spending, occupancy, dan performa penjualan.

· Membuat perbandingan actual vs budget serta year on year performance.


2. Reporting dan Dashboard

· Menyusun laporan revenue management secara berkala.

· Membuat dashboard monitoring revenue dan visitor.

· Menyajikan data dalam bentuk tabel, grafik, dan presentasi management.

· Memastikan akurasi dan validitas data yang digunakan dalam laporan.


3. Monitoring Performance Business Unit

· Melakukan monitoring performa penjualan tiap outlet

· Mengidentifikasi dengan performa tinggi maupun rendah.

· Memberikan insight dan rekomendasi berdasarkan hasil analisa data.


4. Forecasting dan Evaluasi

· Membantu penyusunan forecast revenue.

· Melakukan evaluasi terhadap pencapaian target perusahaan.

· Membantu analisa efektivitas promo, event, dan program penjualan.


5. Database dan Administrasi Data

· Mengelola database revenue dan visitor perusahaan.

· Memastikan data tersimpan dengan baik dan mudah diakses.

· Melakukan validasi dan pengecekan konsistensi data dari berbagai sumber.


6. Koordinasi Internal

· Berkoordinasi dengan Finance, Marketing, IT, Reservation, dan Operasional terkait kebutuhan data.

· Mendukung kebutuhan data untuk meeting management dan presentasi perusahaan.


Kualifikasi

· Bidang : Statistik, Matematika, Management, Akuntansi, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang terkait.

· Menguasai Microsoft Excel, terutama Pivot Table dan formula analisa data.

· Memiliki kemampuan analisa dan interpretasi data yang baik.

· Teliti, detail, dan mampu bekerja dengan deadline.

· Mampu membuat dashboard dan presentasi data management.

· Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman di bidang data analyst atau revenue analyst.

What you'll be doing

  1. Collect, clean, and organise data from various sources

  2. Perform in-depth data analysis using statistical techniques and data modelling

  3. Develop and maintain reporting dashboards and visualisations to present findings

  4. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and identify opportunities for data-driven improvements

  5. Stay up-to-date with the latest data analysis tools and techniques

  6. Provide recommendations and actionable insights to support business strategy

What we're looking for

  1. Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field such as Mathematics, Statistics, or Computer Science

  2. Minimum 3 years of experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar role

  3. Proficient in data analysis tools and programming languages (e.g. SQL, Python, R)

  4. Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

  5. Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey complex data insights

  6. Experience working in the Science & Technology industry, particularly in Mathematics, Statistics & Information Sciences, is preferred

jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities
• Collect, clean, and consolidate data from multiple sources (KOL campaigns, affiliate platforms, paid advertising, TikTok, Meta, social media, and content performance)
• Develop and maintain insightful dashboards and automated reports to support business and marketing decisions
• Perform in-depth analysis to identify trends, measure performance, and generate recommendations for optimization
• Collaborate with marketing, content, and business teams to translate data findings into strategic actions
• Ensure accuracy, consistency, and reliability of data across all reporting systems
• Build and optimize processes for data integration and visualization

Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Business, Computer Science, or a related field
• Minimum 2–3 years of experience in data analysis, data analytics, or business intelligence
• Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, advanced formulas, data modeling)
• Experience with data visualization tools (Looker, Tableau, Power BI, or equivalent)
• Strong analytical, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills
• Ability to merge and analyze datasets from multiple sources to create clear, actionable insights
• Excellent communication skills to present findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
• Detail-oriented, highly organized, and comfortable working with large datasets

jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Job

PT Dwiasri Graha (Brand: Forsch Medical) is a medical device company committed to delivering quality healthcare products across Indonesia. We are seeking analytical and data-driven individuals to join us as a Data Analyst Officer. An independent role and collaborating across all business functions.

Responsibilities / Tasks

  • Collect data from various internal and external sources completely and accurately

  • Clean, standardize, and prepare data for analysis

  • Analyze sales, distribution, and sales activity data to identify patterns, trends, and root causes of events

  • Create dashboards, charts, and routine reports (weekly and monthly) that are easily understood by management and non-technical stakeholders

  • Provide concrete, actionable, data-driven business recommendations

  • Actively collaborate with various departments to ensure the data used is relevant and valid

  • Serve as a bridge between data and business operational needs

Your Profile / Qualifications

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Systems, Management, or a related field

  • Experience: Min. have internship experience in data analysis or business intelligence. Must attach portfolio of data analysis projects.

Technical Skills and Soft Skill:

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, advanced formulas, dashboards)

  • Strong data storytelling, detail-oriented, able to handle multiple deadlines simultaneously, and proactive in identifying data issues

  • A plus: Data visualization tools: Power BI and/or Tableau

  • A plus: Understanding of business processes in the medical device distribution industry

Competencies We Value

  • Integrity (Mandatory)

  • Curiosity (Mandatory)

  • Analytical Thinking (Mandatory)

  • Business Acumen

  • Achievement Orientation

  • Teamwork & Collaboration

What We Offer

  • Base Salary (competitive, discussed during interview)

  • Allowances

  • BPJS Kesehatan & BPJS Ketenagakerjaan

  • Annual Bonus

description: Are you someone who enjoys solving problems and making things run smoothly behind the scenes? We’re looking for a Technical Analyst to join our team and support a dynamic client in the vacation rental industry. In this role, you will help investigate technical and data-related issues, support users,...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Are you someone who enjoys solving problems and making things run smoothly behind the scenes? We’re looking for a Technical Analyst to join our team and support a dynamic client in the vacation rental industry. In this role, you will help investigate technical and data-related issues, support users, and ensure pricing accuracy and synchronization across connected platforms. The responsibilities below outline the core focus areas of this role.

We offer a hybrid working arrangement, combining remote flexibility with in-office collaboration to help you stay productive while staying connected with the team.

What You'll Be Doing
Handling Technical Issues (Reactive)
Investigate technical and data-related issues reported by users or internal teams. You will analyze problems, replicate scenarios, identify root causes, and propose clear solutions or requirements to support implementation by the development or related teams.

Ensuring Pricing Accuracy & System Alignment
Work closely with data and integration processes to ensure pricing, fees, taxes, and related information remain accurate and consistently synchronized across connected systems and partners. You will help investigate discrepancies, validate data flows, and support corrective actions when needed.

Proactive Monitoring & Improvement
Regularly review system behavior and data patterns to identify potential inconsistencies or areas for improvement. You will highlight findings and suggest preventive steps to improve reliability and data quality.

Documentation
Document your findings, processes, and resolutions clearly to support knowledge sharing and reduce recurring issues.

Team Collaboration
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to validate solutions, clarify requirements, and resolve issues in a structured and timely manner.

What You Bring
- A Curious and Analytical Mind - You enjoy understanding how systems work and figuring out why something behaves a certain way.
- Clear Communication (English & Bahasa Indonesia) - You can explain technical topics in a clear and structured way, both verbally and in writing.
- Technical Skills - Experience with SQL, APIs, and Google Workspace is required. Familiarity with Python, PHP, or AWS is a plus.
- Team-Oriented Attitude - You are comfortable working with others and sharing information openly.
- Organized Working Style - You keep track of your work and maintain clear documentation.

Your Background
1. A degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related technical field.
2. At least 1 year of experience in tech support, software development, QA/testing, SaaS, or a similar environment.
3. A willingness to learn, take initiative, and grow in a structured technical role.
title: Technical Analyst

description: About the roleJoin the dynamic team at PT Bersaudara Inti Corpora' as a Data Analyst. This full-time role in West Jakarta, Jakarta offers an exciting opportunity to make a significant impact within a rapidly growing organization. As a Data Analyst, you will be responsible for extracting valuable ins...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

Join the dynamic team at PT Bersaudara Inti Corpora' as a Data Analyst. This full-time role in West Jakarta, Jakarta offers an exciting opportunity to make a significant impact within a rapidly growing organization. As a Data Analyst, you will be responsible for extracting valuable insights from complex data sets to drive strategic decision-making and support the company's continued success.

What you'll be doing

  • Key Responsibilities

    1. Collect, clean, process, and analyze data from various sources.

    2. Prepare regular and ad-hoc data analysis reports based on business needs.

    3. Identify trends, patterns, insights, and anomalies from data to support management decisions.

    4. Develop interactive dashboards and visual reports using Microsoft Power BI.

    5. Create data models, relationships, calculated columns, measures, and DAX formulas in Power BI.

    6. Integrate data from various sources such as Excel, SQL databases, ERP, CRM, or internal systems.

    7. Build and optimize queries for data analysis and reporting purposes.

    8. Collaborate with users and business units to understand reporting and dashboard requirements.

    9. Ensure the accuracy, consistency, and quality of data used in reports.

    10. Maintain, update, and improve existing Power BI dashboards.

    11. Prepare documentation related to data sources, formulas, dashboards, and reporting processes.

    12. Provide data-driven recommendations to management or related department Stay up-to-date with the latest data analysis tools and techniques to enhance the company's data capabilities

What we're looking for

  • Qualifications: Any in a quantitative field such as Mathematics, Statistics, or Computer Science

  • Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience in data analysis, preferably in the Technology or Science & Technology industries

  • Skills: Proficiency in data manipulation and analysis tools (e.g. SQL, Python, R, Excel), strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, excellent communication and presentation skills

  • Knowledge: Understanding of data warehousing, data mining, and machine learning techniques, familiarity with industry-standard data visualization tools

What we offer

At PT Bersaudara Inti Corpora', we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and dynamic work environment. Some of the key benefits you can expect include:

  • Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

  • Comprehensive private health insurance

  • Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

  • Flexible work arrangements (WFA, WFH, WFO) and work-life balance initiatives

  • Collaborative and innovative culture that values employee contributions


About us

PT Bersaudara Inti Corpora' is a leading technology company that specializes in innovative data-driven solutions. With a strong focus on research and development, we are at the forefront of leveraging data analytics and cutting-edge technologies to transform industries. Our mission is to empower our clients with actionable insights that drive sustainable growth and market leadership.

If you are passionate about data and eager to contribute to the success of a dynamic organization, we encourage you to apply now.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Data Center On-site IT Engineer

Qualifications & experience

- Understand the basic knowledge of IDC data center

- Understand the functions and characteristics of mainstream network equipment (switches, routers, firewalls, etc.)

- Install, configure, and maintain physical servers, racks, and hardware

- Perform hardware upgrades, replacements, and troubleshooting

- Manage cabling (fiber & copper), labeling, and rack organization

- Monitor network connectivity, switches, routers, and firewalls

- Troubleshoot network latency, outages, and packet loss issues

- Support VLANs, IP addressing, and basic routing

- Respond to alerts, outages, and performance issues

- Perform root cause analysis and incident reporting

- Prepare daily data statistical reports according to Customer's needs

- Can support 7*24 shift scheduling

- MUST have the ability to communicate and write proficiently in English & Mandarin Chinese

General requirements

- Diploma degree or above

- At least 1 years of Data Center maintenance experience

- Proactive, good coordination skills, strong sense of responsibility

- Mature, attention to details, good documentation skills

- Must be able to speak , read & write fluent English & Mandarin Chinese

- Quick learning ability, adapt quickly to changes

- Able to work Over-time if required

- Salary range above is for reference only, final amount will be based on actual background and previous work experiences
title: DATA CENTER ON-SITE IT ENGINEER (ENGLISH & MANDARIN SPEAKING)

description: Key Responsibilities:- Design , build and manage data warehouse / data lake.- Design, build, and maintain data pipelines from multiple companies/business units into a centralized data warehouse.- Develop and manage ETL/ELT processes to ensure data is accurate, clean, and available for reporting.- Bu...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities:

- Design , build and manage data warehouse / data lake.

- Design, build, and maintain data pipelines from multiple companies/business units into a centralized data warehouse.

- Develop and manage ETL/ELT processes to ensure data is accurate, clean, and available for reporting.

- Build and maintain data warehouse, data marts, and structured datasets for business intelligence needs.

- Integrate data from various sources such as accounting systems, internal systems, databases, APIs, Excel, and Google Sheets.

- Perform data cleaning, transformation, validation, and standardization across business units.

- Monitor pipeline performance, data freshness, data quality, and system reliability.

- Collaborate with BI Engineer and business stakeholders to prepare data for dashboards and management reports.

- Implement data security, access control, backup, and documentation for data architecture and pipelines.

- Troubleshoot data issues and ensure consistency between source systems and the data warehouse.

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.

- Minimum 2 years of experience as Data Engineer, ETL Developer, Database Engineer, or similar role.

- Strong proficiency in SQL and relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, BigQuery, Snowflake, or Redshift.

- Experience in ETL/ELT processes, data warehouse design, and data modeling.

- Proficiency in Python for data processing and automation.

- Experience with API integration, data ingestion, and workflow orchestration tools such as Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, or similar.

- Familiarity with cloud platforms.

- Strong understanding of data quality, data governance, and database performance optimization.

- Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and attention to detail.

- Able to work with cross-functional teams and understand business data needs.

description: Responsibilities:1. Assessment & Strategy • Discovery: Conduct deep-dive discovery sessions to map application dependencies, database schemas, and networking requirements using tools like AWS Application Discovery Service. • Migration Planning: Determine the optimal migration strategy (The 6 Rs: Reh...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

1. Assessment & Strategy • Discovery: Conduct deep-dive discovery sessions to map application dependencies, database schemas, and networking requirements using tools like AWS Application Discovery Service. • Migration Planning: Determine the optimal migration strategy (The 6 Rs: Rehost, Replatform, Refactor, Retire, Retain, or Repurchase) for each workload. • TCO Analysis: Provide technical input for Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) reports to justify migration paths.

2. Execution & Execution • Migration Tooling: Lead the hands-on execution of migrations using AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), AWS Database Migration Service (DMS), and AWS DataSync. • Modernization: Refactor monolithic applications into containerized microservices using Amazon EKS or ECS. • Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Automate the provisioning of destination environments using Terraform, AWS CDK, or CloudFormation.

3. Networking & Security • Connectivity: Establish secure migration tunnels via AWS Client VPN, Site-toSite VPN, or Direct Connect. • Identity Migration: Migrate and integrate identity providers (LDAP/Active Directory) with AWS IAM and IAM Identity Center. • Compliance: Ensure all migrated workloads meet industry standards (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC2) within the AWS Shared Responsibility Model.

4. Validation & Cutover • Testing: Perform UAT (User Acceptance Testing) and performance benchmarking to ensure the application performs better in AWS than its source environment. • Cutover Management: Execute final data syncs and DNS switchovers (using Route 53) with minimal downtime. • Post-Migration Support: Provide "Hypercare" support during the first 30 days post-migration to tune performance

jobDescriptionHtml:
PT Tuntun Sekuritas Indonesia is looking for candidates to fill Data Engineer role. This position will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining robust data infrastructure that enables reliable, scalable, and high-quality data access across the organization.


Main Responsibilities:  

  1. Extract data using web scraping and API integrations. 

  2. Develop and maintain scalable data crawlers for diverse sources. 

  3. Developing and maintaining data pipelines for efficient data extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) processes. 

  4. Ensure data quality through validation processes. 

  5. Document technical specifications and workflows 

  6. Collaborating with data analysts, data architects, and software engineers to understand data requirements and deliver relevant data sets. 

  7. Participating in data governance and compliance efforts to meet regulatory requirements. 

  8. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive data-driven decision-making within the organization.   

Requirements: 

  1.  More than 2 years of relevant experience or significant internship.

  2.  Proficiency in programming languages like Python, Java, or SQL. 

  3. Basic knowledge of data modeling and database management. 

  4. Familiarity with ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes. 

  5. Understanding of data warehousing concepts. 

  6. Must have experience of extracting data from HTML, and web crawling.

description: About the RoleWe’re looking for a Data Engineer who can help transform raw customer data into reliable, organized, and actionable insights.In this role, you’ll work closely with customer data, internal systems, and cross-functional teams to ensure smooth data operations and high-quality delivery. Yo...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Role

We’re looking for a Data Engineer who can help transform raw customer data into reliable, organized, and actionable insights.

In this role, you’ll work closely with customer data, internal systems, and cross-functional teams to ensure smooth data operations and high-quality delivery. You’ll also play an important role in solving technical data issues, improving internal tools, and helping customers get the most value from the platform.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with data, solving technical problems, and building scalable systems that improve both customer experience and operational efficiency.

What You’ll Work On

  • Use SQL to ingest, clean, transform, and organize customer data into internal data tables

  • Build and maintain scalable data pipelines across multiple data sources

  • Diagnose and resolve customer-reported technical data issues accurately and efficiently

  • Monitor data pipeline health, validate outputs, and proactively identify anomalies

  • Optimize query performance and improve data storage efficiency

  • Build and improve internal tools that support customer operations and data delivery

  • Document data schemas, transformation logic, and pipeline architecture

  • Communicate directly with customers through email and virtual meetings regarding technical findings, ticket updates, and resolutions

  • Collaborate with product, engineering, and customer success teams to support business and customer needs

  • Analyze and improve workflows to increase operational efficiency and scalability

  • Support proactive customer engagement initiatives through reliable data delivery and reporting

Requirements

  • Strong SQL skills and experience working with large datasets

  • Experience building or maintaining data pipelines and ETL workflows

  • Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities

  • Experience troubleshooting technical or data-related issues

  • Understanding of data validation, transformation, and quality monitoring

  • Good communication skills, both written and spoken

  • Comfortable working directly with customers and cross-functional teams

  • Ability to work independently and manage priorities effectively

  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience working with cloud data platforms or warehouses

  • Familiarity with scripting languages such as Python

  • Experience with data visualization or reporting tools

  • Experience supporting SaaS products or customer-facing platforms

  • Prior experience working remotely with distributed teams

Join Our Team

At Eterna Indonesia, you’ll join a fast-growing, remote-first company working with international clients across different industries. We value ownership, collaboration, and people who enjoy solving meaningful technical challenges while making a real impact.
title: Data Engineer (Full English Speaking)

jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description :

We are one of the top 10 biggest banks in terms of assets in Indonesia and listed in the Indonesia Stock Exchange. Permata Bank is a KBMI 3 with a strong core capital of nearly 50 trillion rupiahs. We believe that our employees are our greatest asset, and we are deeply committed to creating an environment where they can Learn, Grow, and Make a difference. This commitment is reflected in the recognition we've received-HR Excellent Award 2024 in the Learning Development and Knowledge Management categories. In addition, we achieve a net profit of over 2 trillions rupiahs in 2024, further solidifying our position as a leading financial institution.


Why PermataBank ?

Here at PermataBank, you will Learn, Grow, and Make A Difference,

You will have the appetite and the ability to learn many things, challenged to grow beyond ways you can imagine, and see the incredible difference you would have made along the journey.

This is our platform for you. We cannot promise a smooth ride, but rest assured, it is going to be a meaningful journey!

  • Learn : We always think innovatively to improve the way we work, making it easier, better and faster.

  • Grow : We provide excellent service to customers and encourage excellent performance in our daily work.

  • Make a difference : We understand each other and together build strong relationships with internal and external parties based on mutual respect.


Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and grow the data engineering team

  • Design and manage scalable data pipelines (ETL/ELT)

  • Oversee data warehouse and data lake platforms

  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and performance

  • Implement data governance, lineage, and security

  • Collaborate with BI, Analytics, IT, and business teams


Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in data engineering / data platforms

  • Proven experience managing large-scale data environments (banking is a plus)

  • Strong knowledge of ETL/ELT tools (Informatica, Talend, DataStage, Airflow)

  • Solid experience with SQL Server, Oracle, and data warehousing

  • Familiar with big data technologies, Git, and CI/CD

  • Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills


Directorates :

Technology


PT Bank Permata Tbk hereby informs that the company does not impose any charges in the employee recruitment process.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Requirement :

• Having work experience as Rotating Equipment Engineer is preferred

• Having work experience to repair centrifugal pump, steam turbines is preferred

• Graduate of an engineering curriculum with degree and specialized training and experience in turbomachinery and related disciplines that provides technical qualification for assigned function.

• Knowledge of CAD, 3D CAD, CREO is preferable.

• Demonstrated effective judgment and independence of action.

• Knowledge of company policies, markets, organization structure and procedures.

• Minimum applicable engineering experience level five (5) years.


Job Description :

• Plans, budgets, schedules and performs engineering assignments toward specified objectives within allocated time, schedule, cost and constraint established by supervision.

• Independently initiates, develops, applies and test designs for new repair opportunity, special application /systems and existing products/systems improvements.

• Independently plans, prepares and executes experimental program for the development of new or existing repair opportunity, design procedures. method or systems and issue applicable documentation,

• Initiates changes to existing component designs and repair methods as required for shop orders product improvements, manufacturing considerations and field modifications

• Responsible for planning, organizing and completion of major elements of the technical plan.

• Provides participative direction to those performing the assignment in the calculation and analysis of data and final reporting,

• Provides technical information, co-ordinates and follows up in intra/inter- departmental activities to insure conformance to design and quality standards.

• Approves layouts and drawings for assigned projects, issues appropriate documentation and informs supervision of activity status.

• Provides specialized technical support/information to Sales and Service as assigned.

• Provides innovation and original ideas.

• Maintains awareness to new and state-of-the-art technology, competitive intelligence and new turbomachinery applications/user requirements.

• Administers capital and inter-departmental programs as assigned by supervision.

• Maintains knowledge of company objectives and technical plan as applied to assignment and related products/systems/functions.

• Promotes, implements and reflects productivity and quality ideas as relates to assigned function.

• Pursues a personal career development plan prepared in conjunction with supervision.

• Performs other duties as assigned by supervision.

• Performs planning and technical detailing for field service jobs in order to establish the service work requirements to be performed

• Establishes quality and documentation requirements for repair jobs

description: About the role:As a Data Engineer (Pentaho) you will be responsible for extracting and ingesting data from websites using web crawling tools. In this role, you will own the creation process of these tools, services, and workflows to improve crawl/ scrape analysis, reports, and data management.We wil...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role:

As a Data Engineer (Pentaho) you will be responsible for extracting and ingesting data from websites using web crawling tools. In this role, you will own the creation process of these tools, services, and workflows to improve crawl/ scrape analysis, reports, and data management.

We will rely on you to test the data and the scrape to ensure accuracy and quality. You will own the process to identify and rectify any issues with breaks as well as scale scrapes as needed.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Should be able to perform data extraction, data loading, solve errors, and check filter criteria.

  • Understanding the steps - input, output, and connection to the database.

  • Understanding the job/transformation, inspecting the data.

  • Understanding Salesforce basics - fields, objects, and lookups.

  • Knowledge on schema, database, views.

  • Provide technical knowledge/expertise to support the requirements definition, design, and development of data warehouse components/subsystems, specifically Extract-Transform Load or Extract-Load-Transform technologies and implementations and/or Change Data Capture technologies and implementations.

  • Getting the fallout report and analyzing the bugs and errors, one should understand how to get the output file.

  • Research, design, develop, and modify the ETL and related database functions, implementing changes/enhancements to the system.

  • Design ETL processes and develop source-to-target transformations and load processes.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field, or the equivalent demonstrated experience

  • At least 1 years of experience in Pentaho

  • Experience running large-scale web scrapes

  • Experience with Linux/UNIX, HTTP, HTML, JavaScript, and Networking

  • Experience with techniques and tools for crawling, extracting, and processing data.

  • Must have great communication skills (written and spoken in English)

  • Fresh graduates are welcome

Good to have:

  • Familiarity with system monitoring/administration tools

  • Familiarity with version control, open-source practices, and code review

  • Familiarity with Python
title: Data Engineer (Pentaho)

jobDescriptionHtml:
KUALIFIKASI UMUM : 

1.   Minimal Pendidikan S-1 Chemical Engineering 

2.   GPA minimal 3.0/4.0 - GPA 3.50 (Prefarable).

3.   Berpengalaman di bidangnya minimal 2 tahun di Perusahaan manufacturing (Diutamakan Chemical Plant).

4.   Mempunyai komunikasi yang baik

5.   Kemampuan bahasa inggris yang baik terutama dengan istilah - istilah teknik engineering. 


TUGAS DAN TANGGUNG JAWAB 

1.   Mengumpulkan dan membuat data kuantitatif proses produksi (data statistik).

2.   Mengontrol dan memonitor serta evaluasi parameter proses seperti tekanan, laju air dan suhu selama proses produksi.

3.   Melakukan riset & percobaan skala Lab/ Pilot Plant terhadap produk sekarang dan produk baru.

4.   Membuat dan update Process Flow Diagram & PID.

5.   Merancang alat proses, melakukan perhitungan desain alat proses yang dibutuhkan untuk riset maupun untuk produksi.

6.   Melakukan evaluasi & analisa problem solving terhadap data proses produksi yang dikumpulkan.

7.   Melakukan analisa terhadap data yang diriset baik dari skala lab / sampai skala pilot plant termasuk analisa perhitungan ekonomi teknik. 

8.   Memberikan rekomendasi rencana tindakan perbaikan/ perubahan terhadap proses produksi.

9.   Memberikan rekomendasi proses produksi baru untuk diterapkan. 

10. Identifikasi dan melakukan perbaikan terhadap bahan baku,yield produk, energi, kapasitas, dan kualitas produk.


KOMPETENSI - KUALIFIKASI TEKNIKAL / HARD SKILL & SERTIFIKASI : 

1.   Mempunyai kemampuan mengatur & menerapkan sistem dan implementasi MOC (Management of Change)

2.   Mampu dengan baik dalam proses control & automation.

3.   Menguasai MS Office (MS Excel, MS Word, MS Power Point)

4.   Berkemampuan baik dalam Statistic Process Control

5.   Menguasai Program SPSS, Aspen HYSYS, Chemcad, AutoCAD.

6.   Memahami tentang Calculate Mass and Heat Balance

7.   Memahami prinsip-prinsip Continuous Improvement


KOMPETENSI - KUALIFIKASI SOFT SKILL : 

1.   Kemampuan yang baik dalam berkomunikasi

2.   Mengembangkan sikap - sikap positif dalam bekerja

3.   Kemampuan yang baik dalam presentasi 

4.   Kemampuan yang tajam dalam menganalisa data.

5.   Leadership yang baik, fokus, tenang, teliti, tegas

description: At VIDA we’re building the future of digital identity. As a Data Engineer you’ll work across the stack—from platform and infrastructure to data pipelines and end-user tooling. You’ll help us modernize our batch ETLs and lead our push into streaming and real-time fraud detection. We run on AWS and ma...
jobDescriptionHtml:
At VIDA we’re building the future of digital identity. As a Data Engineer you’ll work across the stack—from platform and infrastructure to data pipelines and end-user tooling. You’ll help us modernize our batch ETLs and lead our push into streaming and real-time fraud detection. We run on AWS and make extensive use of Scala Spark, dbt, and Terraform.Responsibilities

  • Build and expose the data lake/lakehouse so teams can understand business and product performance and make better decisions.

  • Design and evolve a data platform that enables scientists and analysts to query, model, and ship features and product metrics.

  • Develop scalable and reliable batch and streaming pipelines that ingest from varied sources and land trusted datasets.

  • Maintain and fix existing ETLs, improving reliability, observability, and cost while planning safe backfills and replays.

  • Model curated layers and maintain transformation logic (e.g., dbt), including testing, documentation, and data quality.

  • Build with Infrastructure as Code (e.g., Terraform) and contribute to CI/CD and deployment practices.

  • Partner with Engineering, and Data Science to deliver low-latency signals and features for real-time decisioning.

  • Contribute to internal tools, reusable components, and simple dashboards that unblock self-service.

    • Requirements

    • Solid engineering foundation with 5+ years of relevant experience in data engineering and/or distributed systems.

    • Hands-on work building data pipelines (batch and/or streaming) using at least one distributed framework (e.g., Spark, Kafka, Flink).

    • Comfortable with SQL and a transformation framework (e.g., dbt or similar).

    • Familiarity with AWS services for data (any mix of S3, EMR/Glue, Kinesis/MSK, Lambda, Redshift/Athena) or equivalent cloud experience.

    • Exposure to workflow orchestration (e.g., Airflow).

    • Experience using Terraform (or similar IaC) to manage data/platform resources.

    • Ownership mindset, focus on reliability, and enjoyment of collaborating in a fast-moving environment.

    What are we trying to solve?

    Billions of people still cannot securely prove their identity. Without it, they’re shut out of education, healthcare, finance, and civic participation. We believe this must change—and that digital identity should be trustworthy, private, and accessible to everyone.

    At VIDA, we’re creating a frictionless digital identity system that meets the needs of our time and works anywhere, for everyone.

    Why are we solving this problem?

    Global initiatives like the UN and World Bank’s ID4D aim to provide legal identity for all by 2030. We expect digital identity to become a basic right, and we want VIDA to help lead that future.

    Who are we?

    We’re a mission-driven, pragmatic team motivated by real-world impact—from preventing fraud and corruption to unlocking fair access to essential services. If that resonates with you, we’d love to talk.
title: Data Engineer

description: Design, develop, implement, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines to extract, transform, and load data from multiple data sources into Data Warehouse or Big Data platforms.Develop and optimize complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and database scripts to support high-performance data processing ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
1. Design, develop, implement, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines to extract, transform, and load data from multiple data sources into Data Warehouse or Big Data platforms.

  2. Develop and optimize complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and database scripts to support high-performance data processing and reporting.

  3. Monitor, troubleshoot, and enhance existing ETL workflows to ensure data accuracy, consistency, reliability, and system performance.

  4. Collaborate with business users, analysts, and technical teams to gather requirements, support data integration needs, and deliver efficient data solutions.

  5. Perform data validation, root cause analysis, and issue resolution related to ETL jobs, database performance, and data quality issues.

  6. Support deployment, documentation, maintenance, and continuous improvement of data integration processes and ETL standards.

  7. Ensure ETL processes follow best practices for scalability, security, scheduling, logging, and error handling.

  8. Participate in project planning, technical discussions, and system enhancement initiatives related to Big Data and enterprise data management.

Requirements

  1. Minimum Diploma/Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.

  2. Minimum 5 years of experience as an ETL Developer, Data Engineer, or similar role.

  3. Strong hands-on experience with ETL/ELT tools, especially Talend. Experience with other ETL tools is an advantage.

  4. Strong knowledge of SQL programming, query optimization, stored procedures, and database performance tuning.

  5. Familiar with database and Big Data technologies such as Hadoop, MSSQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, or similar platforms.

  6. Experience handling large-scale data processing, data migration, and data integration projects.

  7. Good understanding of data warehouse concepts, data modeling, and data governance principles.

  8. Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

  9. Able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment with tight project timelines.

  10. Good communication skills and experience working with cross-functional teams in enterprise environments.
