description: PT Adisena Mitra Usaha / BeyondTechPT Adisena Mitra Usaha, also known as BeyondTech, is a company established under Indonesian law, headquartered in Jakarta, and engaged in domestic and international financial payment services.About the RoleWe are looking for a Data Engineer / Data Platform Engineer...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT Adisena Mitra Usaha / BeyondTech

PT Adisena Mitra Usaha, also known as BeyondTech, is a company established under Indonesian law, headquartered in Jakarta, and engaged in domestic and international financial payment services.


About the Role

We are looking for a Data Engineer / Data Platform Engineer who will support the development, operation, and improvement of the company’s database and data platform.

This role is responsible for helping ensure company data is accurate, secure, reliable, and well-structured to support business operations, reporting, analytics, system integrations, and compliance requirements.

The role will work closely with IT Infrastructure, Backend Engineering, Data Analysts, Product, Business, and Compliance teams.



Responsibilities

  • Support the development and maintenance of reliable database and data platform architecture.

  • Build, maintain, and optimize ETL/ELT processes for data migration, reporting, analytics, and system integration needs.

  • Maintain data integrity, consistency, accuracy, and availability across systems.

  • Develop and optimize SQL queries for data transformation, reporting, troubleshooting, and analysis.

  • Assist in managing and optimizing relational database systems such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar technologies.

  • Monitor database performance, storage usage, availability, and data pipeline processes.

  • Support troubleshooting for database, data pipeline, and data quality issues.

  • Collaborate with Data Analysts to support data extraction, data processing, and reporting requirements.

  • Collaborate with Backend Engineering and Product teams to support data flow between applications, APIs, and internal systems.

  • Support the implementation of database security controls, including access control, audit logging, and user privilege management.

  • Assist in implementing data governance, data security, and compliance controls in alignment with company policies, UU PDP, ISO 27001, POJK, and other applicable regulations.

  • Maintain technical documentation, including database structure, data flow, configuration, SOPs, data dictionary, and usage guidelines.

  • Support backup, restore, and disaster recovery activities related to database and data platform operations.

  • Identify areas for improvement in data processing, database performance, automation, and operational efficiency.


Candidate Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field.

  • 1–3 years of experience as a Data Engineer, Database Engineer, Data Analyst Engineer, Data Platform Engineer, or similar role.

  • Basic to intermediate understanding of data modeling, ETL/ELT concepts, data pipelines, and database design.

  • Hands-on experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar RDBMS.

  • Good SQL skills for data query, transformation, reporting, and troubleshooting.

  • Experience with programming or scripting languages, preferably Python.

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS and/or Alibaba Cloud.

  • Familiarity with cloud data services such as Amazon Redshift, BigQuery, Snowflake, or similar platforms is a plus.

  • Familiarity with data orchestration tools such as Airflow, Prefect, or similar tools is a plus.

  • Basic understanding of data security, access control, audit logging, and data governance concepts.

  • Knowledge of BI or data visualization tools such as Tableau, Looker, Power BI, Grafana, or similar tools is a plus.

  • Experience in fintech, payment systems, financial services, or regulated industries is a plus.

  • Good problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and willingness to learn.

  • Able to collaborate with cross-functional teams including IT Infrastructure, Backend Engineering, Product, Business, Data, and Compliance.

  • Willing to work from office at Propan Tower, West Jakarta.

description: About the roleWe are seeking experienced Mud Loggers and Directional Driller to join our team on a contract basis in Fields. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the operations of our oil and gas drilling projects, utilising your technical expertise to support the efficiency and safety o...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking experienced Mud Loggers and Directional Driller to join our team on a contract basis in Fields. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the operations of our oil and gas drilling projects, utilising your technical expertise to support the efficiency and safety of our drilling activities.

What you'll be doing

  1. Providing real-time monitoring and analysis of drilling parameters and wellbore conditions to ensure smooth drilling operations and to optimize drilling performance and mitigate risks

  2. Interpreting and reporting on directional drilling data to ensure optimal wellbore placement and trajectory

  3. Collecting, processing, and analyzing drilling data to generate insights that inform operational decisions

  4. Collaborating with the drilling team to troubleshoot issues and implement solutions

  5. Maintaining accurate and detailed records of all drilling activities and parameters

  6. Adhering to all health, safety, and environmental regulations and procedures

What we're looking for

  1. Proven experienced minimum 4 years of work as a Mud Logger, Directional Driller, or Data/Pressure Engineer

  2. Strong technical understanding of drilling operations

  3. Excellent problem-solving and critical thinking skills

  4. Effective communication and interpersonal abilities to work collaboratively with the drilling team

  5. Proficiency in using relevant software and data management tools

  6. A commitment to safety and environmental responsibility

What we offer

We are dedicated to providing our employees with a rewarding and supportive work environment. As a member of our team, you can expect:

  1. Competitive remuneration and benefits package

  2. Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

  3. A collaborative and dynamic work culture that values innovation and teamwork

  4. Comprehensive health, safety, and wellbeing initiatives to support your overall wellness

  5. Work in the Office


About us

We are leading provider of real time monitoring services in Indonesia. With a strong track record of delivering safe and efficient operations, we are committed to driving the sustainable development of the energy sector. Our team of highly skilled professionals is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the industry.

Apply now to join our dynamic team and play a vital role in our continued growth and success.

  3. Monitor, troubleshoot, and enhance existing ETL workflows to ensure data accuracy, consistency, reliability, and system performance.

  4. Collaborate with business users, analysts, and technical teams to gather requirements, support data integration needs, and deliver efficient data solutions.

  5. Perform data validation, root cause analysis, and issue resolution related to ETL jobs, database performance, and data quality issues.

  6. Support deployment, documentation, maintenance, and continuous improvement of data integration processes and ETL standards.

  7. Ensure ETL processes follow best practices for scalability, security, scheduling, logging, and error handling.

  8. Participate in project planning, technical discussions, and system enhancement initiatives related to Big Data and enterprise data management.

Requirements

  1. Minimum Diploma/Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.

  2. Minimum 5 years of experience as an ETL Developer, Data Engineer, or similar role.

  3. Strong hands-on experience with ETL/ELT tools, especially Talend. Experience with other ETL tools is an advantage.

  4. Strong knowledge of SQL programming, query optimization, stored procedures, and database performance tuning.

  5. Familiar with database and Big Data technologies such as Hadoop, MSSQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, or similar platforms.

  6. Experience handling large-scale data processing, data migration, and data integration projects.

  7. Good understanding of data warehouse concepts, data modeling, and data governance principles.

  8. Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

  9. Able to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment with tight project timelines.

  10. Good communication skills and experience working with cross-functional teams in enterprise environments.
title: Data Engineer (ETL)

description: Key Responsibilities:- Design , build and manage data warehouse / data lake.- Design, build, and maintain data pipelines from multiple companies/business units into a centralized data warehouse.- Develop and manage ETL/ELT processes to ensure data is accurate, clean, and available for reporting.- Bu...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities:

- Design , build and manage data warehouse / data lake.

- Design, build, and maintain data pipelines from multiple companies/business units into a centralized data warehouse.

- Develop and manage ETL/ELT processes to ensure data is accurate, clean, and available for reporting.

- Build and maintain data warehouse, data marts, and structured datasets for business intelligence needs.

- Integrate data from various sources such as accounting systems, internal systems, databases, APIs, Excel, and Google Sheets.

- Perform data cleaning, transformation, validation, and standardization across business units.

- Monitor pipeline performance, data freshness, data quality, and system reliability.

- Collaborate with BI Engineer and business stakeholders to prepare data for dashboards and management reports.

- Implement data security, access control, backup, and documentation for data architecture and pipelines.

- Troubleshoot data issues and ensure consistency between source systems and the data warehouse.

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.

- Minimum 2 years of experience as Data Engineer, ETL Developer, Database Engineer, or similar role.

- Strong proficiency in SQL and relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, BigQuery, Snowflake, or Redshift.

- Experience in ETL/ELT processes, data warehouse design, and data modeling.

- Proficiency in Python for data processing and automation.

- Experience with API integration, data ingestion, and workflow orchestration tools such as Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, or similar.

- Familiarity with cloud platforms.

- Strong understanding of data quality, data governance, and database performance optimization.

- Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and attention to detail.

- Able to work with cross-functional teams and understand business data needs.
title: Data Engineer

description: At VIDA we’re building the future of digital identity. As a Data Engineer you’ll work across the stack—from platform and infrastructure to data pipelines and end-user tooling. You’ll help us modernize our batch ETLs and lead our push into streaming and real-time fraud detection. We run on AWS and ma...
jobDescriptionHtml:
At VIDA we’re building the future of digital identity. As a Data Engineer you’ll work across the stack—from platform and infrastructure to data pipelines and end-user tooling. You’ll help us modernize our batch ETLs and lead our push into streaming and real-time fraud detection. We run on AWS and make extensive use of Scala Spark, dbt, and Terraform.Responsibilities

  • Build and expose the data lake/lakehouse so teams can understand business and product performance and make better decisions.

  • Design and evolve a data platform that enables scientists and analysts to query, model, and ship features and product metrics.

  • Develop scalable and reliable batch and streaming pipelines that ingest from varied sources and land trusted datasets.

  • Maintain and fix existing ETLs, improving reliability, observability, and cost while planning safe backfills and replays.

  • Model curated layers and maintain transformation logic (e.g., dbt), including testing, documentation, and data quality.

  • Build with Infrastructure as Code (e.g., Terraform) and contribute to CI/CD and deployment practices.

  • Partner with Engineering, and Data Science to deliver low-latency signals and features for real-time decisioning.

  • Contribute to internal tools, reusable components, and simple dashboards that unblock self-service.

    • Requirements

    • Solid engineering foundation with 5+ years of relevant experience in data engineering and/or distributed systems.

    • Hands-on work building data pipelines (batch and/or streaming) using at least one distributed framework (e.g., Spark, Kafka, Flink).

    • Comfortable with SQL and a transformation framework (e.g., dbt or similar).

    • Familiarity with AWS services for data (any mix of S3, EMR/Glue, Kinesis/MSK, Lambda, Redshift/Athena) or equivalent cloud experience.

    • Exposure to workflow orchestration (e.g., Airflow).

    • Experience using Terraform (or similar IaC) to manage data/platform resources.

    • Ownership mindset, focus on reliability, and enjoyment of collaborating in a fast-moving environment.

    What are we trying to solve?

    Billions of people still cannot securely prove their identity. Without it, they’re shut out of education, healthcare, finance, and civic participation. We believe this must change—and that digital identity should be trustworthy, private, and accessible to everyone.

    At VIDA, we’re creating a frictionless digital identity system that meets the needs of our time and works anywhere, for everyone.

    Why are we solving this problem?

    Global initiatives like the UN and World Bank’s ID4D aim to provide legal identity for all by 2030. We expect digital identity to become a basic right, and we want VIDA to help lead that future.

    Who are we?

    We’re a mission-driven, pragmatic team motivated by real-world impact—from preventing fraud and corruption to unlocking fair access to essential services. If that resonates with you, we’d love to talk.

jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking experienced Mud Loggers and Directional Driller to join our team on a contract basis in Fields. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the operations of our oil and gas drilling projects, utilising your technical expertise to support the efficiency and safety of our drilling activities.

What you'll be doing

  1. Providing real-time monitoring and analysis of drilling parameters and wellbore conditions to ensure smooth drilling operations and to optimize drilling performance and mitigate risks

  2. Interpreting and reporting on directional drilling data to ensure optimal wellbore placement and trajectory

  3. Collecting, processing, and analyzing drilling data to generate insights that inform operational decisions

  4. Collaborating with the drilling team to troubleshoot issues and implement solutions

  5. Maintaining accurate and detailed records of all drilling activities and parameters

  6. Adhering to all health, safety, and environmental regulations and procedures

What we're looking for

  1. Proven experienced minimum 4 years of work as a Mud Logger, Directional Driller, or Data/Pressure Engineer

  2. Strong technical understanding of drilling operations

  3. Excellent problem-solving and critical thinking skills

  4. Effective communication and interpersonal abilities to work collaboratively with the drilling team

  5. Proficiency in using relevant software and data management tools

  6. A commitment to safety and environmental responsibility

What we offer

We are dedicated to providing our employees with a rewarding and supportive work environment. As a member of our team, you can expect:

  1. Competitive remuneration and benefits package

  2. Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

  3. A collaborative and dynamic work culture that values innovation and teamwork

  4. Comprehensive health, safety, and wellbeing initiatives to support your overall wellness

  5. Work in the Office


About us

We are leading provider of real time monitoring services in Indonesia. With a strong track record of delivering safe and efficient operations, we are committed to driving the sustainable development of the energy sector. Our team of highly skilled professionals is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the industry.

Apply now to join our dynamic team and play a vital role in our continued growth and success.

description:
We think you also hate when travel app is giving you a headache, right? A slight misinformation can ruin the trip.
That is exactly what we are tackling as t-fam! Making sure that our 50+ million users have the best experience in crafting their own adventure.
Your main duties in flying with us :

Wor...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We think you also hate when travel app is giving you a headache, right? A slight misinformation can ruin the trip.

That is exactly what we are tackling as t-fam! Making sure that our 50+ million users have the best experience in crafting their own adventure.

Your main duties in flying with us :

  • Work with stakeholders throughout the organization to identify opportunities for leveraging company data to drive business solutions.

  • Mine and analyze data from company databases to drive optimization and improvement of product development, marketing techniques and business strategies.

  • Design, build, and validate robust data models and machine learning/ deep learning algorithms to improve customer experience, optimize revenue, refine targeting, and support smarter decision making across the organization.

  • Plan, monitor, and evaluate A/B tests and other experimentation activities for ML models, including test design, success metrics, and model performance assessment.

  • Collaborate closely with machine learning engineers, and other stakeholders to productionize models, build scalable data pipelines, and ensure reliable deployment and monitoring of ML solutions.

  • Implement processes, dashboards, and tools to monitor data quality, model performance, and business impact, and iterate on solutions based on findings.

  • Communicate insights, trade‑offs, and recommendations clearly to both technical and non‑technical audiences through reports, visualizations, and presentations.

Mandatory belongings that you must prepare :

  • Minimum 4 years of hands‑on experience in data analysis and machine learning, ideally in a product‑driven or business‑focused environment.

  • A Bachelor in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or another quantitative field.

  • Strong problem solving skills with an emphasis on product development.

  • Proficient in programming skills (R, Python, SQL, etc.) for data acquisition, processing and analysis from large data sets.

  • Knowledge of data science concepts (regression, classification, clustering, properties of distributions, statistical tests and proper usage, etc.) and experience with applications.

  • Knowledge of a variety of machine learning techniques (Random forest, SVM, artificial neural networks, etc.) and their real-world advantages/drawbacks.

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills for coordinating across teams.

  • A drive to learn and master new technologies and techniques.

In the event that you haven’t received any updates after 3 weeks, your data will be kept and we may contact you for another career destination. Meanwhile, discover more about tiket.com on Instagram, LinkedIn, or YouTube.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end analytics and machine learning projects independently, from problem identification, model development, deployment, until business recommendation implementation

  • Partner closely with cross-functional stakeholders (Marketing, Sales, Supply Chain, Finance, Manufacturing, and Commercial teams) to translate business challenges into data-driven solutions

  • Develop predictive, prescriptive, and optimization models to support business growth, operational efficiency, forecasting, and strategic decision-making

  • Analyze large and complex datasets from multiple business functions to uncover trends, risks, opportunities, and actionable insights

  • Build scalable dashboards, reporting systems, and data visualization tools for management and business stakeholders

  • Manage analytics initiatives and project timelines independently while ensuring alignment with business priorities

  • Improve data governance, data quality, and analytics processes to support sustainable data capabilities across the organization

  • Present analytical findings and strategic recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders

  • Stay updated with emerging AI, machine learning, and advanced analytics trends relevant to the manufacturing and FMCG industry

Requirements

  • Minimum 5 years of experience as a Data Scientist, Senior Data Analyst, Analytics Consultant, or similar role

  • Proven experience handling analytics/data science projects independently as an individual contributor

  • Strong analytical thinking, business acumen, and problem-solving capability

  • Strong understanding of manufacturing/FMCG business processes and commercial operations

  • Proficient in Python, SQL, machine learning, statistical modeling, and data visualization tools (Power BI/Tableau)

  • Experience working with large-scale and complex datasets

  • Strong stakeholder management and communication skills with the ability to influence business decisions

  • Able to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast-paced environment

  • Experience in AI consultancy, digital transformation, or advanced analytics consulting will be a strong advantage

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms, data engineering concepts, or MLOps is a plus

jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

Ebit Co., Ltd. is seeking experienced Python developers to work on large-scale AI projects in collaboration with global technology companies.

This is a remote contract role where you will contribute to real-world AI systems, focusing on code quality, problem-solving, and scalable system understanding.

What you'll be doing

  • Work on Python-based AI and coding tasks, including reviewing and improving existing code

  • Analyze code for functional correctness, logic issues, and optimization opportunities

  • Contribute to improving code quality, maintainability, and performance

  • Collaborate with distributed teams and follow structured task guidelines

What we're looking for

  1. 3+ years of professional software development experience

  2. Strong proficiency in Python

  3. Experience with at least one additional language (JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Java, C++, etc.)

jobDescriptionHtml:

Ebit Co., Ltd. is seeking experienced Python developers to work on large-scale AI projects in collaboration with global technology companies.

What you'll be doing

  • Work on Python-based AI and coding tasks, including reviewing and improving existing code

  • Analyze code for functional correctness, logic issues, and optimization opportunities

  • Contribute to improving code quality, maintainability, and performance

What we're looking for

  1. 3+ years of professional software development experience

description: What you will do1. Credit Scoring &ModelingSupport HQ in developing and maintaining credit scoring models using SQL, Python, and machine learning techniques. Contribute to credit policy refinement through data-driven insights and model performance analysis.2. Portfolio Monitoring & ReportingMonitor ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
What you will do

1. Credit Scoring &Modeling
Support HQ in developing and maintaining credit scoring models using SQL, Python, and machine learning techniques. Contribute to credit policy refinement through data-driven insights and model performance analysis.

2. Portfolio Monitoring & Reporting
Monitor portfolio performance, delinquency, and loss trends to identify early risk signals.
Deliver monthly portfolio reports and analytical insights for management and related business units.

3. Exploration of New Data Sources & Tools
Evaluate and test alternate local data sources or tools to enhance underwriting precision.
Lead proof-of-concept (POC) initiatives and assess their business and risk impact.

4. Regulatory & Partner Engagement
Represent the Credit Risk team in OJK audits and bank partner engagements.
Prepare reports and defend the company’s portfolio quality and underwriting standards to regulators and partners.

What you will need to have
1. Bachelor's or Master's in Finance, Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, or related field.
2. 4-6 years experience in data science, credit scoring model development, portfolio analytics, or credit management. Ideally in fintech or retail banking. Exposure to OJK/regulatory audits is preferred.
3. Strong in SQL & Python skills, statistical modelling and ML knowledge.
4. Experience with portfolio reporting and impact analysis. Familiarity with OJK credit risk requirements.
5. Possess analytical and detail oriented. Strong communicator, able to present insights clearly.
6. Collaborative, and able to manage multiple priorities.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Tugas dan Tanggungjawab :

  • Mengembangkan model analisis, forecasting dan simulasi untuk mendukung operasional dan riset kelapa sawit.

  • Melakukan analisis optimasi (Planning, alokasi sumber daya, scheduling) berbasis operation research.

  • Mengolah dan memvalidasi data lapangan (Produksi, Produktivitas, Inventory, dll).

  • Menyusun insight dan rekomendasi berbasis data untuk pengambilan keputusan manajemen.

  • berkolaborasi dengan internal R & D , Operasional, IT, unit terkait lainnya.


Kriteria :

  • Pendidikan minimal S2 Statistika/Matematika/Teknik Industri/Data Science.

  • Pengalaman 2-5 tahun dibidang data analitic, modelling, Operation Research (pengalaman agribisnis/diperkebunan kelapa sawit diutamakan).

  • Menguasai Excel (advanced), software permodelan, Python atau R, memahami SQL.

  • Mampu membaut visualisasi data.

  • Mampu bekerja dengan data lapangan yang dinamis.

  • berpengalaman proyek forecasting produksi/Inventory/supply chain.

  • Memiliki komunikasi yang baik dan mampu menjelaskan analisis ke tim non-teknis.

  • Mampu berbahasa Inggris aktif (lisan & tertulis).

  • Bersedia penempatan di HO Jakarta.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description :

We are one of the top 10 biggest banks in terms of assets in Indonesia and listed in the Indonesia Stock Exchange. Permata Bank is a KBMI 3 with a strong core capital of nearly 50 trillion rupiahs. We believe that our employees are our greatest asset, and we are deeply committed to creating an environment where they can Learn, Grow, and Make a difference. This commitment is reflected in the recognition we've received-HR Excellent Award 2024 in the Learning Development and Knowledge Management categories. In addition, we achieve a net profit of over 2 trillions rupiahs in 2024, further solidifying our position as a leading financial institution.


Why PermataBank ?

Here at PermataBank, you will Learn, Grow, and Make A Difference,

You will have the appetite and the ability to learn many things, challenged to grow beyond ways you can imagine, and see the incredible difference you would have made along the journey.

This is our platform for you. We cannot promise a smooth ride, but rest assured, it is going to be a meaningful journey!

  • Learn : We always think innovatively to improve the way we work, making it easier, better and faster.

  • Grow : We provide excellent service to customers and encourage excellent performance in our daily work.

  • Make a difference : We understand each other and together build strong relationships with internal and external parties based on mutual respect.


Job Description:

  • Ensure that business data within the assigned domain has clear data definitions.

  • Ensure that data lineage is well documented.

  • Ensure that metadata is available and properly managed.

  • Maintain high data quality to ensure accuracy and consistency.

  • Establish clear data ownership.

  • Ensure data security in accordance with applicable policies.

  • Ensure data is ready to be used for operational, analytical, risk management, and regulatory reporting purposes.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information System, Computer Science, Data Science, or related field

  • 3 years of experience in data management, data quality, data governance, or data analysis is preferred; experience in financial services is a strong advantage.

  • Strong knowledge of data mining

  • Familiar with modern enterprise data platforms and governance tools.

  • Strong problem-solving, organizational, and interpersonal skills are crucial for collaborating with various business stakeholders


Directorates:

Technology

description:
About the Team
The GoTo KYC Data Science Team develops critical ML models and components that enhance the security and reliability of GoTo’s payment systems. Our team members come from diverse backgrounds, bringing expertise in mathematics, statistics, machine learning, and deep learning to solve co...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Team

The GoTo KYC Data Science Team develops critical ML models and components that enhance the security and reliability of GoTo’s payment systems. Our team members come from diverse backgrounds, bringing expertise in mathematics, statistics, machine learning, and deep learning to solve complex business challenges in GoPay.

We are passionate about both data science techniques and business impact, fostering a culture of continuous learning and collaboration through internal forums, discussions, and knowledge-sharing sessions. If you’re excited about working at the intersection of AI and financial technology, we’d love to have you on board! 🚀

About GoTo Group

GoTo is the largest digital ecosystem in Indonesia. GoTo's mission is to 'empower progress' by offering technology infrastructure and solutions that help everyone to access and thrive in the digital economy.

The GoTo ecosystem provides a wide range of services, including mobility, delivery, payments, financial services, and technology solutions for merchants. The ecosystem also provides e-commerce services through Tokopedia and banking services through its partnership with Bank Jago.

About Gojek 

Gojek is Southeast Asia’s leading on-demand platform and pioneer of the multi-service ecosystem with over 2.5 million driver partners across the regions offering a wide range of services such as transportation, food delivery, logistics and more. With its mission to create impact at scale, Gojek is committed to resolving consumer problems and raising standards of living by connecting consumers to the best providers of goods and services in the market.

About GoTo Financial

GoTo Financial accelerates financial inclusion through its leading financial services and merchants solutions. Its consumer services include GoPay and GoPayLater and serve businesses of all sizes through Midtrans, Moka, GoBiz Plus, GoBiz, and Selly. With its trusted and inclusive ecosystem of products, GoTo Financial is open to new growth opportunities and aims to empower everyone to Make It Happen, Make It Together, Make It Last.

GoTo and its business units, including Gojek and GoToFinancial ("GoTo") only post job opportunities on our official channels on our respective company websites and on LinkedIn. GoTo is not liable for any job postings or job offers that did not originate from us. You should conduct your own due diligence to prevent being victims of any fake job scams, if they did not originate from GoTo's official recruitment channels.

description: Leading and directing a team of machine learning engineers in the development and implementation of Data Science (DS) and Machine Learning (ML) models.Developing strategies and roadmaps for machine learning initiatives within the company.Collaborating with data science, product, and engineering team...
jobDescriptionHtml:
• Leading and directing a team of machine learning engineers in the development and implementation of Data Science (DS) and Machine Learning (ML) models.

  • Developing strategies and roadmaps for machine learning initiatives within the company.

  • Collaborating with data science, product, and engineering teams to identify opportunities for ML application.

  • Monitoring and evaluating team performance while providing necessary feedback and guidance.

  • Ensuring the quality and accuracy of DS and ML models developed by the team.

  • Managing ML projects from concept to implementation, ensuring they are completed on time and within budget.

  • Providing input regarding cost efficiency in the maintenance of data infrastructure.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Informatics Engineering, or related

  • A master's degree is preferred

  • Minimal 5 years in applied ML/DS with at least 2 years experience in leadership role.

  • Proven experience in leading machine learning project and managing a team of data machine learning engineer.

  • Handson experience building, validating, and deploying ML models (supervised, unsupervised, deep learning).

  • Strong MLOps skills: CI/CD, model versioning, monitoring, A/B testing.

  • Proven track record managing ML projects endtoend on time and on budget.

  • Excellent crossfunctional communication and stakeholder management.

  • Focus on model quality, governance, scalability, and costefficient infrastructure decisions.

About the role

Unlock your potential with an internship in IT AI/Big Data at PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk.

This Internship offers an exciting opportunity to gain hands-on experience in the rapidly evolving fields of big data and artificial intelligence.

What you'll be doing

  1. Assist in the design, development, and implementation of big data and AI solutions to drive business insights and decision-making

  2. Participate in data analytics projects, including data extraction, transformation, and analysis

  3. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and address business challenges through the application of big data and AI technologies

  4. Perform research and stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in the industry

  1. Final year Student or recent completion of a bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information System or a related field

  3. Experience with programming languages like Python, Java, etc

  4. Knowledge of machine learning algorithms and their applications

  6. Ability to work in a team and communicate effectively

  7. Enthusiasm for learning and a passion for technology

  8. Willing to have full onsite intern at office: Karawaci, Tangerang

Responsibility:

  • Menganalisis data keuangan dan operasional untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis.

  • Menyusun laporan keuangan dan dashboard

  • Bekerja sama dengan tim finance/accounting untuk mengotomasi proses dan pelaporan.

  • Melakukan pembersihan, verifikasi, dan rekonsiliasi data antar sistem.

  • Memberikan insight dan rekomendasi berbasis data untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan proses bisnis.

Requirement:

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang IT, Sistem Informasi. Akuntansi, Ekonomi, atau jurusan terkait.

  • Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman sebagai Data Analyst, Financial Analyst Pengalaman bekerja dengan data finansial

  • Mahir dalam Excel (Advanced Level) dan paham bahasa pemograman yang sederhana

jobDescriptionHtml:
What You’ll Do:

  • Support daily operations that require data skills, including data extraction, data cleansing, and data validation.

  • Perform ad-hoc data analysis to address various needs across the Risk division.

  • Develop automation solutions using Python to improve efficiency and accuracy in recurring tasks.

  • Learn and understand different functions within the Risk division, and provide improvement suggestions based on data-driven insights.

Requirements:

  • Basic SQL Skills: Ability to write and understand basic SQL queries for data retrieval and manipulation.

  • Basic Spreadsheet Skills: Proficiency in using spreadsheets (e.g., Excel, Google Sheets) for data organization, analysis, and reporting.

  • Proactive and Creative: Initiative in identifying opportunities for improvement and generating innovative solutions.

  • Strong Ownership and Task Management : Commitment to taking full responsibility for assigned tasks and seeing them through to completion with minimal supervision.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

  • Collect and analyse information on business needs, operational gaps, and opportunities across functions in CKB for Transformative Digital Technologies adoption

  • Work with cross-functional teams and process owners at CKB to gather requirements, gather data, validate needs, and develop the Project Charter

  • Develop Transformative Digital Technology solutions together with relevant CKB functions, process owners, and/or external vendors

  • Support testing, implementation, Go Live, and other user adoption activities for Transformative Digital Technologies together with Business Technology and Business Process Improvement team

  • Monitor and quantify digital initiatives benefit realization in form of business process improvement, operational efficiency, or enhanced customer satisfaction

  • Participate and support CKB digital literacy initiatives such as training, workshops, and competitions as facilitator and/or organizer, in collaboration with Human Capital team


Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or Statistics

  • Minimum 6 years of work experience, with minimum 4 years of experience in Data Science (predictive/ prescriptive analytics), Artificial Intelligence, or Business Intelligence

  • Proficient in minimum 2 machine learning tools

  • Proficient in minimum 1 AI tool/ platform (generative or agentic)

  • Proficient in minimum 1 data visualization tool

  • Experience/ knowledge in 6Sigma methodology and/or other project/ initiative management methodology is preferred

In this role, you will focus on designing, building, and deploying AI-powered solutions, integrating larg...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Here's the updated version with years of experience added:

Role Description

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Middle AI Engineer to join our engineering team at PT Fata Organa Solusi. In this role, you will focus on designing, building, and deploying AI-powered solutions, integrating large language models (LLMs) into production systems, and developing machine learning pipelines that deliver real business value. You will collaborate closely with product, data, and software engineering teams to translate business problems into AI solutions, fine-tune and evaluate models, and ensure the reliability and scalability of AI services in production. This is an excellent opportunity for a highly responsible individual with a passion for artificial intelligence, applied machine learning, and emerging LLM technologies who is eager to grow within a supportive, innovation-focused environment. Your technical skills and commitment to good teamwork will be essential in delivering robust and impactful AI solutions.

Responsibilities:

  • You will design, implement, and maintain AI/ML pipelines covering data preparation, model training, evaluation, and deployment using frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, or similar.

  • You will build and integrate LLM-based applications using APIs and frameworks such as OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar, including prompt engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and agentic workflows.

  • You will develop and maintain vector databases and embedding pipelines (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, pgvector, FAISS) to support semantic search and retrieval use cases.

  • You will deploy AI models and services to production using containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform, ensuring scalability, latency, and cost efficiency.

  • You will implement evaluation frameworks, guardrails, and monitoring for AI systems to track model performance, hallucinations, drift, and safety in production.

  • You will collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate business requirements into AI solutions, define success metrics, and iterate based on feedback and data.

  • You will fine-tune, adapt, and optimize models (including small language models, embeddings, and classical ML models) when off-the-shelf solutions are insufficient.

  • You will manage version control workflows for code, prompts, datasets, and models, including reproducibility and experiment tracking using tools like Git, MLflow, or Weights & Biases.

  • You will troubleshoot AI/ML system issues, applying strong problem-solving skills to diagnose problems across data, model, and infrastructure layers.

  • You will document model designs, prompt strategies, evaluation results, and operational runbooks to maintain knowledge across the team.

  • You will proactively engage in self-learning to keep up with the rapidly evolving AI landscape, and if necessary, be willing to unlearn and relearn methods to maintain industry best practices.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 3 years of professional experience in AI/ML engineering, data science, or a closely related software engineering role, with at least 1 year working on AI/LLM-based applications in production.

  • Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals (supervised/unsupervised learning, evaluation metrics, overfitting, regularization, etc.).

  • Hands-on experience building applications with LLMs through APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, or similar) and/or open-source models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, or similar).

  • Strong proficiency in Python, including common libraries such as NumPy, pandas, and at least one ML framework (PyTorch, TensorFlow, or scikit-learn).

  • Experience with at least one cloud platform: Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform, including their AI/ML services.

  • Experience with containerization technologies, particularly Docker.

  • Practical experience with prompt engineering, RAG architectures, embeddings, and vector search.

  • Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs, with familiarity in frameworks such as FastAPI or Flask.

  • Experience with any RDBMS systems: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar, with solid SQL proficiency.

  • Strong understanding of Git concepts (branching, PR, commit, merge, tagging).

  • Strong sense of responsibility, good teamwork, and communication skills.

  • Strong problem-analyzing and problem-solving skills, with good debugging ability across data, code, and model layers.

  • Willingness to self-learn new things, and if necessary, unlearn and relearn methods, especially given the fast pace of AI advancement.

  • Fluent in English, proven by an interview in English (equivalent to at least 525 TOEFL PBT or 5.5 IELTS or 55 TOEFL iBT).

Advantageous if:

  • Have experience deploying AI/ML models to production at scale (model serving, batching, GPU optimization).

  • Experience with agentic frameworks and tool use (LangChain, LlamaIndex, LangGraph, AutoGen, or similar).

  • Experience fine-tuning models (LoRA/QLoRA, instruction tuning) or training custom embeddings.

  • Understanding of MLOps practices and tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure ML).

  • Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, pgvector, Milvus) at production scale.

  • Have experience implementing AI safety, evaluation, and observability practices (LangSmith, LangFuse, Arize, or similar).

  • Familiarity with multimodal models (vision, audio, OCR) and their integration into business workflows.

  • Understanding of data engineering concepts and pipeline tools (Airflow, Prefect, dbt).

  • Have N5 or higher Japanese Proficiency.

  • Experience contributing to or maintaining open-source AI/ML projects.

  • Able to write good and concise technical documentation and runbooks.

  • Have relevant certifications (Azure AI Engineer, AWS Machine Learning, Google Cloud ML Engineer, or similar).

Benefits

  • Tax and BPJS + BPJSTK fully paid by company, including full BPJSTK Coverage (4 items)

  • Yearly bonus based on performance (up to 2x)

About us

PT Fata Organa Solusi subsidiaries of CAC Holding Japan is a forward-thinking organization specializing in innovative business solutions. We are committed to leveraging the latest technologies in data science to drive decision-making and enhance our product offerings.

What we offer

At PT Fata Organa Solusi, we are committed to fostering a dynamic and supportive work environment that enables our employees to thrive. We offer competitive salaries, opportunities for career advancement, and a range of benefits to support your well-being. Our team members enjoy a collaborative culture, flexible work arrangements, and access to continuous learning and development initiatives.

If you're ready to embark on an exciting journey and contribute to our thriving team, we encourage you to apply now!

title: Middle AI Engineer

description: PT Tuntun Sekuritas Indonesia is looking for candidates to fill AI Engineer role. This position will be responsible for designing, building, and deploying advanced artificial intelligence solutions that enhance products, services, and internal processes across the organization.Key Responsibilities:D...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT Tuntun Sekuritas Indonesia is looking for candidates to fill AI Engineer role. This position will be responsible for designing, building, and deploying advanced artificial intelligence solutions that enhance products, services, and internal processes across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. Design, develop, and train machine learning and deep learning models.

  2. Experiment with different model architectures to enhance performance.

  3. Integrate AI models into existing systems and applications.

  4. Deploy and maintain models in production environments.

  5. Optimize models for speed, scalability, and cost-efficiency.

  6. Research and explore new techniques for optimizing Large Language Models (LLMs).

  7. Collaborate with data engineers, software engineers, product managers, and other teams.

  8. Clearly communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

  9. Define project requirements and deliverables with cross-functional teams.

  10. Monitor and improve model performance using feedback and new data.

  11. Document the development process, models, and algorithms.

  12. Prepare reports and presentations on project progress and outcomes.

Requirements:

  1. Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field.

  2. Min 5 years Proven experience in machine learning, deep learning, and AI model development.

  3. Hands-on experience with AI frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch.

  4. Proficiency in Python; experience in Java, GoLang, or Node.js is a plus.

  5. Experience with training and deploying Large Language Models (e.g., GPT, LLAMA).

  6. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
title: AI Engineer

description: We are looking for a passionate and innovative AI Engineer Specialist to help drive digital transformation through Artificial Intelligence (AI) and automation solutions. This role is ideal for individuals who are eager to explore emerging technologies and implement impactful AI-driven initiatives ac...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a passionate and innovative AI Engineer Specialist to help drive digital transformation through Artificial Intelligence (AI) and automation solutions. This role is ideal for individuals who are eager to explore emerging technologies and implement impactful AI-driven initiatives across the organization.

Key Responsibilities

  • Identify opportunities to leverage Artificial Intelligence (AI) to improve operational efficiency and productivity.

  • Design, develop, and implement AI-based solutions to automate manual or repetitive processes.

  • Integrate AI tools and automation platforms, including AI assistants and workflow automation systems, into business operations.

  • Monitor, evaluate, and continuously improve implemented AI systems and automation workflows.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business needs and translate them into AI-driven solutions.

  • Stay updated with the latest AI trends, tools, and technologies to support continuous innovation.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree (S1) in any major, preferably related to Information Technology, Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent.

  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply; prior experience in AI, automation, or digital transformation is a plus.

  • Strong understanding of Artificial Intelligence (AI) concepts and their practical applications in business processes.

  • Familiar with AI and automation tools such as Openclaw, Claude Cowork & Code, N8N, Open AI, RACI matrix and related technologies.

  • Experience in data analysis, process optimization, or AI implementation projects will be an advantage.

  • Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and communication skills.

  • Able to work collaboratively across departments and adapt in a fast-paced environment.

  • Proactive, innovative, and highly interested in AI and emerging technologies.

  • Willing to work at Kawasan Industri Pulogadung, East Jakarta

Job Summary

Join us in shaping the future through AI innovation and automation. Be part of a dynamic team where your ideas and creativity can make a real impact on business transformation and operational excellence.

title: AI Engineer Specialist

description: Waruna Shipping Group is seeking an innovative and driven AI Specialist to design, develop, deploy, and optimize AI-powered solutions that enhance operational efficiency, business automation, analytics, and user experiences across the organization.The ideal candidate combines strong expertise in art...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Waruna Shipping Group is seeking an innovative and driven AI Specialist to design, develop, deploy, and optimize AI-powered solutions that enhance operational efficiency, business automation, analytics, and user experiences across the organization.

The ideal candidate combines strong expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning with practical software engineering capabilities, and is able to translate business needs into scalable and impactful AI applications.


Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML models for business and operational applications

  • Build and maintain AI-powered systems such as chatbots, intelligent document processing, predictive analytics, recommendation systems, and workflow automation tools

  • Fine-tune, evaluate, and integrate Large Language Models (LLMs) and generative AI solutions into internal business processes

  • Work with structured and unstructured data for model training, validation, and optimization

  • Develop APIs and integrate AI services into existing enterprise systems and workflows

  • Monitor and improve model performance, scalability, accuracy, reliability, and latency in production environments

  • Implement prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), vector database solutions, and AI orchestration frameworks

  • Collaborate closely with business users, product owners, and IT teams to identify and deliver AI use cases with measurable business impact

  • Ensure AI solutions comply with data privacy, cybersecurity, governance, and ethical AI standards

  • Stay updated with emerging AI technologies, frameworks, and industry best practices to support digital transformation initiatives


Required Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, or related field

  • Minimum 4 years of experience in AI/ML Engineering, Data Science, or related roles

  • Hands-on experience with LLMs and generative AI platforms such as:

    • OpenAI

    • Anthropic

    • Google DeepMind

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as:

    • Amazon Web Services

    • Google Cloud

    • Microsoft Azure

  • Experience with APIs, databases, Docker, Git, and software development best practices

  • Strong understanding of data pipelines, MLOps, and AI deployment lifecycle

  • Experience building AI agents, copilots, or autonomous workflow solutions

  • Knowledge of vector databases and RAG architecture implementation

At Waruna Shipping Group, you will be part of a growing digital transformation journey within Indonesia’s leading integrated maritime and shipping company. You will have the opportunity to build impactful AI solutions that support operational excellence, business innovation, and future-ready maritime services.

    • OpenAI

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as:

    • Amazon Web Services

  • Experience with APIs, databases, Docker, Git, and software development best practices

jobDescriptionHtml:
PT. Gemilang Satria Perkasa Holding Company of PT Adidaya Riset Instrumen Indonesia opens job vacancies for the following positions:

Agentic AI Engineer

PT Gemilang Satria Perkasa is looking for an Agentic AI Engineer to build production-grade AI agents, LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and intelligent automation systems for enterprise, defence, security, and digital transformation projects.

Responsibilities

  • Build AI agents using LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex, or similar frameworks.

  • Develop RAG pipelines using embeddings, vector databases, hybrid search, and document ingestion.

  • Integrate LLMs such as OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LLaMA, Mistral, or other models.

  • Build backend APIs using Python, FastAPI, Flask, or equivalent tools.

  • Connect AI agents to APIs, databases, documents, dashboards, and enterprise systems.

  • Implement prompt engineering, memory, tool calling, structured output, and workflow orchestration.

  • Evaluate AI output quality, reduce hallucination, and improve reliability.

  • Deploy AI services using Docker, Git, Linux, and production-ready engineering practices.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field.

  • 2–5 years of experience in AI Engineering, ML Engineering, Backend Engineering, or Software Engineering.

  • Hands-on experience building LLM, RAG, chatbot, AI automation, or agentic AI applications.

  • Strong Python programming skills.

  • Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex, or similar.

  • Experience with vector databases such as FAISS, ChromaDB, Qdrant, Milvus, Weaviate, Pinecone, or Elasticsearch.

  • Familiar with REST API, SQL/NoSQL databases, Docker, Git, and Linux.

  • Strong understanding of prompt engineering, embeddings, retrieval, evaluation, and LLM limitations.

Preferred

  • Experience in defence, security, intelligence, OSINT, fintech, compliance, or enterprise automation.

  • Experience with local LLM deployment, fine-tuning, Whisper, knowledge graph, or multimodal AI.

  • Familiarity with AI governance, cybersecurity, and data privacy.

  • Able to work in a project-based system integration environment.
title: Agentic AI Engineer

description: Tanggung JawabMembantu mengembangkan dan menerapkan solusi AI untuk kebutuhan operasional perusahaan.Membuat workflow automation untuk mengurangi pekerjaan manual yang berulang.Mengolah, membersihkan, dan menyiapkan data agar dapat digunakan untuk kebutuhan AI dan analisa.Membantu integrasi AI denga...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tanggung Jawab

  1. Membantu mengembangkan dan menerapkan solusi AI untuk kebutuhan operasional perusahaan.

  2. Membuat workflow automation untuk mengurangi pekerjaan manual yang berulang.

  3. Mengolah, membersihkan, dan menyiapkan data agar dapat digunakan untuk kebutuhan AI dan analisa.

  4. Membantu integrasi AI dengan sistem kerja perusahaan, seperti spreadsheet, database, aplikasi internal, dan tools operasional lainnya.

  5. Membuat prompt, template analisa, dan alur kerja AI untuk mendukung berbagai divisi.

  6. Melakukan monitoring terhadap hasil penggunaan AI dan memberikan perbaikan jika terdapat kesalahan output.

  7. Berkoordinasi dengan tim IT dan user dari berbagai divisi untuk memahami kebutuhan kerja.

  8. Membuat dokumentasi teknis, panduan penggunaan, dan laporan progress implementasi AI.


Kualifikasi

  1. Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 jurusan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Ilmu Komputer, Data Science, atau jurusan terkait.

  2. Memiliki pemahaman dasar mengenai AI, machine learning, prompt engineering, dan automation.

  3. Mampu menggunakan tools AI seperti ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, atau tools sejenis.

  4. Menguasai dasar pengolahan data menggunakan Excel/Google Sheets. Nilai tambah jika menguasai Python atau SQL.

  5. Memahami konsep API, database, dan integrasi sistem menjadi nilai tambah.

  6. Memiliki kemampuan analisa masalah dan mampu membuat solusi kerja yang praktis.

  7. Teliti, logis, cepat belajar, dan mampu bekerja lintas divisi.

  8. Mampu membuat dokumentasi kerja yang rapi dan mudah dipahami.

  9. Fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar, namun diutamakan yang memiliki pengalaman/magang/project di bidang AI, data, automation, atau IT support.


Nilai Tambah

  1. Pernah membuat automation menggunakan Google Apps Script, Python, n8n, Make, Zapier, atau tools sejenis.

  2. Pernah menggunakan API dari OpenAI, Gemini, atau platform AI lainnya.

  3. Memiliki pengalaman membuat chatbot, dashboard, workflow automation, atau sistem analisa data.

  4. Memahami dasar Odoo, ERP, CRM, atau sistem operasional perusahaan.

  5. Memiliki portofolio project AI/automation/data.
title: Staff AI Operation Engineer

Soft Skills

1. Fast learner with ability to adopt new AI frameworks and technologies quickly.

3. Clear communicator who can explain technical concepts to a variety of stakeholders.

description: PT. Intinusa Teknik Sejahtera saat ini sedang mencari AI Officer yang dapat membangun model estimasi berbasis AI yang akan langsung dibandingkan dengan keputusan manusia dan hasil aktual di lapangan.📍 Lokasi: Hybrid/Remote (Flexible)🕒 Tipe: Part-time/Project-basedScope & Impact Role Ini:• Membangu...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT. Intinusa Teknik Sejahtera saat ini sedang mencari AI Officer yang dapat membangun model estimasi berbasis AI yang akan langsung dibandingkan dengan keputusan manusia dan hasil aktual di lapangan.

📍 Lokasi: Hybrid/Remote (Flexible)
🕒 Tipe: Part-time/Project-based

Scope & Impact Role Ini:
• Membangun dan mengembangkan model estimasi berbasis AI/ML untuk kebutuhan bisnis
• Mengolah data historis (cleaning, labeling, validation) sebagai fondasi model
• Melakukan benchmarking 3 arah: Model AI vs Estimasi Manusia vs Realisasi Aktual
• Mengukur performa model dengan metrik seperti MAE, MAPE, RMSE
• Melakukan iterasi & retraining untuk meningkatkan akurasi model secara berkelanjutan
• Menerjemahkan hasil teknis menjadi insight yang bisa digunakan tim non-teknis

Peran Tambahan (Knowledge Transfer):
• Melatih tim internal dalam penggunaan dan monitoring model
• Menyusun SOP, dokumentasi, dan materi training
• Berperan sebagai technical advisor selama masa engagement

Kualifikasi:
1. Pengalaman 2–3 tahun di AI/ML atau ML Engineering
2. Strong di Python + ML libraries (scikit-learn, XGBoost, TensorFlow/PyTorch, dll)
3. Pengalaman di regression modeling/estimation/forecasting
4. Memahami evaluasi model (cross-validation, train-test split, dll)
5. Mampu menjelaskan konsep kompleks ke stakeholder non-teknis
6. Pengalaman mentoring / training jadi nilai tambah
7. Memiliki portfolio/studi kasus yang relevan

jobDescriptionHtml:
AI Automation Engineer (AI Agent Developer)
AI Agents, Workflow Automation, & Generative AI Systems

| Ungasan, Badung, Bali | On-site | PT Wine Adore Indonesia |

Wine Adore is building an AI-driven ecosystem across content production, workflow automation, and customer engagement. We are looking for an AI Automation Engineer (AI Agent Developer) who is passionate about AI systems, automation, and emerging technologies.

This role will focus on developing AI Agents, automating business workflows, building AI-powered content production pipelines, and creating intelligent customer engagement systems.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop AI Agents and intelligent workflow automation systems
  • Build AI-powered content production pipelines covering ideation, prompting, image/video generation, and automated editing
  • Develop AI-powered customer engagement workflows, including inquiry handling, follow-ups, and CRM automation
  • Integrate APIs, databases, and third-party platforms into scalable workflows
  • Optimize prompts, automation logic, and AI Agent performance
  • Research and implement emerging AI technologies and tools

Requirements

  • Based in Bali, Indonesia
  • Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology or related field
  • Experience building AI Agents, workflow automations, or AI-powered systems
  • Strong understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI ecosystems
  • Familiarity with automation platforms such as Make.com, Zapier, LangChain, Flowise, CrewAI, AutoGen, or similar tools
  • Experience with Generative AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, Runway, Stable Diffusion, or similar platforms
  • Basic to intermediate Python skills
  • Strong understanding of APIs, webhooks, and system integrations
  • Strong prompt engineering, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills
  • Portfolio showcasing AI Agents, automation systems, or workflow projects is required
  • Highly adaptable and eager to learn emerging AI technologies
title: AI Automation Engineer (AI Agent Developer)

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Responsibility:

The AI, Coding & Digital Literacy Curriculum Specialist will be responsible for designing, developing, and delivering a developmentally appropriate AI education program for students in Grades 6-7, including a hands-on, project-based program (capstone project) that integrates:

  • AI literacy

  • Basic programming and computational thinking

  • Digital citizenship and ethical technology use


The program will be aligned with the IB MYP framework, supporting inquiry, creativity, problem-solving, and real-world application.

This role also responds directly to parent concerns by ensuring students are supported not only in using AI tools but in understanding their limitations, ethical implications, and impact on learning.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Education, Educational Technology, Computer Science, or related field

  • Experience teaching middle school students (Grades 6–8) with IB MYP Framework

  • Experience teaching coding (e.g. Scratch, Python basics, or similar platforms)

  • Experience integrating AI tools in an educational context

  • Strong classroom facilitation and curriculum design skills

  • Excellent communication skills in written and spoken English

  • For Academic Year 2026/2027

  • Willing to be placed in Simprug, South Jakarta
title: MYP AI, Coding & Digital Curriculum Specialist (ICT) - BINUS SCHOOL Simprug

description: Core Technical SkillsLLM & RAG SystemsExperience with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)Prompt engineering & context optimizationChunking, embedding strategies, rerankingVector DatabasesHands-on with Milvus / pgvector / Chroma / WeaviateIndexing, similarity search optimizationBackend DevelopmentSt...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Core Technical Skills

  • LLM & RAG Systems

    • Experience with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

    • Prompt engineering & context optimization

    • Chunking, embedding strategies, reranking

  • Vector Databases

    • Hands-on with Milvus / pgvector / Chroma / Weaviate

    • Indexing, similarity search optimization

  • Backend Development

    • Strong in Go / Python / Node.js

    • REST APIs & microservices architecture

  • AI Model Integration

    • Experience with:

      • Open-source LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral, etc.)

      • API-based models (OpenAI, etc.)

    • Model orchestration (Ollama, vLLM, etc.)

  • Data Processing

    • Document parsing (PDF, PPTX, DOCX)

    • Data pipelines for ingestion → embedding → retrieval

  • Infrastructure

    • Docker / Kubernetes / Docker Swarm

    • GPU-based deployment (AMD / NVIDIA)

    • On-premise AI deployment (important for your case)

  • Search & Ranking

    • Hybrid search (BM25 + vector)

    • Reranking models (cross-encoder, etc.)


Advanced / Preferred Skills

  • Fine-tuning embedding or LLM models

  • Knowledge graph integration (Graph RAG)

  • Multi-agent AI systems

  • Enterprise system integration (ERP/CRM)

  • Security & data isolation (very important for enterprise AI)


Background (Ideal Background)

  • 5+ years in backend / system engineering

  • 2+ years in AI / LLM / NLP

Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or Statistics

  • Minimum 6 years of work experience, with minimum 4 years of experience in Data Science (predictive/ prescriptive analytics), Artificial Intelligence, or Business Intelligence

  • Proficient in minimum 2 machine learning tools

  • Proficient in minimum 1 AI tool/ platform (generative or agentic)

  • Proficient in minimum 1 data visualization tool

  • Experience/ knowledge in 6Sigma methodology and/or other project/ initiative management methodology is preferred

Our clients are financial advisers, insurance agents, and real-estate professionals running ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
AI Automation Specialist (Full-Time, Remote — Indonesia)

GHL · Make.com · n8n · OpenAI API · Webhooks | IDR 8M-10M/month | Singapore-based agency

About Amplified

We're a performance-ads agency out of Singapore. Our clients are financial advisers, insurance agents, and real-estate professionals running real 6–7 figure businesses. We run their lead generation end to end. Meta ads, landing pages, lead forms, follow-up sequences, CRM hygiene, all of it. When their phone rings, that's us.

We build systems that work, run campaigns that perform, and answer to clients who pay us to deliver.

Over the last year we've built a stack of AI-powered automations. AI qualification bots, lead-routing flows, WhatsApp sequences, GHL pipelines that quietly do a huge amount of work we used to do by hand every morning. It runs. Now it needs an owner: someone to keep it healthy, extend it, and build the next layer.

What You'll Actually Do

Lead capture and routing: the biggest slice of your week

  • Wire the full path: Meta lead form → GHL contact created → WhatsApp confirmation → calendar booking link, with the goal of every step firing inside 90 seconds of submit. Then build the error handling so it doesn't die silently at midnight. This is normally done through make or n8n.

  • Stand up GHL pipelines per client vertical (FA, insurance, property), each with its own stage triggers and follow-up logic. You'll take a client's messy process and turn it into a clean flow.

  • Build webhook listeners that catch lead data from landing pages, Typeform, and survey tools, and drop each lead into the right GHL sub-account with the right tags.

AI bots and conversation flows

  • Build GHL conversation-AI bots on the OpenAI API: prompt engineering, context injection, fallback handling, clean handoff to a human when it's time. These bots qualify leads. They're not glorified auto-replies.

  • Set up Make.com or n8n scenarios that call GPT to classify inbound messages, draft personalised follow-ups, or summarise a lead's history before anyone on the team opens the conversation.

  • Keep the bots current as client offers, qualifying questions, and objections change. This is a living system, not build-once-and-walk-away.

CRM maintenance and data integrity

  • Audit GHL sub-accounts for dead automations, broken webhooks, and leads that slipped through. Things break quietly. Your job is to catch it before the client feels it.

  • Build Make.com / n8n syncs between GHL and outside tools (sheets, Notion, reporting dashboards) without duplicating or losing a record.

  • Document everything you build: what it does, what fires it, what breaks it. Six months from now, you or a teammate should understand the flow in five minutes flat.

Client-facing support

  • When a client asks "why didn't I get that lead notification?", you dig in, find the actual cause, and write back a clear answer: what went wrong, what's fixed. Not "we're looking into it."

  • Join client check-ins when automation is on the agenda. You won't run the call, but you'll need to explain your work in plain English to someone who's never heard the word "webhook."

Internal tooling

  • Build the automations that take repetitive work off the team — spinning up new client sub-accounts, scheduling reports, firing alerts when something upstream goes sideways.

  • Scope new ideas with the founder: is this worth building, how long, which tool. Your read on that matters, and we want it.

How We Work / What We Value

Ownership is the floor, not the ceiling. If you built it, it's yours — including when it breaks at an inconvenient hour. "That's not my task" isn't a phrase we use. If a client's affected and you're the fastest person to fix it, you fix it.

We hire on written communication, hard. A lot of your work lands in front of clients: answering their questions, explaining a change, documenting a build. We need someone who can send a clear, professional message without it needing three rounds of edits. You don't have to be a writer. You have to think before you type.

No scorekeeping. A teammate's underwater and you've got air — you ask what they need, you don't wait to be asked, and you don't tally who carried what. The load is never split evenly on any given week; some weeks you carry more. If "but I'm already doing more than them" is a sentence you've said at work, this will frustrate you, and you'll frustrate us.

You give a damn whether it actually works. A broken flow bugs you until it's fixed, even when no one's watching, even when it's technically not your build. You double-check the edge case nobody asked about because you'd rather catch it than have a client catch it. People who treat this as "just a job to execute" do fine for a few months, and then we both feel it. We'd rather you self-select out now than three months in.

We give you room. We'll tell you the outcome we need and hand you the context. Then we get out of the way and trust you to figure out the how. No looking over your shoulder.

This Is NOT For You If…

  • Your first instinct when a flow fails is hunting for whose fault it is, not fixing it.

  • "It works, mostly" is good enough for you, and checking edge cases feels like a waste of time.

  • You get defensive when someone gives you feedback. We give feedback often, and it's never personal.

  • You send client replies that are technically a response but don't actually answer the question.

  • You're still learning GHL from scratch. We need someone who opens the platform and immediately knows where to go.

  • You enjoy office politics. Small team. There's nowhere for it to hide and no patience for it.

  • You'd describe yourself as someone who "just needs clear instructions to execute." This role needs someone who scopes their own work and speaks up when something doesn't make sense.

If any of those made you bristle instead of nod — we're probably not a fit, and that's completely fine. Better we both know now.

What We're Looking For

Must-have

  • Hands-on, production experience with GoHighLevel — sub-accounts, pipelines, workflows, conversation AI, automation triggers. Not "I've poked around." Real builds for real clients.

  • Hands-on experience with Make.com — multi-step scenarios, error handling, API modules, data mapping. You know exactly what to do when a module throws a 422.

  • OpenAI API — Bot-building is the biggest chunk of this role.

  • Comfortable building and debugging HTTP requests from scratch — headers, auth (API key, Bearer, basic OAuth), JSON payloads, webhook setup. You don't need a no-code wrapper to hit an API.

  • Able to read and write JSON

  • Clear written English with non-technical clients.

Nice-to-have

  • n8n — even basic cloud or self-hosted experience is a real plus.

  • A background in digital-marketing tools or CRM management (any CRM — the logic carries over).

  • A track record debugging multi-step automations where the failure point isn't obvious.

What We Offer

  • IDR 8-10M/month, based on your real depth in the stack. The top of that band is for someone who brings the full picture — GHL + Make mastery plus n8n and hands-on OpenAI API bot-building, not just one or two. We'll be straight with you about where you land and why.

  • 13th-month pay, as standard.

  • Full-time, fully remote, Indonesia-based.

  • Async-first, with a structured daily overlap window with the Singapore team.

  • Direct line to the founder. No layers, no chain to run things up, no bureaucracy.

  • You'll work on systems live businesses depend on, not internal dashboards nobody opens.

  • The stack keeps growing, and so does the scope. If you want to go deep on AI automation instead of staying a generalist, this is the seat.
title: CRM and Automations Specialist

description: SVO is a high-growth Indonesian e-commerce operation with a nationwide distributor network. The systems you build will run real operations from day one.Scope clarification: We are not training or fine-tuning models. We are building the connective tissue — MCP servers, Claude skills, tools, and agent...
jobDescriptionHtml:
SVO is a high-growth Indonesian e-commerce operation with a nationwide distributor network. The systems you build will run real operations from day one.

Scope clarification: We are not training or fine-tuning models. We are building the connective tissue — MCP servers, Claude skills, tools, and agents — that lets existing LLMs do useful work inside real business systems.


What You'll Build:

  • AI agents that connect to Meta Marketing API, Google Ads API, and SVO's internal systems for ad ops, creative generation, performance analysis, and audience research

  • MCP servers and Claude skills that wrap business workflows so non-technical operators can drive agents in natural language

  • nternal automation tools — sales script generation, customer insight extraction, distributor reporting

  • Production-grade integrations: monitoring, error handling, retry logic, cost tracking

What We're Looking for:

  • 3+ years Python experience in production environment.

  • Shipped at least one project using LLM APIs (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, or equivalent) and capable of integrating multiple AI APIs into a unified company AI agent.

  • Comfortable with REST APIs, async patterns, and production deployment.

  • Strong English reading comprehension — MCP and AI documentation is English-only.

  • High agency, ships fast, and comfortable with ambiguity.

Strong plus

  • Experience shipping an MCP server or equivalent agent infrastructure/orchestration (LangGraph, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, or custom orchestration).

  • Experience with Meta Marketing API or Google Ads API (performance marketing or ad ops background is a strong plus).

  • Familiarity with TypeScript and/or Next.js to help build interfaces or internal tools for the AI agents.

description:
About The Team
You will be a part of Group Enterprise Risk, which strategically oversees the risk management implementation across GoTo Group as a listed company, Gojek, and GoTo Financial.


About GoTo Group
GoTo is the largest digital ecosystem in Indonesia. GoTo's mission is to 'empower progress'...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About The Team

You will be a part of Group Enterprise Risk, which strategically oversees the risk management implementation across GoTo Group as a listed company, Gojek, and GoTo Financial.

About GoTo Group

GoTo is the largest digital ecosystem in Indonesia. GoTo's mission is to 'empower progress' by offering technology infrastructure and solutions that help everyone to access and thrive in the digital economy.

The GoTo ecosystem provides a wide range of services, including mobility, delivery, payments, financial services, and technology solutions for merchants. The ecosystem also provides e-commerce services through Tokopedia and banking services through its partnership with Bank Jago.

About Gojek 

Gojek is Southeast Asia’s leading on-demand platform and pioneer of the multi-service ecosystem with over 2.5 million driver partners across the regions offering a wide range of services such as transportation, food delivery, logistics and more. With its mission to create impact at scale, Gojek is committed to resolving consumer problems and raising standards of living by connecting consumers to the best providers of goods and services in the market.

About GoTo Financial

GoTo Financial accelerates financial inclusion through its leading financial services and merchants solutions. Its consumer services include GoPay and GoPayLater and serve businesses of all sizes through Midtrans, Moka, GoBiz Plus, GoBiz, and Selly. With its trusted and inclusive ecosystem of products, GoTo Financial is open to new growth opportunities and aims to empower everyone to Make It Happen, Make It Together, Make It Last.

GoTo and its business units, including Gojek and GoToFinancial ("GoTo") only post job opportunities on our official channels on our respective company websites and on LinkedIn. GoTo is not liable for any job postings or job offers that did not originate from us. You should conduct your own due diligence to prevent being victims of any fake job scams, if they did not originate from GoTo's official recruitment channels.

#LI-ONSITE

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
