jobDescriptionHtml:
Open Position :

  1. Data Scientist

  2. Legal

  3. Brand Management - Content Creator


Job Descriptions :

  1. Jobdesc For Data Scientist : membantu proses penggalian temuan (insight) data yang bernilai bagi bisnis. Selain itu, peran ini bertugas mendukung pengembangan visualisasi data dan aplikasi interaktif sebagai luaran akhir dari analisis preskriptif (prescriptive analytics) serta implementasi solusi berbasis kecerdasan buatan (artificial intelligence).

  2. Jobdesc for Legal : mengelola sistem dokumentasi hukum perusahaan dengan berkoordinasi bersama PIC terkait dalam pengumpulan data legal, serta melakukan pencatatan dan pembaruan data secara berkala sebagai sumber repository dan template perjanjian. Selain itu, peran ini bertugas membantu pengembangan sistem penyimpanan data hukum, menyusun panduan penggunaan template perjanjian, serta membuat dashboard pemantauan untuk dokumentasi proses dan analisis sengketa hukum (legal dispute).

  3. Jobdesc for Brand Management : Membantu proses perencanaan konten dan komunikasi brand, Melakukan riset konten, tren komunikasi, dan referensi visual/konseptual, Mendukung eksekusi materi komunikasi visual dengan internal maupun pihak terkait, Membantu penyusunan draft konten, materi presentasi, dan komunikasi pendukung


    Qualification :

  • Final-year undergraduate student or Bachelor’s degree graduate Law (for Legal), Engineering, Statistic, Computer, mathematic (For Data Scientist), Visual Communication Design (DKV) or Multimedia (for Brand Management),

  • Proficient in Excel, PowerPoint, SharePoint, Outlook, Power BI

  • Responsible, systematic, agile, adaptive, with strong communication skills

  • WFO, from 8 am to 5 pm

  • Willing to be placed in HO, Cilandak - Jakarta 

  • Salary 2 Million rupiah / month (based on attendance records)

  • Internship duration: 3 to 6 months

description: Responsibilities:Execute the duties of the Tridharma.Champion the accreditation process.Teach Information Systems courses with a specific focus on Data Engineering and Data Science.Develop and deliver curriculum for Information Systems subjects.Provide faith-based mentoring and academic guidance to ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Execute the duties of the Tridharma.

  • Champion the accreditation process.

  • Teach Information Systems courses with a specific focus on Data Engineering and Data Science.

  • Develop and deliver curriculum for Information Systems subjects.

  • Provide faith-based mentoring and academic guidance to students.

  • Participate in academic and administrative activities.

  • Serve as an advisor for the campus Information System.

  • Collaborate on projects, primarily at the international level.

  • Conduct research and publish in reputable journals.

Minimum Qualifications:

  • Master’s degree in Information System, Data Science, Computer Science, Industrial Engineering, or related fields. 

  • Demonstrated ability to teach and communicate effectively in English, as the medium of instruction at JIU is 100% English.

  • Knowledge of or prior experience with academic accreditation processes.

  • Strong knowledge or practical experience in Data Engineering and Data Science.

  • Strong knowledge or practical experience in Cloud (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure)

  • Experience in working in a diverse, multicultural environment. 

  • Proficiency in using Google Workspace and/or other productivity tools. 

  • Proficiency in Python and Java programming.

  • Proficiency in Tensorflow and Keras.

Preferred qualifications:

  • Professional-level Cloud Certification (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, or others).

  • Ph.D. degree in Information Systems, Data Science, Computer Science, Operations Research, Industrial Engineering, or related fields.

  • Experience in working as a Head of Department (KaProdi/Kepala Program Studi) or Dean.

  • Experience and proficiency in any of the fields below: 

    • Data Pipeline products (Beam, Spark, HDFS, Airflow, Kafka, etc.).

    • Distributed systems and Kubernetes (Docker, GKE, Knative, Istio, etc.).

    • ERP systems (SAP).

    • Optimization theory (Linear Programming, Mix-integer Programming). 

    • Cloud Architecture and/or Data Pipelining. 

    • Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence.

description: CBRE is the global leader in commercial real estate services and investments. With services, insights and data that span every dimension of the industry, we create solutions for clients of every size, in every sector and across every geography. CBRE is the place where talented people who want to do ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
CBRE is the global leader in commercial real estate services and investments. With services, insights and data that span every dimension of the industry, we create solutions for clients of every size, in every sector and across every geography. CBRE is the place where talented people who want to do impactful work can realize potential in every dimension.

CBRE Global Workplace Solutions (GWS)

As one of CBRE's core global businesses, Global Workplace Solutions (GWS) provides end-to-end services to occupier clients across the entire lifecycle of a building.

Our teams help companies improve their operations and reduce costs, through expert facilities management, project management, real estate and energy and sustainability services. Our dedicated teams work across all industries, and support clients ranging from the Fortune 500 global companies to single, iconic buildings.


About the Role:

As a CBRE Security Manager, you will oversee the site security operations for our client responsible for the security operations for a small to medium-sized property.


What You'll Do:

  • Manage security vendors responsible for guarding operations and security systems (Access Control, CCTV, Intrusion Detection)
  • Coordinate and manage the team's daily activities. Establish work schedules, assign tasks, and cross-train staff. Set and track staff and department deadlines. Mentor and coach as needed.
  • Oversee site security operations involving visitor access and activities.
  • Review, enhance and implement security policies, protocols, and procedures. Ensure compliance with company policies and industry regulations.
  • Act as the point of contact for ongoing communication with Building Services staff about site security operations. Collaborate with department managers to determine security needs.
  • Support department regional administration and coordination tasks such as security survey scheduling, policy document review and business continuity coordination.
  • Investigate, report, and maintain records of security-related incidents on the property. Coordinate responses to emergencies and alarms.
  • Prepare surveillance equipment maintenance schedules and facility repairs in a timely manner.
  • Protect the organization and clients from damage and loss.
  • Consult with client representatives on issues related to security personnel.
  • Control budgets for security operations and monitor expenses.
  • Gather security intelligence and implement preventative measures. Keep abreast of innovative technologies and advancements in security services.
  • Lead by example and model behaviour that are consistent with CBRE RISE values. Influence parties of shared interests to reach an agreement.
  • Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve day-to-day operational issues which may or may not be evident in existing systems and processes.

What You'll Need:

  • Bachelor's Degree preferred with 3-5 years of relevant experience. In lieu of a degree, a combination of experience and education will be considered. Completed Local or National security staff certification, required.
  • Relevant experience in Security & incident management is a must.
  • Meet the physical requirements of this role including stooping, standing, walking, climbing stairs/ladders, and the ability to lift/carry heavy loads of 50 lbs. or more.
  • Experience in the areas of staffing, selection, training, development, coaching, mentoring, measuring, appraising, and rewarding performance and retention preferred.
  • Ability to guide the exchange of sensitive, complicated, and difficult information, convey performance expectations and handle problems.
  • Leadership skills to motivate team impact on quality, efficiency, and effectiveness of the job discipline and department.
  • In-depth knowledge of Microsoft Office products. Examples include Word, Excel, Outlook, etc.
  • Extensive organizational skills with a strong inquisitive mindset.

Other info:

  • Permanent hire
  • Working hours 8:00-17:00
  • This is full bilingual position in Bahasa and English

Why CBRE

When you join CBRE, you become part of the global leader in commercial real estate services and investment that helps businesses and people thrive. We are dynamic problem solvers and forward-thinking professionals who create significant impact. Our collaborative culture is built on our shared values - respect, integrity, service and excellence - and we value the diverse perspectives, backgrounds and skillsets of our people. At CBRE, you have the opportunity to chart your own course and realize your potential. We welcome all applicants.

Applicant AI Use Disclosure

We value human interaction to understand each candidate's unique experience, skills and aspirations. We do not use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to make hiring decisions, and we ask that candidates disclose any use of AI in the application and interview process.

If the above interests you, we would love to hear from you!

description: Background & Purpose of the Job :As a Financial Planning & Analyst in the retail fashion industry, you will support financial planning, business performance analysis, and data-driven decision-making through financial reporting, BI dashboards, and analytics. This role partners closely with finance, m...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Background & Purpose of the Job :

As a Financial Planning & Analyst in the retail fashion industry, you will support financial planning, business performance analysis, and data-driven decision-making through financial reporting, BI dashboards, and analytics. This role partners closely with finance, merchandising, and commercial teams to deliver insights that support sales, inventory, pricing, and profitability performance.

What You'll Do :

  • Develop and maintain BI dashboards using Power BI/Tableau for financial, sales, and operational reporting.

  • Analyze sales, inventory, pricing, margin, and store performance to generate business insights.

  • Support budgeting, forecasting, management reporting, and financial analysis.

  • Write and optimize SQL queries to extract data from ERP, POS, and operational systems.

  • Build automated reporting workflows to improve efficiency and reduce manual reporting.

  • Establish KPI definitions and reporting standards to ensure data consistency.

  • Collaborate with Finance, IT, merchandising, and business teams to support decision-making.

  • Support feasibility studies for new stores, brand launches, and commercial initiatives.

What You’ll Need To Succeed :

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Analytics, Data Analytics, Information Systems, or related field.

  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in FP&A, Business Intelligence, or Data Analytics, preferably in retail or fashion industry.

  • Strong analytical thinking and understanding of retail performance drivers such as sales, inventory, margin, and pricing.

  • Hands-on experience with Power BI/Tableau, SQL, ERP systems, and automation tools.

  • Strong communication skills with ability to translate data into business insights.

  • Detail-oriented, proactive, and adaptable in a fast-paced retail environment.
title: Financial Planning & Business Intelligence Analyst

description: Key Responsibilities:- Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports using BI tools such as Tableau, Looker Studio, or similar.- Build executive dashboards for head office, owner, directors, and management across multiple companies/business units.- Translate business requirements into effect...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities:

- Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports using BI tools such as Tableau, Looker Studio, or similar.

- Build executive dashboards for head office, owner, directors, and management across multiple companies/business units.

- Translate business requirements into effective BI dashboards, reports, KPIs, and analytical solutions.

- Build and maintain self-service BI datasets to support scalable analytics across business units.

- Collaborate with Data Engineer to ensure dashboard data is accurate, clean, and ready for analysis.

- Perform data analysis to identify trends, risks, opportunities, and business insights.

- Ensure consistency of KPI definitions such as revenue, profit, margin, cashflow, receivables, inventory, and operational performance.

- Optimize dashboard performance through data modeling, calculated measures, filtering, and query optimization.

- Monitor and validate data consistency between BI dashboards, data warehouse, and source systems.

- Prepare management reports and present insights to business stakeholders.

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Analytics, Statistics, Mathematics, Business, Finance, Accounting, or related fields.

- Minimum 3 years of experience in BI, Data Analytics, Reporting, Dashboard Development, or similar role.

- Proficiency in Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio, or other BI tools.

- Strong proficiency in SQL and understanding of data modeling for reporting.

- Experience in building executive dashboards, operational dashboards, and management reports.

- Solid understanding of data warehouse, data mart, KPI development, and performance optimization.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities.

- Proven ability to align BI solutions with business objectives.

- Good understanding of business metrics in finance, sales, operations or multi-company reporting.

- Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodology and cross-functional collaboration is a plus.

- Strong communication skills and ability to explain data insights to non-technical stakeholders.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Type: 3-Month Contract (Must be able to join ASAP)

Timeline: Project Deadline W1 May 2026

Role Level: Middle

We are looking for a highly skilled Tableau Expert to turn high-level business ideas into sophisticated, interactive dashboards. You will bridge the gap between raw data and executive insights while ensuring strict adherence to corporate branding and documentation standards.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Dashboard Development: Create advanced Tableau dashboards using complex calculations, LOD expressions, and high-performance extracts.

  • Requirement Gathering & Alignment: Translate ambiguous "big picture" business requests into clear, visual KPIs and storytelling layouts.

  • Data Validation & SQL: Conduct data feasibility audits and perform light data adjustments/troubleshooting using SQL.

  • Branding & UI/UX: Design dashboards in strict accordance with company branding rules (aesthetics, typography, and color schemes).

  • Minimum 3 years of specialized experience in Tableau development.

  • Expert-level technical skills in Tableau Desktop and familiarity with Tableau Server/Cloud.

  • Proficient in writing SQL queries for data validation and manipulation.

  • Proven ability to work with corporate design systems and strict brand guidelines.

  • Strong communication, stakeholder management, and meticulous documentation habits.

  • Available to start IMMEDIATELY.

Technical Skillset:

  • Tableau Desktop & Tableau Server/Cloud (Expert)

  • MSSQL

  • Excel

  • Python (Optional/Plus Point)

description: About the ChallengeDo you have what it takes to transform complex data into strategic insights that drive business growth and operational excellence?As a Data Analyst Manager, you will be responsible for leading data analysis initiatives, developing business insights, and supporting management decis...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Challenge
Do you have what it takes to transform complex data into strategic insights that drive business growth and operational excellence?

As a Data Analyst Manager, you will be responsible for leading data analysis initiatives, developing business insights, and supporting management decision-making through accurate and actionable data reporting. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to identify trends, improve business processes, and drive data-driven strategies across the organization.

This role requires strong analytical thinking, leadership capability, and the ability to manage data projects in a fast-paced business environment. If you are passionate about turning data into meaningful business impact, this role will challenge you to operate at a strategic level.

Requirements

  • Minimum Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Systems, Business Analytics, or related field

  • Minimum 5–8 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or data management with at least 2–3 years in managerial level

  • Strong proficiency in data visualization tools, SQL, Microsoft Excel, and business intelligence platforms such as Power BI or Tableau

  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills with ability to present insights to management level

  • Experience in managing data reporting, dashboard development, forecasting, and business performance analysis

Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage data analysis projects to support business strategy and operational decision-making

  • Develop dashboards, reports, and data visualization tools to monitor business performance and KPIs

  • Analyze large and complex datasets to identify trends, opportunities, and actionable business insights

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve reporting processes, data accuracy, and operational efficiency

  • Ensure data governance, reporting consistency, and timely delivery of analytical insights to management
title: Data Analyst Manager

description: Position OverviewWe are looking for a creative, fast-moving, and execution-focused Social Media Specialist to manage and grow the online presence of our company brands across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, and emerging platforms.This role is responsible for planning content, ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Position Overview

We are looking for a creative, fast-moving, and execution-focused Social Media Specialist to manage and grow the online presence of our company brands across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, and emerging platforms.

This role is responsible for planning content, executing daily social media operations, increasing engagement, supporting campaigns, and helping transform the company into a modern, digitally-driven brand ecosystem.

The ideal candidate understands:

  • Content trends

  • Consumer psychology

  • Basic branding principles

  • Short-form video culture

  • Social commerce behavior

  • Platform algorithms

  • How to make boring corporate things look interesting without becoming cringe


Key Responsibilities

Content Planning & Execution

  • Create and manage monthly content calendars

  • Plan daily content postings across all platforms

  • Coordinate media & graphic content production

  • Write engaging captions and platform-appropriate copy

  • Ensure all content aligns with brand guidelines and company objectives

  • Support product launches, campaigns, promotions, and company events

Social Media Management

  • Manage company social media accounts:

    • Instagram

    • TikTok

    • Facebook

    • LinkedIn

    • YouTube Shorts

    • Google Business Profile

  • Schedule and publish content consistently

  • Monitor comments, DMs, mentions, and engagement

  • Escalate customer complaints or PR-sensitive issues appropriately

  • Maintain a professional yet engaging brand voice

Short-Form Video & Trend Execution

  • Identify trending content formats, sounds, and viral opportunities

  • Assist in scripting and directing short-form videos

  • Work with internal teams and talent for content creation

  • Support live selling and livestream campaigns where required

  • Repurpose long-form content into short clips and highlights

Analytics & Reporting

  • Track social media performance metrics:

    • Reach

    • Engagement

    • Follower growth

    • Video views

    • Click-through rates

    • Conversion performance

  • Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports

  • Recommend improvements based on platform analytics

Collaboration

  • Work closely with:

    • Sales team

    • Business Intelligence team

    • E-commerce team

    • Graphic designers

    • Procurement/principal brands

  • Coordinate with external agencies, KOLs, influencers, and photographers when needed

Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in:

    • Marketing

    • Communications

    • Multimedia

    • Business

    • or related field

  • Minimum 1–3 years experience in social media management, digital marketing, or content creation

  • FMCG, foodservice, retail, or e-commerce experience is preferred

Technical Skills

  • Strong understanding of:

    • Instagram

    • TikTok

    • Facebook

    • LinkedIn

    • YouTube algorithms and trends

  • Familiar with:

    • Canva

    • CapCut

    • Meta Business Suite

    • Google Drive

    • Google Sheets

    • Basic video editing tools

  • Photography and videography skills are a plus

  • Basic copywriting ability is required

Soft Skills

  • Creative and trend-aware

  • Fast response and execution speed

  • Strong communication skills

  • Organized and able to manage deadlines

  • Comfortable appearing on camera is a plus

  • Willing to work during events, campaigns, or occasional weekends
title: Social Media Specialist

description: Data Analyst RequirementsTechnical Skills• Proficient in SQL for data extraction, joins, aggregation, query optimization, and data validation.• Strong understanding of ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes and data pipelines.• Experience using Apache Airflow for workflow orchestration, scheduling...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Data Analyst Requirements

Technical Skills
• Proficient in SQL for data extraction, joins, aggregation, query optimization, and data validation.
• Strong understanding of ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes and data pipelines.
• Experience using Apache Airflow for workflow orchestration, scheduling, and monitoring.
• Able to create dashboards and data visualizations using tools such as Metabase, Redash, Looker Studio, Power BI, or similar platforms.
• Strong knowledge of data analysis, data cleaning, and exploratory data analysis.
• Familiar with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or BigQuery.
• Understanding of data warehousing and data modeling concepts is a plus.
• Proficient in Excel or Google Sheets for reporting and analysis.


Responsibilities
• Analyze and interpret data to generate actionable business insights.
• Build, maintain, and improve dashboards for monitoring and reporting purposes.
• Write, optimize, and maintain SQL queries for analytics and reporting needs.
• Develop, monitor, and troubleshoot ETL pipelines using Apache Airflow.
• Collaborate with product, engineering, and business teams to support data-driven decision making.
• Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and overall data quality.
• Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities from data analysis.

Qualifications
• Minimum 1–3 years of experience as a Data Analyst or similar role.
• Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
• Able to communicate insights clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
• Comfortable working with large and complex datasets.
• High attention to detail and accuracy.
• Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks effectively.

Highly Preferred
• Proficient with AI-first workflows for data analysis, reporting, query generation, and productivity enhancement.

Nice to Have
• Experience in SaaS, analytics products, or monitoring systems.
• Familiarity with Python for data processing or automation.
• Basic understanding of statistics, KPI metrics, and business intelligence concepts.
• Experience building automated reporting, alerting, or monitoring systems.
• Knowledge of API integration and data ingestion processes.
title: Data Analyst

jobDescriptionHtml:
JOB DESCRIPTION :

Data Planning & Processing

  • Membuat & menyederhanakan kerangka database dan query untuk laporan.

  • Melakukan proses laporan rutin harian, mingguan, & bulanan dalam MS Excel & Google Spreadsheet

  • Melakukan evaluasi dari data konsumen sesuai dengan kriteria yang diberikan

  • Melakukan proses evaluasi terhadap bisnis proses yang terjadi, sehingga bisa lebih efektif dan efisien

  • Memimpin team dalam melakukan proses data laporan rutin

Analisa Data

  • Membuat analisa strategis dari laporan terkait data customer, sellout, & data retail lainnya.

  • Memberikan advice / rekomendasi progressif yang berbasis data kepada management

  • Menyajikan data laporan & rekomendasi dalam bentuk yang mudah dibaca

Presentasi Analisa

  • Melakukan presentasi kepada semua stakeholder & client terkait analisa & rekomendasi

 

QUALIFICATION :

Basic Qualification

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 khusus jurusan Teknik Informatika/Matematika/Manajemen atau sejenisnya

  • Minimal pengalaman 5 tahun di bidang analisis data, khususnya CRM, Survey / Research, & Perusahaan Alihdaya

Hard Skills Requirements

  • Menguasai database dan query (minimal SQL atau lainnya)

  • Memahami dasar-dasar bahasa pemprograman

  • Menguasai analytical program (Google Data Studio, Tableau, atau lainnya)

  • Menguasai Microsoft Office (terutama excel; fungsi macro dalam excel dan powerpoint)

  • Menguasai Google Workspace (Google Spreadsheet, Google Slides, etc)

Soft Skills Requirements

  • Memiliki Business Mindset yang baik

  • Memiliki Khazanah pengetahuan proses bisnis dunia retail yang luas & menyeluruh

  • Mampu berfikir kritis & detail

  • Mempunyai leadership yang kuat, thinking yang analistis dan kemampuan me-maintain hubungan yang baik dengan klient

  • Memiliki skill komunikasi presentasi yang baik dan mampu bekerja dalam tekanan

description: Responsibility:• Lead the planning and execution of strategic digitalization initiatives from discovery to go-live.• Design and maintain enterprise architecture blueprints that are modern, interoperable, and future-oriented.• Build integrated systems leveraging data warehouses, analytics, and AI to ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibility:

• Lead the planning and execution of strategic digitalization initiatives from discovery to go-live.

• Design and maintain enterprise architecture blueprints that are modern, interoperable, and future-oriented.

• Build integrated systems leveraging data warehouses, analytics, and AI to support business decision-making and process automation.

• Establish standards for System Design, QA, Data, and AI as the foundation of digital transformation, ensuring compliance with audits, regulations, and best engineering practices.

• Develop team capabilities through coaching, upskilling, and continuous improvement programs.

• Act as a strategic liaison with stakeholders, ensuring adoption, alignment, and measurable contributions to revenue growth and cost efficiency.


Requirement:

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.

• More than 7 years of professional experience in handling enterprise system architecture, including design, integration, and management of large-scale systems.

• At least 3 years of proven experience in leveraging AI platforms & tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, n8n.io, LLM, etc.) to accelerate workflows, enhance productivity, and support new system development.

• Proven experience in leading application system development teams and managing digital transformation projects.

• Background as a software developer is considered a strong plus, demonstrating deep understanding of system development processes.

• Strong leadership, strategic communication, and a track record of guiding teams to deliver IT solutions with measurable business impact.
title: Digital Transformation & System Solution Head

description: ResponsibilitiesCollect, consolidate, and update promo monitoring data from internal systems and field reports.Analyze promo performance, including sell-in, sell-out, uplift, redemption, and program effectiveness.Prepare GTM, consumer promo, distribution, coverage, availability, MSL, and OSA reports...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities

  • Collect, consolidate, and update promo monitoring data from internal systems and field reports.

  • Analyze promo performance, including sell-in, sell-out, uplift, redemption, and program effectiveness.

  • Prepare GTM, consumer promo, distribution, coverage, availability, MSL, and OSA reports.

  • Conduct regular market visits to monitor promo implementation and identify execution gaps.

  • Support promo deployment, POSM readiness, approval documents, promo archives, and budget monitoring.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Management, Business, or related field.

  • Minimum 2–4 years of experience in FMCG, especially Marketing, Trade Marketing, GTM/RTM, Sales Support, or Field Marketing.

  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, communication, teamwork, and execution skills.

  • Advanced Microsoft Excel skills; Power BI, PowerPoint, SAP, DMS, or SFA will be an advantage.

  • Experienced in promo monitoring, distribution reports, sell-out analysis, and willing to conduct regular market visits.
title: Marketing Data Analyst (GTM) Supervisor

• Develop team capabilities through coaching, upskilling, and continuous improvement programs.

• Act as a strategic liaison with stakeholders, ensuring adoption, alignment, and measurable contributions to revenue growth and cost efficiency.


Requirement:

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.

• More than 7 years of professional experience in handling enterprise system architecture, including design, integration, and management of large-scale systems.

• At least 3 years of proven experience in leveraging AI platforms & tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, n8n.io, LLM, etc.) to accelerate workflows, enhance productivity, and support new system development.

• Proven experience in leading application system development teams and managing digital transformation projects.

• Background as a software developer is considered a strong plus, demonstrating deep understanding of system development processes.

• Strong leadership, strategic communication, and a track record of guiding teams to deliver IT solutions with measurable business impact.
title: Digital Transformation & System Solution Head

jobDescriptionHtml:

  • Collect, consolidate, and update promo monitoring data from internal systems and field reports.

  • Prepare GTM, consumer promo, distribution, coverage, availability, MSL, and OSA reports.

  • Support promo deployment, POSM readiness, approval documents, promo archives, and budget monitoring.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Management, Business, or related field.

  • Minimum 2–4 years of experience in FMCG, especially Marketing, Trade Marketing, GTM/RTM, Sales Support, or Field Marketing.

  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, communication, teamwork, and execution skills.

  • Advanced Microsoft Excel skills; Power BI, PowerPoint, SAP, DMS, or SFA will be an advantage.

  • Experienced in promo monitoring, distribution reports, sell-out analysis, and willing to conduct regular market visits.
title: Marketing Data Analyst (GTM) Supervisor

Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
5 years of experience with customer-facing designing and deploying distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies.
Experience with data modeling techniques...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Minimum qualifications:
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • 5 years of experience with customer-facing designing and deploying distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies.
  • Experience with data modeling techniques and methodologies for traditional Online Analytical Processing or Online Transaction Processing (OLAP/OLTP) databases and modern data warehouses.
  • Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (e.g., Mongo, Cassandra, DynamoDB, etc.).
  • Ability to communicate in Bahasa language fluently to support client relationship management in this region.
Preferred qualifications:
  • 5 years of experience in managing technical client service.
  • Experience with reading software code in one or more languages such as Java, Python, NodeJS, Golang, JavaScript.
  • Experience in devising migration approaches, and migrating on-premise data processing systems to Cloud.
  • Experience with designing and deploying distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies: SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, Hadoop, Spark, Flink, Kafka, Druid, Hive, HBase, Vertica, Netezza, or Teradata.
  • Knowledge of building and operationalizing data pipelines.
About the job

The Google Cloud Consulting Professional Services team guides customers through the moments that matter most in their cloud journey to help businesses thrive. We help customers transform and evolve their business through the use of Google’s global network, web-scale data centers, and software infrastructure. As part of an innovative team in this rapidly growing business, you will help shape the future of businesses of all sizes and use technology to connect with customers, employees, and partners.

In this role, you will work with customers on projects to transform their business with data. You will provide consulting, solution design, and technical program management capabilities to customer engagements while guiding customer executives and technical stakeholders on project related decisions. You will serve as a liaison between the customers and product teams to drive product excellence and adoption. You will also work with Google partners currently servicing accounts to manage programs, deliver consulting services, and provide technical guidance.

Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.

Responsibilities
  • Work with customer technical leads, client executives, and partners to manage and deliver implementations of cloud solutions.
  • Become a trusted advisor to decision makers throughout the engagement.
  • Work with internal specialists, product and engineering teams to package best practices and lessons learned into thought leadership, methodologies, and published assets.
  • Interact with business, partners, and customer technical stakeholders to manage project scope, priorities, deliverables, risks/issues, and timelines for client outcomes.
  • Propose solution architectures and manage the deployment of cloud based databases, big data, and analytics solutions according to customer requirements and implement best practices.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.
title: Cloud Consultant, Data Analytics, Google Cloud (Bahasa)

description: We are seeking a visionary and commercially astute Chief Technology Officer to join our senior leadership team. In this pivotal role, you will drive the technology strategy that underpins our consulting services, accelerates digital transformation for our clients, and builds scalable internal capabi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are seeking a visionary and commercially astute Chief Technology Officer to join our senior leadership team. In this pivotal role, you will drive the technology strategy that underpins our consulting services, accelerates digital transformation for our clients, and builds scalable internal capabilities that keep us at the forefront of the industry.

As CTO, you will bridge the gap between business strategy and technology execution — both within our firm and in the advisory work we deliver to clients across industries

Key Responsibilities:

Technology Strategy & Vision

▸     Define and own the firm-wide technology roadmap, aligning it with business growth objectives and client service delivery.

▸     Identify emerging technologies (AI/ML, cloud, automation) and assess their impact on consulting service lines.

▸     Champion digital innovation, positioning the firm as a technology-forward advisory partner.

Client Engagement & Delivery

▸     Serve as the senior technology advisor on high-value client engagements, providing strategic guidance on digital transformation, architecture, and tech due diligence.

▸     Lead or oversee technology workstreams within complex, multi-disciplinary consulting projects.

▸     Build trusted relationships with C-suite client stakeholders, translating business challenges into technology solutions.

Internal Technology & Operations

▸     Oversee the firm's internal technology infrastructure, tools, and data platforms.

▸     Drive adoption of AI-powered tools and automation to enhance internal productivity and knowledge management.

▸     Ensure cybersecurity, data governance, and compliance with relevant regulations (ISO 27001, GDPR, etc.).

People & Organizational Leadership

▸     Build, mentor, and lead a high-performing technology team across engineering, architecture, and data functions.

▸     Foster a culture of continuous learning, innovation, and engineering excellence.

▸     Collaborate cross-functionally with practice leads, HR, and operations to embed technology capabilities across the firm.

Commercial & Financial Accountability

▸     Own the technology budget and drive cost-effective vendor and partner management.

▸     Contribute to business development — including proposals, pitches, and thought leadership — to grow the firm's technology advisory revenue.

▸     Support the development of new technology-driven service offerings and go-to-market strategies.


Qualifications & Experience

Required

▸     20+ years of progressive technology leadership experience, with at least 5 years in a CTO, VP Engineering, or equivalent executive role.

▸     Proven experience in a management consulting, professional services, or advisory environment.

▸     Deep expertise in digital transformation, enterprise architecture, and emerging technologies.

▸     Strong track record of engaging C-suite stakeholders and translating strategy into execution.

▸     Demonstrated ability to build and lead cross-functional technology teams in a fast-paced environment.

▸     Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related field.

Preferred

▸     MBA or advanced degree in a technical or business discipline.

▸     Experience working with private equity, investment banks, or large-scale enterprise clients.

▸     Published thought leadership, speaking engagements, or industry recognitions.

▸     Certifications in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) or enterprise architecture frameworks (TOGAF).


Core Competencies:

Technical

• Cloud & Infrastructure (AWS / Azure / GCP)

• Enterprise Architecture & Systems Design

• AI, ML & Data Engineering

• Cybersecurity & Risk Management

• Agile, DevOps & Product Delivery

Leadership &  Business

• Executive Communication & Stakeholder Influence

• Strategic Thinking & Business Acumen

• Team Building & Talent Development

• Commercial Development & Proposal Writing

• Change Management & Transformation
title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)

description: The Asset Management Specialist will work in the warehouse/distribution center in IDC and handle computer assets and peripherals. Typical duties includeReceiving, processing, and unpacking goods, signing for packages, preparing computer kits for distribution, updating inventory records, counting box...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Asset Management Specialist will work in the warehouse/distribution center in IDC and handle computer assets and peripherals. Typical duties include

  • Receiving, processing, and unpacking goods, signing for packages, preparing computer kits for distribution, updating inventory records, counting boxes, and reporting on basic troubleshooting of defective goods.

  • Uses and operates manual and electronic documents, files, and records (shipping accounts, bar-coding, inventory, monthly inventory reporting, electronic delivery logs, incoming shipments, etc.) to properly document activities, and provide material and reliable resources information.

  • Utilizes asset management tools such as bar code scanners to perform inventories.

  • Provides outstanding customer service by maintaining attention to detail, completing assigned work in a timely manner, and maintaining an efficient and effective work environment.

  • Performs other related duties as assigned to ensure the efficient and effective functioning of the Asset Management Team.

  • Maintains a detailed and accurate log of all items shipped, received, or moved within the area of responsibility.

  • Receive goods at the datacenter

Requirements:

  • Good communication skills in English and strong learning skills.

  • Proficient with Microsoft Excel

  • Education: Associate Degree and above.
title: Asset Management Specialist (DATA CENTER OPERATIONS)

description: The Server Delivery Technician Team shall be responsible for providing technical and operational support for server delivery activities within the data center. The team’s primary focus shall include daily delivery progress management, vendor supervision, asset lifecycle control, deployment inspectio...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Server Delivery Technician Team shall be responsible for providing technical and operational support for server delivery activities within the data center. The team’s primary focus shall include daily delivery progress management, vendor supervision, asset lifecycle control, deployment inspection, and operational assistance. The service provider shall work in close coordination with internal project managers, data center operations, and cross-functional stakeholders to ensure all deployment and maintenance activities are conducted safely, efficiently, and in full compliance with applicable standards and procedures.

Responsibilities:

  • Monitor and manage daily server delivery progress; identify, resolve, or escalate delivery risks in a timely manner.

  • Supervise vendors during on-site operations within the data hall.

  • Coordinate and manage vendor activities to ensure adherence to ByteDance operational and safety standards.

  • Facilitate asset verification and receiving process, ensuring full alignment with delivery documentation and inventory systems.

  • Inspect cabling deployment for compliance with design specifications and quality standards.

  • Conduct server deployment inspections, including verification of physical mounting, labeling, compliance, housekeeping, manifold connections, CDU water/temperature/pressure levels, pressure testing, EPDM, and hose connections.

  • Provide operating system installation support as instructed by internal technical teams for delivery or handover purposes.

  • Conduct regular data hall walkthroughs and inspections to identify risks, irregularities, or compliance issues.

  • Conduct inspection of racks, L-brackets, and rPDUs as required.

  • Provide remote hands support, including basic troubleshooting, physical verification, and patching assistance.

  • Ensure full QA/QC compliance and adherence to all site safety regulations.

  • Prepare and submit daily work summary and progress reports.

  • Support incident escalation and resolution processes.

  • Perform post-work verification and complete handover.

  • Maintain effective communication capabilities in both English and Thai languages.

Requirements:

  • Good communication skills in English and strong learning skills.

  • Proficient with Microsoft Excel

  • Education: Associate Degree and above.
title: Server Delivery Specialist (DATA CENTER OPERATIONS)

description: Job Purpose.The WebBeds APAC Commercial Technology  team is looking for a new colleague to join the team to support our growing WebBeds business in the Asia Pacific region.You will be supporting and assisting our clients in Asia Pacific to connect our hotel product to client's systems . Key activiti...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Purpose.

The WebBeds APAC Commercial Technology  team is looking for a new colleague to join the team to support our growing WebBeds business in the Asia Pacific region.

  • You will be supporting and assisting our clients in Asia Pacific to connect our hotel product to client's systems . Key activities will be to support the activities to onboard new API clients, maintain and support existing API clients.

  • You will manage the activities around setting up, mapping and ongoing monitoring of our API client connections.

  • You will need to work with technical and commercial teams fielding general questions, monitoring trends and performance, investigating issues and working to find answers and solutions to help support our APAC API clients in best possible way.

  • You will be involved in all parts of our system, becoming an expert in the technicalities and workflows underpinning the end to end business processes from purchasing to selling and everything in between.

The successful candidate will be a person with a technical mind who loves solving mysteries and appreciates the value of great support. We aim to find someone with excellent problem solving skills who is able to diagnose, evaluate and resolve complex problem situations, and when needed, escalate to appropriate colleagues.
This role requires good communication skills and ability to discuss a broad range of IT topics both with a technical and non-technical audience.

Key Responsibilities.

  • Being one of the experts of our system and API connectivity.

  • Monitor, maintain and optimize API client integrations, and also being involved in API clients integration.

  • Provide exceptional technical support in person, via phone, chat and email as appropriate.

  • Create and maintain documentation and knowledge base articles

  • Diagnose, evaluate and resolve complex problem situations

  • Work with IT / platform support team to resolve bugs.

Required Experience and Knowledge.
Qualifications & Knowledge

  • At least 2 years of experience working with application support / IT related field.

  • Knowledge of XML, SOAP, REST or similar

  • Self-motivated and able to work well under pressure

  • Proven ability to operate and succeed in a fast paced environment with various competing priorities both independently and as part of a team

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

  • Fluency in English both written and spoken, is a must

  • Any technical experience in software development is a plus

  • Ability to understand SQL queries is a plus

  • Quick learner.

  • Might be needed to work from 14:00 to 23:00 Jakarta time, including weekends on a rotational basis.

  • Proficiency in speaking and writing Mandarin would be considered a plus.

Why choose us as your next destination?

We are super proud of our dedicated team of friendly, energetic & passionate professionals. Our people are key to the success of our business & everybody at WebBeds has their own unique role to play as we continue to drive the company forward.
Over 50 different languages are spoken by our workforce, but whether working from offices in Dubai or London or out in the field in Johannesburg or Buenos Aires, we all share the common goal to take pride in what we do & to deliver our partners with unbeatable service & support.

  • International highly skilled group of experts from all around the globe 🌎

  • Dynamic environment with the chance to grow, influence & impact change ⚡

  • Disruptive, fast-growing market leader within travel & endless possibilities 💼

  • Culture built on collaboration🤝 empowerment and innovation 💡

description: Business UnitCloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and ne...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Business Unit
Cloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and network security. While driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, CSIG helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses. What the Role Entails

1. Migration Architecture Design & Hands-on Implementation:

Design architecture migration solutions for public cloud customers. Focus on deep technical implementation for migrating overseas mainstream stacks (BigQuery, Databricks, Snowflake, etc.) to Tencent Cloud WeData + DLC/EMR (storage-compute separation architecture). Deploy migration environments, execute data synchronization, and perform business cutovers on the front line.

2. End-to-End Project Management & Delivery: Take ownership of the overall project schedule, risk control, and technical solution governance. Coordinate internal and external resources to overcome organizational and technical barriers, ensuring the successful final delivery of the migration project.

3. Process Assurance & Technical Support: Act as the primary technical point of contact for troubleshooting and resolving complex issues during migration. Ensure a fast and smooth transition to the cloud by managing data consistency, business continuity, and providing comprehensive technical guidance.

4. Deep Technical Optimization: Provide full-stack technical support, including but not limited to SQL syntax automated conversion/rewriting, Spark/Flink operator tuning, and post-migration performance benchmarking. Ensure that business performance on Tencent Cloud meets or exceeds expectations.

5. Product-Research Collaboration & Best Practices: Work closely with Solution Architects (SA) to professionally summarize and feed back real-world customer requirements, pain points, and tool defects. Assist SAs in refining migration roadmaps and co-authoring "Best Practice Manuals" for migrating from overseas cloud platforms to Tencent Cloud.

Who We Look For

1. Hardcore Technical Background: Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science or related fields; 5+ years of experience in Big Data. Proficient in at least one programming language (Java, Scala, or Python) with strong coding skills and logic conversion capabilities.

2. Overseas Stack Expertise: Familiar with the architecture and use cases of at least one major product: BigQuery, Databricks, or Snowflake. Understand the differences between these and open-source ecosystems (Spark, Hive); cross-cloud migration experience is a plus.

3. System Analysis & Large-scale Management: Strong capability in system problem analysis and resolving complex architectural issues. Proven experience in cluster performance tuning, troubleshooting, source code optimization, and version upgrades; experience managing large-scale clusters (1000+ nodes) is preferred.

4. Migration Delivery Experience: Extensive experience in Big Data migration implementation and management. Master common migration workflows and methodologies for big data components. Familiar with mainstream vendor platforms and a proven track record of delivering large-scale cloud migration projects (PB-level).

5. Core Component Principles: Deep understanding of the Hadoop ecosystem, with source-code level or deep tuning experience in HDFS, Yarn, Spark, Hive, Flink, Doris, Iceberg/Hudi, etc. Capable of handling underlying compatibility issues in heterogeneous environments.

6. Soft Skills & Professionalism: Excellent customer service awareness, communication, and resource coordination skills. Proactive, self-driven, and highly responsible. Able to thrive under pressure in cross-cloud and overseas migration scenarios.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent

As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
title: Tencent Cloud- Big Data Migration Architect (Indonesia)

2. End-to-End Project Management & Delivery: Take ownership of the overall project schedule, risk control, and technical solution governance. Coordinate internal and external resources to overcome organizational and technical barriers, ensuring the successful final delivery of the migration project.

3. Process Assurance & Technical Support: Act as the primary technical point of contact for troubleshooting and resolving complex issues during migration. Ensure a fast and smooth transition to the cloud by managing data consistency, business continuity, and providing comprehensive technical guidance.

4. Deep Technical Optimization: Provide full-stack technical support, including but not limited to SQL syntax automated conversion/rewriting, Spark/Flink operator tuning, and post-migration performance benchmarking. Ensure that business performance on Tencent Cloud meets or exceeds expectations.

5. Product-Research Collaboration & Best Practices: Work closely with Solution Architects (SA) to professionally summarize and feed back real-world customer requirements, pain points, and tool defects. Assist SAs in refining migration roadmaps and co-authoring "Best Practice Manuals" for migrating from overseas cloud platforms to Tencent Cloud.

Who We Look For

1. Hardcore Technical Background: Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science or related fields; 5+ years of experience in Big Data. Proficient in at least one programming language (Java, Scala, or Python) with strong coding skills and logic conversion capabilities.

2. Overseas Stack Expertise: Familiar with the architecture and use cases of at least one major product: BigQuery, Databricks, or Snowflake. Understand the differences between these and open-source ecosystems (Spark, Hive); cross-cloud migration experience is a plus.

3. System Analysis & Large-scale Management: Strong capability in system problem analysis and resolving complex architectural issues. Proven experience in cluster performance tuning, troubleshooting, source code optimization, and version upgrades; experience managing large-scale clusters (1000+ nodes) is preferred.

4. Migration Delivery Experience: Extensive experience in Big Data migration implementation and management. Master common migration workflows and methodologies for big data components. Familiar with mainstream vendor platforms and a proven track record of delivering large-scale cloud migration projects (PB-level).

5. Core Component Principles: Deep understanding of the Hadoop ecosystem, with source-code level or deep tuning experience in HDFS, Yarn, Spark, Hive, Flink, Doris, Iceberg/Hudi, etc. Capable of handling underlying compatibility issues in heterogeneous environments.

6. Soft Skills & Professionalism: Excellent customer service awareness, communication, and resource coordination skills. Proactive, self-driven, and highly responsible. Able to thrive under pressure in cross-cloud and overseas migration scenarios.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent

As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
title: Tencent Cloud- Big Data Migration Architect (Indonesia)

description: Job Vacancy: Domestic Sales LogisticsPT GED Lintas Indonesia📍 Location: South Jakarta, Surabaya, Bandung.📌 Available Positions: Jakarta (2), Bandung (1), Surabaya (2)PT GED Lintas Indonesia is a logistics company providing end-to-end services covering delivery, distribution, and supply chain solut...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Vacancy: Domestic Sales Logistics

PT GED Lintas Indonesia

📍 Location: South Jakarta, Surabaya, Bandung.

📌 Available Positions: Jakarta (2), Bandung (1), Surabaya (2)

PT GED Lintas Indonesia is a logistics company providing end-to-end services covering delivery, distribution, and supply chain solutions. In line with our business growth, we are inviting competent and high-integrity professionals to join us as a Domestic Sales Logistics, a strategic role in ensuring the effectiveness, efficiency, and compliance of all company business processes.

Position Description:

As a Logistics Sales Executive, you will be responsible for driving business growth by acquiring and managing B2B clients for domestic logistics services. This role requires strong industry knowledge, an established client network, and the ability to convert leads into long-term business partnerships.

Key Responsibilities

  • Identify, develop, and manage B2B clients for domestic logistics services, including general cargo shipments.

  • Generate and maintain a pipeline of qualified leads for domestic freight and logistics solutions.

  • Handle end-to-end sales activities, from prospecting, client visits, proposal preparation, negotiation, to deal closing.

  • Build and maintain strong long-term relationships with clients to ensure customer satisfaction and repeat business.

  • Coordinate with Operations, Pricing, and Customer Service teams to ensure smooth execution of shipments and service delivery.

  • Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and activity updates for management review.

  • Monitor market trends and competitor activities to identify new business opportunities.

  • Achieve and exceed sales targets in line with company objectives.

Requirements & Qualifications

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in the domestic logistics industry, preferably handling general cargo.

  • Proven experience in handling B2B clients and managing corporate accounts.

  • Existing leads or client database for domestic general cargo shipments is highly preferred.

  • Strong understanding of domestic logistics services, including land, sea, and/or air freight.

  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

  • Self-driven, target-oriented, and able to work independently as well as in a team.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Logistics, Marketing, or a related field is an advantage.

We look forward to receiving your application!

Note:

  • All applications will be treated with utmost confidentiality.

  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Join Our Team!

PT GED Lintas Indonesia

description: Client OverviewOur client is an Indonesian fintech company specializing in merchant payment solutions, smart POS ecosystems, and digital transaction technologies for SMEs and retail merchants. Established in 2019, the company has rapidly expanded its market presence through integrated payment applic...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Client Overview
Our client is an Indonesian fintech company specializing in merchant payment solutions, smart POS ecosystems, and digital transaction technologies for SMEs and retail merchants. Established in 2019, the company has rapidly expanded its market presence through integrated payment applications, Cloud Speaker products, and miniPOS solutions designed to accelerate financial accessibility and merchant digitalization across Indonesia.

Backed by strategic regional technology partnerships and international fintech expertise from Indonesia, China, Hong Kong, and Singapore, the company is currently entering an aggressive nationwide expansion phase focused on building large-scale merchant distribution networks and strengthening Indonesia’s digital payment ecosystem.


Job Role
The Head of Sales is a senior commercial leadership position responsible for building and leading the company’s nationwide sales, distribution, and merchant acquisition infrastructure across Indonesia. This role will oversee regional territory planning, distributor network expansion, multi-channel sales execution, and KPI governance to maximize product penetration for Cloud Speaker and miniPOS solutions.

Operating with high autonomy, the successful candidate will act as the company’s primary commercial architect, driving nationwide business growth through FMCG-style distribution strategies, aggressive territory expansion, and structured sales performance management while coordinating closely with marketing, finance, and product development teams.


Key Responsibilities

  • Build, structure, and lead a nationwide sales organization focused on merchant acquisition and hardware distribution expansion.

  • Design and implement regional territory strategies and multi-tier distributor frameworks across Indonesia.

  • Develop and manage sales pipelines across Modern Trade (MT), General Trade (GT), wholesalers, sub-distributors, and field agent channels.

  • Establish measurable KPI governance systems and monitor regional sales performance through structured reporting frameworks.

  • Drive nationwide sales growth, merchant penetration, and territory expansion initiatives.

  • Coordinate closely with Marketing, Product Development, and Finance teams to optimize product launches and promotional campaigns.

  • Manage distributor relationships, pricing structures, sales margins, and commercial governance activities.

  • Monitor competitor activities, market developments, and merchant behavior trends to support strategic decision-making.

  • Deliver executive-level pipeline reporting and business performance updates directly to senior leadership teams.

  • Travel extensively across Indonesia to support distributor onboarding, sales audits, customer engagement, and regional business expansion activities.


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Management, or related commercial disciplines.

  • Minimum 10 years of professional experience with strong exposure to national sales leadership and large-scale distribution management environments.

  • Proven background operating at Head of Sales, National Sales Manager, Commercial Director, or equivalent leadership level.

  • Strong experience within FMCG, fintech hardware distribution, payment terminal ecosystems, merchant acquisition, or high-volume commercial distribution industries.

  • Demonstrated success building nationwide distribution networks and scaling territory-based sales infrastructures from scratch.

  • Deep understanding of Modern Trade (MT), General Trade (GT), wholesalers, field agents, and multi-layer distributor ecosystems.

  • Strong KPI governance, sales performance management, and nationwide territory planning capabilities.

  • Experience managing nationwide field sales teams and high-volume merchant acquisition operations.

  • Strong negotiation, leadership, stakeholder management, and business expansion capabilities.

  • Willingness to travel extensively across Indonesia for regional business operations and distributor management activities.

  • Professional communication skills in either English or Chinese are required for multinational reporting and cross-border coordination.
title: National Head of Sales (Digital Payment & Point-of-Sale)

description: Core responsibilities1. Market expansion and sales achievementResponsible for market expansion of financial technology products (such as AI big data, FPGA high-speed trading products, data terminals), software development services, and system integration solutions in the financial sector (banking, s...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Core responsibilities

1. Market expansion and sales achievement

Responsible for market expansion of financial technology products (such as AI big data, FPGA high-speed trading products, data terminals), software development services, and system integration solutions in the financial sector (banking, securities, futures, insurance, etc.).

Execute and complete the company's product sales plan, independently handle business inquiries, quotations, contract terms negotiation and signing, and ultimately achieve sales targets.

2. Customer Relationship Management

Maintain existing target customer relationships and continuously develop new customer resources. Regularly visit clients to gain a deeper understanding of their business types (such as banks, securities firms, private banking, wealth management, etc.) and real business pain points. Establish contacts with senior management and relevant personnel of clients, establish and maintain long-term good customer relationships, and ensure the continuous and effective provision of professional solution services.

3. Requirement analysis and scheme design

Deeply connect with customer needs, understand their real usage scenarios in investment, research and development, compliance, risk management, etc., and break down vague requirements into actionable product and system requirements.

Participate in pre-sales support, closely collaborate with product and technical teams, participate in software system solution design, and provide professional and clear product and solution explanations to customers.

4. Project coordination and promotion

Follow up on major project progress, participate in customer side system demonstrations, POC (proof of concept) testing, online implementation, and phase acceptance.

Timely and accurately collect, provide feedback, and follow up on customer issues and needs, coordinate internal and external resources to efficiently respond and solve actual customer problems. Collaborate with the delivery team to complete customer business migration, technical solutions, and other tasks during the after-sales phase of the project.

5. Market information collection

Collect, organize, and analyze market dynamics and competitor situations, continuously track market feedback, and provide effective input for product iteration, market promotion.

Job Requirements

1. Bachelor's degree or above.

2. Industry awareness: Understand the business processes, IT core requirements, and mainstream technology products (such as data warehousing, big data, data governance, cloud computing, AI, etc.) of financial institutions such as banks and securities.

Sales ability: Possess excellent business negotiation skills, market development ability, and customer relationship management ability.

Customer Resources: Possess corporate customer resources in the financial sector, especially in the banking industry.

Composite background: A versatile talent who understands both finance and technology.

Language proficiency: Able to use local language and English as working languages for product introduction and business communication. Knowing Chinese is a plus.
title: Sales Manager/Director

description: About the roleAn exciting opportunity has become available for a Retail Business Analyst Manager to join the team at PT STAR MAJU SENTOSA, a Retail Company in Jakarta. As a Retail Business Analyst Manager , you will play a crucial role in providing data-driven insights and strategic recommendations ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

An exciting opportunity has become available for a Retail Business Analyst Manager to join the team at PT STAR MAJU SENTOSA, a Retail Company in Jakarta. As a Retail Business Analyst Manager , you will play a crucial role in providing data-driven insights and strategic recommendations to Our Merchandising and Company Strategic Decisions. This full-time role will be based in Jakarta.

What you'll be doing

  1. Analyze complex business data to identify trends, opportunities and areas for improvement

  2. Develop detailed reports, presentations and recommendations to support strategic decision-making

  3. Collaborate with cross-functional teams and departments to gather requirements and translate business needs into actionable solutions

  4. Stay up-to-date with Retail industry trends and best practices to provide valuable insights to our retail clients

  5. Use advanced analytical tools and techniques to uncover valuable insights from large datasets

  6. Present findings and recommendations to user in a clear and compelling manner


What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 5 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Retail Analyst on Managerial Level

  2. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to draw meaningful insights from data

  3. Proficiency in data analysis tools such as Excel, SQL, and Tableau

  4. Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey complex information to both technical and non-technical stakeholders

  5. Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and adapt to changing priorities

  6. Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field such as Business, Economics, or Statistics


What we offer

At PT STAR MAJU SENTOSA, we are committed to creating a dynamic and supportive work environment that fosters professional development and growth. Our employees enjoy:

  1. Competitive salary structure

  2. Comprehensive health insurance benefits

  3. Opportunities for continued learning and skills development

  4. Collaborative and inclusive company culture
title: Retail Business Analyst Manager

About the role

PT China Construction Yangtze River Indonesia is seeking an experienced Senior Quantity Surveyor for a new Data Centre facility in Cikarang Pusat, West Java.


What you'll be doing

  1. Responsible for settlement quantity reconciliation;

  2. Responsible for procurement bidding comparison and price evaluation;

  3. Follow up with local suppliers for quotations and monitor subsequent material delivery to site.

What we're looking for

  1. Fluent in English.

  2. Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering.

  3. Minimum 5 years experience as a Quantity Surveyor in the construction industry.

  4. Strong technical knowledge of Quantity Surveyor in construction.

  5. Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

  6. Proficient in using project management software and tools.

  7. Relevant degree or professional certification in construction management or a related field.

  8. Can join as soon as possible.

  9. Willing to be placed in Cikarang (West Java).

  10. Willing to work on Saturday (half day).

If you're ready to take on a rewarding challenge and contribute to the delivery of a state-of-the-art data centre, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now to join our team.

description: Inovasi Adiwarna Raya is rapidly expanding its digital screen network across retail, F&B, and supermarket environments throughout Indonesia.We're seeking a driven Sales Engineer who excels at opening doors, closing high-value deals, and deploying high-impact digital screens in high-traffic locations...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Inovasi Adiwarna Raya is rapidly expanding its digital screen network across retail, F&B, and supermarket environments throughout Indonesia.

We're seeking a driven Sales Engineer who excels at opening doors, closing high-value deals, and deploying high-impact digital screens in high-traffic locations.

This isn't just hardware sales—it's about transforming screens into valuable business assets that drive revenue for retail partners.

What You'll Do

1. Hunt & Close New Business

  • Acquire retail chains, supermarkets, and F&B brands (targeting Alfamart, Indomaret, minimarkets, cafe chains)

  • Identify strategic high-traffic locations for in-store digital screen deployment

  • Build aggressive sales pipeline and close high-value multi-location deals

2. Sell Digital Screen Solutions (End-to-End)

  • Promote indoor/outdoor LED screens, menu boards, retail displays, and digital signage

  • Position complete solutions: hardware + installation + CMS (Content Management System) + maintenance

  • Deliver compelling technical demos showcasing clear commercial ROI

3. Drive Network Expansion

  • Scale screen installations from single-site pilots to multi-outlet rollouts

  • Convert initial deployments into long-term network partnerships

  • Continuously expand screen footprint across Indonesia's retail landscape

4. Own the Full Sales Cycle

  • Manage complete process: prospect → pitch → negotiate → close → handover → upsell

  • Coordinate with technical and operations teams for flawless execution

  • Ensure smooth installations and client satisfaction


Who We're Looking For

Driven and Enthusiast Person

  • Relentless drive to win deals and consistently exceed sales targets

  • Comfortable with cold outreach, door-knocking, pitching, and hard closing

  • Thrives in competitive environments with quota pressure

Relevant Experience (3+ Years B2B Sales)

  • Digital signage, LED screens and digital displays

  • OR retail/F&B solutions sales with established chain networks

  • Proven success with retails or F&B groups is a major plus

Commercial + Technical Mindset

  • Can clearly explain everything related to digital screens / displays

  • Focuses on business outcomes (increased sales, customer engagement) vs. just technical features

  • Calculates and presents ROI, payback periods, and revenue uplift

Execution Focused

  • Manages deals from first meeting to final installation without dropping the ball

  • Strong project coordination with internal installation/maintenance teams

  • Follows through on after-sales support and upsell opportunities


Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree

  • Fluent Bahasa Indonesia + conversational English

  • Willing to travel

  • Proficient with CRM systems

  • Located in Jabodetabek


Why Join Inovasi Adiwarna Raya?

  • Be part of Indonesia's fastest-growing Digital Screen network

  • Uncapped commission structure rewards top performers

  • Comprehensive product training + technical support

  • Dynamic team environment with quarterly sales incentives
title: Senior Sales Executive - IoT & Smart Retail Solutions

description: About the roleThis is an exciting opportunity for an experienced IT leader to join Bali International Hospital as the Vice President of Information and Communication Technology (ICT). In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for driving the strategic direction and operational excellence of the ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced IT leader to join Bali International Hospital as the Vice President of Information and Communication Technology (ICT). In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for driving the strategic direction and operational excellence of the hospital's ICT infrastructure and services. As a member of the senior leadership team, you will play a crucial part in enabling the hospital to deliver world-class patient care through the effective use of technology.

This is a full-time position based in Bali.

What you'll be doing

  • Providing visionary leadership in the development and implementation of the hospital's ICT strategy, aligning it with the organisation's overall business objectives

  • Overseeing the design, deployment and maintenance of robust, scalable and secure ICT systems and infrastructure to support the hospital's operations

  • Driving digital transformation initiatives that enhance patient experience, improve clinical outcomes and increase operational efficiency

  • Fostering a culture of innovation and continuous improvement within the ICT team

  • Managing and mentoring a high-performing ICT team, ensuring they have the necessary skills and resources to deliver exceptional service

  • Collaborating with cross-functional leaders to identify and address technology-related challenges and opportunities

  • Ensuring compliance with relevant regulations, industry standards and best practices in the management of the hospital's ICT assets

  • Providing strategic advice to the executive team on emerging technologies and their potential impact on the hospital's operations

What we're looking for

  • Extensive experience (10+ years) in senior ICT leadership roles, preferably within the healthcare industry

  • A proven track record of successfully leading the implementation of complex, technology-driven initiatives that drive operational efficiency and enhance patient care

  • Exceptional strategic and analytical skills, with the ability to translate business needs into effective technology solutions

  • Strong project management and change management expertise, with the ability to lead cross-functional teams

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to engage effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders

  • A deep understanding of healthcare IT regulations, standards and best practices

  • A bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology or a related field; a master's degree is preferred

What we offer

  • Competitive remuneration package

  • Medical benefits

  • Training and professional development opportunities

  • Career growth opportunity within an international healthcare environment

About us

Bali International Hospital is a leading healthcare provider in the region, committed to delivering exceptional patient care and advancing medical innovation. With a reputation for clinical excellence, state-of-the-art facilities and a dedicated team of healthcare professionals, we are at the forefront of healthcare in Bali.

Join us in our mission to transform the healthcare landscape and make a meaningful impact on the lives of our patients.

Apply now
