jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description :

We are one of the top 10 biggest banks in terms of assets in Indonesia and listed in the Indonesia Stock Exchange. Permata Bank is a KBMI 3 with a strong core capital of nearly 50 trillion rupiahs. We believe that our employees are our greatest asset, and we are deeply committed to creating an environment where they can Learn, Grow, and Make a difference. This commitment is reflected in the recognition we've received-HR Excellent Award 2024 in the Learning Development and Knowledge Management categories. In addition, we achieve a net profit of over 2 trillions rupiahs in 2024, further solidifying our position as a leading financial institution.


Why PermataBank ?

Here at PermataBank, you will Learn, Grow, and Make A Difference,

You will have the appetite and the ability to learn many things, challenged to grow beyond ways you can imagine, and see the incredible difference you would have made along the journey.

This is our platform for you. We cannot promise a smooth ride, but rest assured, it is going to be a meaningful journey!

  • Learn : We always think innovatively to improve the way we work, making it easier, better and faster.

  • Grow : We provide excellent service to customers and encourage excellent performance in our daily work.

  • Make a difference : We understand each other and together build strong relationships with internal and external parties based on mutual respect.


Responsibilities

  • Ensure comprehensive management and control of Data Center Facilities, including DC infrastructure and network components

  • Oversee assessment, review, and certification processes to maintain operational standards

  • Maintain high operational reliability and ensure compliance with applicable standards and regulations

  • Identify, assess, and mitigate risks related to data center operations

  • Strengthen governance frameworks and improve the quality of decision-making processes

  • Coordinate effectively across cross-functional teams and external vendors

  • Ensure stable, secure, and well-controlled data center operations

  • Support sustainable business service continuity through reliable data center performance


Qualification Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

  • Strong knowledge of data center infrastructure design, operations, and maintenance standards

  • Strong problem-solving, organizational, and interpersonal skills


Directorates :

Technology


PT Bank Permata Tbk hereby informs that the company does not impose any charges in the employee recruitment process.

jobDescriptionHtml:
The Opportunity

PT SYSTEX ASIA INDONESIA' is seeking a dynamic and results-oriented Sales Executive to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for driving sales of our cutting-edge IT solutions to customers across Jakarta Raya and the surrounding region. As a full-time position, you will play a crucial part in expanding our customer base and contributing to the overall success of our business.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Proactively identify and qualify new sales opportunities within your assigned territory

  2. Engage with potential customers to understand their IT needs and pain points

  3. Effectively present and demonstrate our range of IT solutions to generate interest and secure sales

  4. Negotiate contract terms and pricing to ensure mutually beneficial agreements

  5. Provide excellent pre- and post-sales support to customers to build strong, long-lasting relationships

  6. Collaborate with the broader sales and technical teams to deliver comprehensive solutions

  7. Maintain detailed records of all sales activities and pipeline in our CRM system

  8. Contribute to the development of sales strategies and the overall growth of the business

What We're Looking For

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in a sales or business development role, preferably within the IT/technology industry

  2. Strong understanding of the IT solutions landscape and the ability to quickly grasp new technologies

  3. Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to tailor your approach to different customer profiles

  4. Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets

  5. Highly motivated, self-driven and comfortable working in a fast-paced, target-driven environment

  6. Degree in a relevant field such as Business, Marketing or Information Technology

What We Offer

At PT SYSTEX ASIA INDONESIA', we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary, you will enjoy a range of benefits, including:

  1. Comprehensive health and life insurance coverage

  2. Generous annual leave and sick leave entitlements

  3. Opportunities for ongoing training and professional development

  4. A dynamic and collaborative work culture that encourages innovation and entrepreneurship


Apply now and join our growing team!

description:
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
5 years of experience with customer-facing designing and deploying distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies.
Experience with data modeling techniques...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Minimum qualifications:
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • 5 years of experience with customer-facing designing and deploying distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies.
  • Experience with data modeling techniques and methodologies for traditional Online Analytical Processing or Online Transaction Processing (OLAP/OLTP) databases and modern data warehouses.
  • Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (e.g., Mongo, Cassandra, DynamoDB, etc.).
  • Ability to communicate in Bahasa language fluently to support client relationship management in this region.
Preferred qualifications:
  • 5 years of experience in managing technical client service.
  • Experience with reading software code in one or more languages such as Java, Python, NodeJS, Golang, JavaScript.
  • Experience in devising migration approaches, and migrating on-premise data processing systems to Cloud.
  • Experience with designing and deploying distributed data processing systems with one or more technologies: SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, Hadoop, Spark, Flink, Kafka, Druid, Hive, HBase, Vertica, Netezza, or Teradata.
  • Knowledge of building and operationalizing data pipelines.
About the job

The Google Cloud Consulting Professional Services team guides customers through the moments that matter most in their cloud journey to help businesses thrive. We help customers transform and evolve their business through the use of Google’s global network, web-scale data centers, and software infrastructure. As part of an innovative team in this rapidly growing business, you will help shape the future of businesses of all sizes and use technology to connect with customers, employees, and partners.

In this role, you will work with customers on projects to transform their business with data. You will provide consulting, solution design, and technical program management capabilities to customer engagements while guiding customer executives and technical stakeholders on project related decisions. You will serve as a liaison between the customers and product teams to drive product excellence and adoption. You will also work with Google partners currently servicing accounts to manage programs, deliver consulting services, and provide technical guidance.

Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.

Responsibilities
  • Work with customer technical leads, client executives, and partners to manage and deliver implementations of cloud solutions.
  • Become a trusted advisor to decision makers throughout the engagement.
  • Work with internal specialists, product and engineering teams to package best practices and lessons learned into thought leadership, methodologies, and published assets.
  • Interact with business, partners, and customer technical stakeholders to manage project scope, priorities, deliverables, risks/issues, and timelines for client outcomes.
  • Propose solution architectures and manage the deployment of cloud based databases, big data, and analytics solutions according to customer requirements and implement best practices.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.
title: Cloud Consultant, Data Analytics, Google Cloud (Bahasa)

description: Support & Automation Developer - Neto/Maropost, Indoneseian BasedRemote | Full-TimeWe run two eCommerce brands in Australia and we’re looking for a practical, reliable developer to help own the technical support side of our operations.You’ll work directly with our Head of Technology and alongside ou...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Support & Automation Developer - Neto/Maropost, Indoneseian Based

Remote | Full-Time

We run two eCommerce brands in Australia and we’re looking for a practical, reliable developer to help own the technical support side of our operations.

You’ll work directly with our Head of Technology and alongside our existing Indonesia-based team members to keep our Neto/Maropost, Airtable and automation ecosystem running smoothly.

This role suits someone who enjoys solving problems, improving workflows, fixing issues quickly, and building automations that reduce manual work across the business.

This is a full-time remote role, ideally suited to someone based in Indonesia, with a short paid trial period before full onboarding.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Daily monitoring of our Neto/Maropost process manager - catching and resolving order flow issues before they escalate

  • Building automations between Neto/Maropost, Airtable and supplier inventory feeds using Make.com, Zapier or custom scripts

  • Fixing front-end bugs on live storefronts using HTML, CSS and JavaScript

  • Auditing Airtable records to keep internal data in sync with our storefronts

  • Supporting integrations, data flows and operational workflows across the business

  • Providing clear daily updates via Slack and tracking time in Toggl

What We Need

  • Experience with Neto / Maropost

  • Strong HTML5, CSS3 and JavaScript skills - comfortable debugging live storefront issues

  • Experience with REST APIs and automation tools like Make.com, Zapier, Node or Python

  • Airtable experience, ideally using it as a structured database

  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail

  • Clear written communication and proactive daily updates

  • Ability to work independently in a remote role without needing to be micromanaged

Nice to Have

  • Experience with supplier inventory feeds

  • Google Search Console and Google Analytics familiarity

  • Experience supporting both B2B and B2C eCommerce stores

  • Experience working with Australian businesses or remote international teams

  • Familiarity with Git or basic version control

Who This Role Suits

This role is ideal for someone who likes being close to the operational engine of an eCommerce business.

You don’t need to be a senior software engineer, but you do need to be dependable, fast to investigate problems, comfortable working across systems, and willing to take ownership of recurring technical issues.

We’re looking for someone who can keep things moving, spot problems early, and improve the way our systems talk to each other.

Apply Via Seek and Please Include:

  1. A short intro about your Neto/Maropost experience

  2. One example of an automation you built and the problem it solved

  3. Your availability and expected rate

title: Support & Automation Developer (Neto/Maropost)

description: Support & Automation Developer - Neto/Maropost, Indoneseian BasedRemote | Full-TimeWe run two eCommerce brands in Australia and we’re looking for a practical, reliable developer to help own the technical support side of our operations.You’ll work directly with our Head of Technology and alongside ou...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Support & Automation Developer - Neto/Maropost, Indoneseian Based

Remote | Full-Time

We run two eCommerce brands in Australia and we’re looking for a practical, reliable developer to help own the technical support side of our operations.

You’ll work directly with our Head of Technology and alongside our existing Indonesia-based team members to keep our Neto/Maropost, Airtable and automation ecosystem running smoothly.

This role suits someone who enjoys solving problems, improving workflows, fixing issues quickly, and building automations that reduce manual work across the business.

This is a full-time remote role, ideally suited to someone based in Indonesia, with a short paid trial period before full onboarding.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Daily monitoring of our Neto/Maropost process manager - catching and resolving order flow issues before they escalate

  • Building automations between Neto/Maropost, Airtable and supplier inventory feeds using Make.com, Zapier or custom scripts

  • Fixing front-end bugs on live storefronts using HTML, CSS and JavaScript

  • Auditing Airtable records to keep internal data in sync with our storefronts

  • Supporting integrations, data flows and operational workflows across the business

  • Providing clear daily updates via Slack and tracking time in Toggl

What We Need

  • Experience with Neto / Maropost

  • Strong HTML5, CSS3 and JavaScript skills - comfortable debugging live storefront issues

  • Experience with REST APIs and automation tools like Make.com, Zapier, Node or Python

  • Airtable experience, ideally using it as a structured database

  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail

  • Clear written communication and proactive daily updates

  • Ability to work independently in a remote role without needing to be micromanaged

Nice to Have

  • Experience with supplier inventory feeds

  • Google Search Console and Google Analytics familiarity

  • Experience supporting both B2B and B2C eCommerce stores

  • Experience working with Australian businesses or remote international teams

  • Familiarity with Git or basic version control

Who This Role Suits

This role is ideal for someone who likes being close to the operational engine of an eCommerce business.

You don’t need to be a senior software engineer, but you do need to be dependable, fast to investigate problems, comfortable working across systems, and willing to take ownership of recurring technical issues.

We’re looking for someone who can keep things moving, spot problems early, and improve the way our systems talk to each other.

Apply Via Seek and Please Include:

  1. A short intro about your Neto/Maropost experience

  2. One example of an automation you built and the problem it solved

  3. Your availability and expected rate

  4. Your current location and time zone

Once you’ve applied through Seek, please also email hr•@fwrbrands.com.au with the subject line:

Support & Automation Developer – I Fix The Flow

title: Network Engineer

description: Tugas & Tanggung Jawab:Pemeliharaan Infrastruktur: Membantu pengelolaan dan pemeliharaan perangkat keras IT fisik (laptop/PC karyawan, router, switch) serta memantau performa server.Manajemen User & Lisensi: Mengelola alokasi lisensi software kerja karyawan, serta melakukan setup akun, perangkat, da...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Tugas & Tanggung Jawab:

  • Pemeliharaan Infrastruktur: Membantu pengelolaan dan pemeliharaan perangkat keras IT fisik (laptop/PC karyawan, router, switch) serta memantau performa server.

  • Manajemen User & Lisensi: Mengelola alokasi lisensi software kerja karyawan, serta melakukan setup akun, perangkat, dan hak akses untuk user baru.

  • Pemantauan Sistem (Monitoring): Melakukan monitoring harian terhadap ketersediaan jaringan (LAN/WAN), performa server cloud, dan sistem penyimpanan data (storage).

  • Operasional Backup: Membantu pelaksanaan, pengecekan, dan memastikan jalannya sistem backup & recovery data secara berkala sesuai prosedur.

  • Troubleshooting & Support: Menangani kendala teknis harian (Supporting) terkait infrastruktur IT dan berkoordinasi dengan tim internal untuk resolusi masalah.

  • Dokumentasi & Inventaris: Membuat, memperbarui, dan merapikan dokumentasi teknis serta pencatatan inventaris aset IT (hardware, software & license) perusahaan.

Kualifikasi & Persyaratan:

  • Lulusan D3/S1 dari bidang Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, Teknik Telekomunikasi, atau jurusan sejenis.

  • Terbuka untuk Fresh Graduate (memiliki pengalaman magang/kerja paruh waktu di bidang IT Support, Network, atau Cloud akan menjadi nilai plus).

  • Memiliki pemahaman dasar yang kuat tentang Infrastruktur IT dan Jaringan (Konsep OSI Layer, TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, Subnetting, & Firewall).

  • Memiliki pengetahuan dasar tentang konsep Cloud Computing (khususnya layanan dasar AWS seperti EC2, S3, dll. merupakan nilai tambah).

  • Familiar dengan sistem operasi (Windows / MacOS / Windows Server / Linux OS).

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis, logika berpikir yang baik, dan terstruktur dalam melakukan troubleshooting masalah teknis.

  • Pembelajar yang cepat, komunikatif, detail, dan memiliki kemampuan manajemen waktu yang baik.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun berkolaborasi di dalam tim.

  • Penempatan di Raden Saleh, Jakarta Pusat.

title: IT Operation Staff

description: 1. Technical Support & Helpdesk Services·        Provide first line and second-line technical support to staff and students.·        Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues.·        Respond to helpdesk tickets within agreed service timelines.·        Install, configure, and maint...
jobDescriptionHtml:
1. Technical Support & Helpdesk Services

·        Provide first line and second-line technical support to staff and students.

·        Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues.

·        Respond to helpdesk tickets within agreed service timelines.

·        Install, configure, and maintain:

o   desktops

o   laptops

o   tablets

o   printers

o   classroom technology equipment.

·        Provide on-site classroom support when required.

·        Maintain user accounts and access permissions.

2. Systems Maintenance

·        Support daily operation of school IT Systems Maintenance, including:

o   wired and wireless networks

o   servers and cloud platforms

o   internet connectivity

o   backup systems.

·        Monitor system performance and escalate issues when necessary.

·        Assist with system upgrades, patches, and maintenance schedules.

·        Ensure minimal downtime for teaching and administrative operations.

3. Educational Technology Support

·        Support teachers in using educational platforms and digital learning tools.

·        Assist classroom technology integration including:

o   interactive displays

o   learning management systems (LMS)

o   assessment platforms

o   collaboration tools.

·        Provide basic training or guidance to staff on technology usage.

·        Support digital learning initiatives and innovation projects.

4. User Account & Data Management

·        Create and manage accounts for students and staff.

·        Maintain access control aligned with safeguarding and security policies.

·        Support onboarding and offboarding IT setup.

·        Ensure proper data storage and organization practices.

5. Cybersecurity & Safeguarding Compliance

·        Support implementation of cybersecurity measures.

·        Maintain antivirus, endpoint protection, and filtering systems.

·        Ensure safe internet access for students.

·        Monitor and report potential security risks.

·        Support compliance with safeguarding and data protection policies.

·        Maintain confidentiality of school data at all times.

6. Hardware & Asset Management

·        Maintain inventory of all IT equipment and licenses.

·        Track asset allocation and lifecycle management.

·        Coordinate repairs, warranties, and replacements.

·        Support procurement recommendations for IT equipment.

7. Event & Operational Support

·        Provide technical support for:

o   assemblies

o   presentations

o   examinations

o   school events

o   parent meetings.

·        Ensure AV systems operate effectively.

8. Documentation & Process Improvement

·        Maintain clear technical documentation and user guides.

·        Develop troubleshooting procedures.

·        Identify opportunities to improve IT efficiency and user experience.

·        Contribute to IT policies and operational procedures.

9. Collaboration & Communication

·        Communicate technical information clearly to non-technical users.

·        Work collaboratively with teaching and administrative teams.

·        Liaise with external vendors and service providers.

·        Support school-wide technology initiatives.

10. Safeguarding Responsibilities

·        Adhere to WCIJ Safeguarding and Child Protection policies.

·        Ensure technology systems support student safety online.

·        Participate in safeguarding training.

·        Report concerns following school safeguarding procedures.

Qualifications & Experience

Essential

·        Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in:

o   Information Technology

o   Computer Science

o   Network Engineering

o   or related field.

·        Minimum 3 years’ IT support experience.

·        Experience supporting Windows and/or macOS environments.

·        Knowledge of networking fundamentals.

·        Strong troubleshooting skills.

·        Fluent English communication skills.

Preferred

·        Experience working in a school or educational environment.

·        Experience with cloud platforms (Google Workspace or Microsoft 365).

·        Knowledge of LMS platforms.

·        Basic networking certifications (e.g., CompTIA Network+, CCNA).

·        Experience supporting AV systems.

Key Competencies

·        Problem-solving ability

·        Clear communication skills

·        Organization and documentation

·        Adaptability in fast-paced environments

·        Collaboration and teamwork

·        Professional discretion and integrity
title: IT Manager

description: Responsibilities: Manage and ensure ERP projects are done on time, on budget and on scope with high customer satisfactionGather requirements, manage development with developers, perform UAT, training and Go Live with customerCreate, update and maintain a variety of project controls that track the st...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities: 

  • Manage and ensure ERP projects are done on time, on budget and on scope with high customer satisfaction

  • Gather requirements, manage development with developers, perform UAT, training and Go Live with customer

  • Create, update and maintain a variety of project controls that track the status of: individual projects or task orders, changes to projects or task orders, matters involving quality controls, and other aspects of the project(s) or task order(s).

  • Analyze reports and use personal influence to create priorities that prevent delays to critical activities within the project;

  • Establish, monitor, communicate and maintain project schedules;

  • Write software/technical documentation for assigned ERP projects;

  • Proactively identify issues that could lead to problems and facilitate solutions;

  • Assist in ensuring that all aspects of the project are compliant with all contract terms and legal requirements that govern the project and the community in which the project(s) takes place;

  • Participate in manage activities that are related to ensuring timely completion;

  • Participate in life-long learning opportunities and professional development.

  • Participate in weekly staff meetings and industry networking functions.

  • Any other duties assigned.
     

Qualifications:

  • Proficient in at least one programming language and database management to be able to understand and communicate effectively with developer team

  • Candidates must possess at least a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Information Technology or equivalent.

  • Able to communicate in English with overseas team

  • Preferably Staff (non-management & non-supervisor) specialized in IT/Computer - Software or equivalent.

  • Good knowledge in the fields of computer science

  • Passionate to work in the information technology sector

  • Willing to work overtime when required to meet important deadlines

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

  • The ability to work well with others

  • Good time management ability

  • Possess analytical skills to be able to solve problems that may come up during a typical work day

  • Excellent client-facing and internal communication skills

  • Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills

  • ERP Knowledge and Accounting Knowledge is a plus

  • Must be willing to relocate to Jakarta

  • Fresh Graduates welcome to apply

  • Strong language skills in English and Bahasa Indonesia (writing, speaking and listening).

  • Excellent communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills, with strong teamwork spirit.

description: Kesempatan KarirPT DNP Indonesia sedang mencari Staff IT/EDP yang berpengalaman dan berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Pulo Gadung, Jakarta Timur. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan menjadi bagian penting dari tim teknologi kami, memastikan operasional TI yang lancar dan mendukung pertumbuhan bisni...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kesempatan Karir
PT DNP Indonesia sedang mencari Staff IT/EDP yang berpengalaman dan berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Pulo Gadung, Jakarta Timur. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan menjadi bagian penting dari tim teknologi kami, memastikan operasional TI yang lancar dan mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis perusahaan kami.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengelola dan memelihara infrastruktur TI, termasuk jaringan, server, dan perangkat komputer

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis dan pemecahan masalah untuk pengguna internal

  • Mengimplementasikan dan memelihara sistem keamanan TI

  • Memantau dan mengoptimalkan kinerja sistem dan aplikasi

  • Mengembangkan dan menerapkan prosedur standar operasi untuk memastikan kelangsungan bisnis

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim lain untuk mengidentifikasi dan mengimplementasikan solusi TI yang inovatif

Kualifikasi

  • Sarjana dalam bidang Teknik Informatika, Teknik Komputer, Ilmu Komputer.

  • Pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun di bidang teknologi informasi, dengan pemahaman yang baik tentang jaringan, sistem operasi, dan keamanan TI

  • Mengerti Hardware dan Perakitan Komputer

  • Mengerti dan menguasai Konfigurasi kabel UTP

  • Memahami konsep LAN dan WAN

  • Mengerti system dan setup windows base

  • Mengerti topology network dan TCP/IP

  • Mengerti mengenai switch, modem, router dan server

Manfaat yang Ditawarkan

  • Gaji yang kompetitif

  • Program pelatihan dan pengembangan profesional yang didukung perusahaan

  • Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif

  • Kesempatan untuk berkembang dalam perusahaan yang sedang bertumbuh

description: Job Description:Communicate with clients to identify project needs and provide suitable solutions to help them secure projects.Deliver product and technical training to clients, enabling them to quickly become familiar with product solutions.Prepare technical documentation to support clients in unde...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

  1. Communicate with clients to identify project needs and provide suitable solutions to help them secure projects.

  2. Deliver product and technical training to clients, enabling them to quickly become familiar with product solutions.

  3. Prepare technical documentation to support clients in understanding product configurations.

  4. Provide prompt resolutions to clients’ daily technical issues, ensuring high satisfaction with the service.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree or above, preferably in Computer Science, Electronics, Telecommunications, or other related engineering fields.

  • At least 1 year of experience in testing or technical pre-sales support; background in smart hardware, communications, security, or electronics industries is preferred.

  • Strong language skills in English and Bahasa Indonesia (writing, speaking and listening).

  • Excellent communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills, with strong teamwork spirit.
title: IT Presales Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Desc:

  • Provide application support and assist users in resolving system-related issues

  • Monitor system performance and ensure system availability

  • Perform basic troubleshooting and escalate complex issues when necessary

  • Support user account management and IT security compliance

  • Assist in gathering user requirements and analyzing business processes.

  • Supports system development, testing (SIT/UAT), and documentation preparation.

  • Coordinate with developers, users and vendor to support project implementation and upgrades.

  • Prepare system status and issue report for the IT Department Manager


Job qualificatation:

  • Bachelor’s degree in information systems, information technology, computer science or a related field from a repubtable university (Note: Female candidates only)

  • Fresh graduate or 1-2 years of experience in IT application support or a related area.

  • Basic technical knowledge of Microsoft office, programming languages, databases, system integration and digitalization concepts.

  • Ability to perform basic troubleshooting, system monitoring, and optimization tasks.

  • Good communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to support users and resolve basic IT issues

  • Basic understanding of requirement gathering, analysis, and documentation

  • Ability to translate business requirements into clear technical specification under guidance from senior team members.

  • Familiar with process documentation, specification writing, and knowledge management practices.

  • Good organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines

description: Kesempatan KarirPT DNP Indonesia sedang mencari Staff IT/EDP yang berpengalaman dan berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Pulo Gadung, Jakarta Timur. jobDescriptionHtml:
Kesempatan Karir
PT DNP Indonesia sedang mencari Staff IT/EDP yang berpengalaman dan berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Pulo Gadung, Jakarta Timur. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan menjadi bagian penting dari tim teknologi kami, memastikan operasional TI yang lancar dan mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis perusahaan kami.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengelola dan memelihara infrastruktur TI, termasuk jaringan, server, dan perangkat komputer

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis dan pemecahan masalah untuk pengguna internal

  • Mengimplementasikan dan memelihara sistem keamanan TI

  • Memantau dan mengoptimalkan kinerja sistem dan aplikasi

  • Mengembangkan dan menerapkan prosedur standar operasi untuk memastikan kelangsungan bisnis

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim lain untuk mengidentifikasi dan mengimplementasikan solusi TI yang inovatif

Kualifikasi

  • Sarjana dalam bidang Teknik Informatika, Teknik Komputer, Ilmu Komputer.

  • Pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun di bidang teknologi informasi, dengan pemahaman yang baik tentang jaringan, sistem operasi, dan keamanan TI

  • Mengerti Hardware dan Perakitan Komputer

  • Mengerti dan menguasai Konfigurasi kabel UTP

  • Memahami konsep LAN dan WAN

  • Mengerti system dan setup windows base

  • Mengerti topology network dan TCP/IP

  • Mengerti mengenai switch, modem, router dan server

Manfaat yang Ditawarkan

  • Gaji yang kompetitif

  • Program pelatihan dan pengembangan profesional yang didukung perusahaan

  • Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif

  • Kesempatan untuk berkembang dalam perusahaan yang sedang bertumbuh
title: Staff IT/ EDP

description: KualifikasiPendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Teknologi Informasi atau bidang terkait.Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Performance Tester atau Infrastructure Engineer.Memahami performance testing dan infrastructure testing.Menguasai tools performance testing seperti Apache JMeter, NeoLoad, Loa...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Teknologi Informasi atau bidang terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Performance Tester atau Infrastructure Engineer.

  • Memahami performance testing dan infrastructure testing.

  • Menguasai tools performance testing seperti Apache JMeter, NeoLoad, LoadRunner, atau tools sejenis.

  • Memahami monitoring server, database, dan analisa performa aplikasi.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisa SQL dan troubleshooting performa sistem.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan di lokasi pelanggan dan menjadi PKWT Project.

Ruang Lingkup Pekerjaan

  • Melakukan performance testing aplikasi dan infrastruktur sesuai skenario testing.

  • Menyusun dan menjalankan performance test script.

  • Melakukan monitoring performa aplikasi, server, dan database.

  • Mengidentifikasi dan mendokumentasikan bottleneck atau issue performa.

  • Melakukan evaluasi hasil pengujian dan monitoring perbaikan issue.

  • Menyusun laporan hasil performance testing dan rekomendasi perbaikan.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan developer, DBA, dan tim infrastruktur terkait hasil testing.
title: IT Performance Tester

description: KualifikasiPendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Teknologi Informasi, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait.Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Technical Writer, IT Documentation, atau posisi sejenis.Memahami proses pengembangan aplikasi/infrastruktur TI dan dokumentasi project.M...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Teknologi Informasi, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Technical Writer, IT Documentation, atau posisi sejenis.

  • Memahami proses pengembangan aplikasi/infrastruktur TI dan dokumentasi project.

  • Mampu menyusun dokumen teknis dan non-teknis secara sistematis dan mudah dipahami.

  • Memiliki kemampuan dokumentasi seperti User Manual, SOP, Technical Documentation, Installation Guide, dan Operational Guide.

  • Memahami alur SDLC, testing, implementasi, dan operational support.

  • Menguasai Microsoft Office dan tools dokumentasi/project management.

  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, analisa, dan koordinasi yang baik dengan tim teknis maupun user.

  • Mampu bekerja sesuai timeline project dan kebutuhan dokumentasi.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan di lokasi pelanggan dan menjadi PKWT Project.



Ruang Lingkup Pekerjaan – Technical Writer

  • Menyusun dan mengelola dokumentasi project sesuai kebutuhan RKS dan project implementation.

  • Membuat dokumen teknis seperti system documentation, configuration guide, installation guide, dan operational manual.

  • Menyusun user guide, SOP, dan dokumen pendukung operasional aplikasi/infrastruktur.

  • Melakukan review dan update dokumentasi sesuai perubahan sistem atau requirement project.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan developer, engineer, tester, dan project team untuk pengumpulan informasi teknis.

  • Memastikan dokumen tersusun rapi, lengkap, dan sesuai standar dokumentasi project.

  • Mendukung kebutuhan dokumentasi untuk testing, implementasi, audit, dan handover project.

  • Melakukan pengarsipan dan pengelolaan versi dokumen project.

description: Bertanggung jawab:Membangun dan memelihara arsitektur backend/frontend untuk platform B2B E-Commerce dan fitur SaaS manajemen bengkel.Mengeksekusi integrasi end-to-end dengan layanan API pihak ketiga, yang mencakup API Katalog : TecAlliance (K-Type, VIN Search); API Keuangan : Payment Gateway (Virtu...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Bertanggung jawab:

  • Membangun dan memelihara arsitektur backend/frontend untuk platform B2B E-Commerce dan fitur SaaS manajemen bengkel.

  • Mengeksekusi integrasi end-to-end dengan layanan API pihak ketiga, yang mencakup API Katalog : TecAlliance (K-Type, VIN Search); API Keuangan : Payment Gateway (Virtual Account, Escrow) & B2B Paylater (KoinWorks/Investree dsb); API Logistik: Sameday delivery & Kargo.

  • Menulis kode yang bersih, efisien, teruji (clean code & TDD), serta melakukan code review untuk memastikan standar kualitas perangkat lunak.

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim produk dan bisnis untuk menerjemahkan alur transaksi B2B yang kompleks (seperti RFQ dan multi-cart) menjadi solusi teknis yang andal dan tanpa bug.

Kualifikasi Umum:

  • Pendidikan min. S1 di bidang Ilmu Komputer,Teknologi Informatika, Sistem Informasi atau bidang terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman min. 3-5 tahun sebagai Software Engineer (Backend/Fullstack), diutamakan yang pernah membangun sistem berskala besar di industri E-commerce, SaaS, atau Logistics/Fintech.

  • Menguasai bahasa pemrograman dan framework modern (seperti Node.js, PHP, Python, Golang atau Java), serta mahir dalam pengelolaan database (SQL dan NoSQL).

Kualifikasi Khusus:

  • Memiliki pengalaman hands-on yang kuat dalam merancang, membangun, dan mengintegrasikan RESTful API / GraphQL (terutama dengan API Payment Gateway dan Logistik).

  • Terbiasa dengan arsitektur Microservices, Cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP), dan alur CI/CD.

  • Nilai Tambah (Plus) : Memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang keamanan data (data security) untuk melindungi transaksi bisnis B2B.

*Hanya kandidat yang sesuai kualifikasi yang akan diproses lebih lanjut.
title: IT Developer

description: Required Qualification:Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology or related field.Minimum 3-year experience in related field.Technical Support and Troubleshooting Server.Honest, able to work under pressure, able to work in a team, have goodcommunication, analytical and problem-so...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Required Qualification:

  1. Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology or related field.

  2. Minimum 3-year experience in related field.

  3. Technical Support and Troubleshooting Server.

  4. Honest, able to work under pressure, able to work in a team, have good
    communication, analytical and problem-solving skills.

  5. Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple tasks at once.

  6. Willing to travel to remote area (plantation site).

  7. Willing and able to work overtime for maintenance and repair server, on
    weekends/holidays if necessary, depending on the situation and conditions.

Technical Capabilities:

  1. Preferably have experience and understand about Server-based Linux Operating Systems, preferably the Redha family such as Centos or Oracle Linux. Also has experience and knowledge of Server-based Microsoft Windows Operating Systems.

  2. Have experience, knowledge and expertise in installing, configuring, Tuning and solving problems that occur in hardware and operating systems (Linux Server base and windows Server base), especially familiar with HP brand servers or IBM brand servers.

  3. Have experience, knowledge and expertise in installing, configuring and resolving problems that occur in SAN, NAS and tape backup type server storage.

  4. Have experience, knowledge and expertise in installing, configuring and resolving problems that occur with Active Directory, DNS Server, DHCP Server, Firewall on Operating System, Email Server (Like Zimbra, or other Email server on Linux Base), File Sharing Server, FTP Server, Proxy Server, Web Server, Shell Scripting File Backup and file transfer using Redha Linux Operating System or Centos or Oracle Linux and Microsoft Windows Server Operating System.

  5. Have experience, knowledge and expertise in installing, configuring and resolving problems that occur with Hypervisor Software such as VMware ESXi. Has knowledge on configurations of clustering, FT, HA, Vcenter and Vmotion will be an advantage.

  6. Have experience, knowledge and expertise in installing, configuring, and create Scheduling Scripts servers for server backup purposes such as database backups, file backups using Scripting Shell, Batch Scripting, Python scripting or VM file backups using three party software such as Vim and others which all run on the system Linux and Windows operation.

  7. Able to create and carry out maintenance schedules for Server, SAN, NAS and other server supporting devices.

description: We are looking for Systems Analysts to translate real-world business operations into agentic AI workflows — across financial services and manufacturing industries.🎯 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES• Map business processes (finance: reconciliation, audit, reporting | manufacturing: production, inventory, procur...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for Systems Analysts to translate real-world business operations into agentic AI workflows — across financial services and manufacturing industries.

🎯 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Map business processes (finance: reconciliation, audit, reporting | manufacturing: production, inventory, procurement)
• Translate workflows into agentic AI specifications (logic, approvals, escalation)
• Define use cases, decision flows, and exception handling
• Identify data sources & ERP integration points
• Support client onboarding and workflow validation
• Ensure alignment with regulatory & operational standards

✅ REQUIREMENTS

• 5+ years in Financial Services OR Manufacturing (Indonesia)
• Experience with OJK / regulatory reporting OR ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, etc.)
• AI-literate (able to read workflow diagrams — not a black box)
• Experience leading workshops with C-level / operations stakeholders
• Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia; working proficiency in English
title: Systems Analyst — Agentic Workflows

Kualifikasi

  • Menguasai tools testing seperti Postman, Selenium, atau tools sejenis.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisa defect dan komunikasi kerja yang baik.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan Senior Tester dan developer terkait hasil pengujian.

  • Mendukung pelaksanaan SIT/UAT dan penyusunan laporan testing.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Teknologi Informasi atau bidang terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3 tahun dalam pengujian aplikasi/software testing.

  • Memahami test case, functional testing, regression testing, dan dokumentasi testing.

  • Memahami dasar database dan pengujian data menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Menguasai tools testing seperti Postman, Selenium, atau tools sejenis.

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisa defect dan komunikasi kerja yang baik.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan di lokasi pelanggan dan menjadi PKWT Project.

Ruang Lingkup Pekerjaan

  • Melakukan pengujian aplikasi sesuai test scenario dan requirement.

  • Membuat dan menjalankan test case serta mendokumentasikan hasil testing.

  • Melakukan functional testing, regression testing, dan validasi data.

  • Mengidentifikasi, mencatat, dan memonitor defect aplikasi.

  • Berkoordinasi dengan Senior Tester dan developer terkait hasil pengujian.

  • Mendukung pelaksanaan SIT/UAT dan penyusunan laporan testing.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Lowongan ini merupakan Talent Pool untuk kebutuhan SDM tahun 2027.

Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

  • Melakukan monitoring, pemeliharaan, serta merancang pengembangan platform berbasis WordPress, termasuk update, keamanan, dan optimalisasi performa situs.

  • Mengelola layanan hosting dan domain, termasuk Scale Up Server Sesuai Kebutuhan memperbarui sertifikat SSL, memastikan uptime server, dan mengatasi masalah yang berkaitan dengan hosting atau domain.

  • Melakukan penarikan, pengolahan, serta analisis data menggunakan Microsoft Excel, termasuk penggunaan rumus-rumus lanjutan, PowerQuery, dan Macro untuk meningkatkan efisiensi pengolahan data.

  • Melakukan administrasi Microsoft 365, mencakup manajemen user, perangkat (device), serta pengelolaan keamanan sistem untuk memastikan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan perusahaan.

  • Melakukan troubleshooting, monitoring berkala, instalasi, konfigurasi, serta pemeliharaan perangkat keras (hardware) dan lunak (software) untuk memastikan kelancaran operasional perusahaan.

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis secara langsung pada kegiatan produksi layanan, memastikan semua sistem dan perangkat berfungsi optimal selama kegiatan berlangsung.

  • Melakukan tugas-tugas administratif dalam proses pengadaan perangkat (hardware atau software) sesuai dengan kebutuhan perusahaan.

Kualifikasi:

  • Minimal lulusan S1 dalam bidang Teknologi Informasi, Sistem Informasi, atau jurusan terkait.

  • Memiliki pengalaman kerja sebagai Admin IT atau posisi terkait minimal 1 tahun.

  • Berpengalaman menggunakan WordPress untuk pengelolaan situs web (nilai tambah jika mampu melakukan troubleshooting dan optimasi situs).

  • Berpengalaman dengan Microsoft Excel, termasuk kemampuan untuk melakukan manipulasi menggunakan rumus-rumus lanjutan.

  • Memahami query SQL untuk pengolahan dan manajemen basis data.

  • Memahami dasar-dasar Office 365 (nilai tambah jika mampu mengelola pengguna, lisensi, dan troubleshooting).

  • Mampu melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, dan pemeliharaan perangkat keras serta perangkat lunak.
title: IT Administrator

description: Job DescriptionAct as first-level technical support for log investigation during operational incidents or error reports.Escalate potential bugs or abnormal system behavior to the engineering/development team as needed.Extract and organize data from logs to support operational needs.Monitor and analy...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

  • Act as first-level technical support for log investigation during operational incidents or error reports.

  • Escalate potential bugs or abnormal system behavior to the engineering/development team as needed.

  • Extract and organize data from logs to support operational needs.

  • Monitor and analyze system/application from various sources (e.g., Log, Datadog).

Requirements

  • Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or equivalent

  • Minimum of 1 year of experience in Application Support.

  • Familiarity with financial transaction flows such as PPOB, Multifinance, Disbursement, and Payment Gateway (e.g., inquiry & payment processing, balance checking, settlement).

  • Strong knowledge and experience with API-based systems is a must.

  • Experience working with system logs, application logs, or monitoring tools (e.g., Datadog, new relic, grafana,dynatrace), and maintain alert.

  • Ability to respond quickly and accurately during incidents or service disruptions.

  • Clear written and verbal communication skills, especially in documenting investigation steps and explaining technical findings to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Able to work independently or collaboratively in a fast-paced and operationally critical environment.

  • Willing to be on-call or provide support outside regular hours during high-impact incidents (if needed).

  • Willing to work onsite (WFO) and in shifting schedules.

jobDescriptionHtml:
We are committed to a fair and transparent recruitment process. Please be advised that we do not charge any fees at any stage of our recruitment process. Be cautious of any solicitations for payment and report suspicious activity.

What You’ll Do

  • Technical Support: Deliver timely remote and on-site technical support via phone, email, and in-person for corporate offices and regional retail store networks.

  • Application & System Maintenance: Administer and troubleshoot enterprise application systems, including Point-of-Sale (POS) solutions, ERP software, and Active Directory.

  • Infrastructure & Site Deployment: Participate in new retail store site setups, hardware/software testing, system deployments, and maintaining standard operating documentation.

  • Network & Problem Resolution: Diagnose and resolve network or system issues, while documenting root-cause analyses and technical resolutions.

  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with regional IT specialists and cross-functional technical teams to drive regional IT strategies and ensure project deadlines are met.

What We’re Looking For

  • Education: Higher Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience in IT system support, preferably within the retail, wholesale, or fashion industry.

  • Technical Skills: Strong technical knowledge of MS Windows, Mac OS, MS Office products, and experience with retail POS packages, system migrations, and implementation frameworks (e.g., ITIL).

  • Language Skills: Good command of written and spoken English. Proficiency in Mandarin is an advantage to support regional stakeholders.

  • Mindset & Traits: Self-motivated, proactive, and analytical with strong problem-solving capabilities.

  • Communication: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with a strong collaborative and team-oriented approach.

jobDescriptionHtml:
POWERBI ENGINEER

Van Oord is looking for bright minds to strengthen our Tendering and Engineering Department in a role focused on developing Business Intelligence solutions. Using Power BI, you will create insights into our Tendering and Engineering organization.

Van Oord is undergoing a digital transformation, leveraging data to monitor and optimize processes during both the tender and execution phases. We use various systems to log our internal processes, and our Tendering and Engineering Department seeks a developer who can integrate different software solutions into dashboards that enhance our internal processes.

YOUR IMPACT

As a Power BI Engineer, you will develop BI dashboards to provide insights into our Tendering and Engineering Department. You will collaborate within a Power BI team to define necessary dashboards, ensure alignment between them, and manage a backlog of BI dashboard requests from the department. Additionally, you will engage with stakeholders to gather feedback, prioritize tasks, and implement improvements.

In this role, you will contribute to the Tendering and Engineering Department with various responsibilities of which the main responsibility is :

  • Developing PowerBI dashboards to support operational excellence within the department.

  • Regularly meet with stakeholders to brainstorm and identify key performance indicators (KPIs) for the dashboards.

  • Analytical thinking to transform the data so it can be used for insights.

  • Proactively tracking and documenting missing business requirements in the current software and communicating these to relevant managers.

  • Ensuring alignment between dashboards and other operational excellent initiatives.

  • Contributing to the continuous improvement of processes and systems while maintaining high data quality.

ABOUT YOU     

You have:

  • A Bachelor Degree in Engineering, IT or other relevant fields.

  • Experience as a PowerBI engineer and therefore you :

    • Understand the limits of the software

    • Have an extensive knowledge of both the front- and back-end of the software

    • Have worked with online and local Power BI

  • Experience with reporting, monitoring and backlog of errors.

  • The ability to interact with the stakeholders and communicate effectively with other team members.

  • Good command of the English language, spoken and written.

  • Ability to explain (complicated) topics in an understandable way to various stakeholders.

  • You are fulltime available (40 hours) and willing to travel daily to our office in Cibubur.

  • (Extra) – Experience in PowerApps or Python

ABOUT VAN OORD

Van Oord is a Dutch family-owned company with more than 155 years of experience as an international marine contractor. The focus is on dredging and marine construction, offshore wind, offshore infrastructure and infrastructure in the Netherlands. Its head office is in Rotterdam. Van Oord employs ~5000 staff with 84 different nationalities, who worked on 194 projects in 43 countries. The fleet consists of a large amount of vessels special-purpose and auxiliary equipment. Van Oord delivers marine ingenuity by using smart, innovative and sustainable solutions to create a better world for future generations.

ABOUT THE TEAM

In the position of PowerBI Engineer you will be part of one of the Van Oord teams in Indonesia. Currently 30 people are working from the office in Cibubur, just South of Jakarta, as part of the Van Oord Tendering and Engineering Department, located in The Netherlands.

(Office address in Cibubur: Citra Gran RCW2 No.15 Jl. Alternatif Cibubur KM4 Bekasi Jawa barat 17435)

WE OFFER YOU

We offer you a position in which you will have an important contribution to our mission 'building a better world for future generations'. In addition, we offer you amongst others:

  • A salary that matches your responsibilities and experience;

  • Employment benefits package like our other Van Oord colleagues in Indonesia;

  • Extensive learning and (personal) development possibilities, including a wide range of online courses via Goodhabitz; 

  • A buddy in Rotterdam of similar age who can help you with all the questions you have.
title: POWERBI ENGINEER

description: Job Description1. IT Operations & System DevelopmentOversee the management, monitoring, and development of IT systems to ensure operational efficiency.Assess and define KPIs for IT department.Ensure IT policies and SOPs are comply with company policy.Develop and manage annual IT budget to align with...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

1. IT Operations & System Development

  • Oversee the management, monitoring, and development of IT systems to ensure operational efficiency.

  • Assess and define KPIs for IT department.

  • Ensure IT policies and SOPs are comply with company policy.

  • Develop and manage annual IT budget to align with organizational goals.

  • Formulate IT strategic plans and generate monthly & yearly reports related to IT operations & system development.

2. Project Management

  • Lead IT projects from planning to execution, ensuring timely delivery and alignment with business goals.

  • Strong experience in Agile Project Management.

  • Good at documenting requirement, analysis, and report that relate with project(s).

3. Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the liaison between IT, internal and external teams, ensuring seamless collaboration.

  • Work closely with management to address IT-related challenges and business requirements.

4. Leadership

  • Supervise and support the IT team.

  • Conduct routine stand-up meetings to track progress, address roadblocks, and align team goals.

  • Foster a culture of continuous learning and cross-functional collaboration.

5. Infrastructure

  • Manage working license for every employees.

  • Manage IT related infrastructure, physical (laptop, router, switch, etc) and digital (cloud server).

6. Data Related

  • Supervise data pipeline architecture and ensure alignment with business and reporting requirements.

  • Oversee data collection, storage, quality, and accessibility to support business insights and decision-making.

  • Review and guide data visualization and dashboard initiatives managed by the Data Engineer team.

Requirements

  1. Bachelors degree or higher in Computer Science, Information System, or related field.

  2. 3+ years of experience IT operations and/or system development.

  3. Excellent problem-solving, strong critical thinking, and decision-making skills.

  4. Understanding of data warehousing concepts, data flow, and reporting architecture.

  5. Excellent stakeholder communication.

  6. Have experience in leading team (leadership skills).

  7. Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

Bonus Point

  1. Ex Software Engineer is preferred.

  2. Proficiency in ERP management, especially Odoo.

  3. Knowledgeable in Cloud Computing and Automation Tools.

  4. Knowledgeable in IT Infrastructure.

  5. Knowledgeable in Data-related fields (Querying, Analyzing, & Business Intelligence).

jobDescriptionHtml:
POWERBI ENGINEER

Van Oord is looking for bright minds to strengthen our Tendering and Engineering Department in a role focused on developing Business Intelligence solutions. Using Power BI, you will create insights into our Tendering and Engineering organization.

Van Oord is undergoing a digital transformation, leveraging data to monitor and optimize processes during both the tender and execution phases. We use various systems to log our internal processes, and our Tendering and Engineering Department seeks a developer who can integrate different software solutions into dashboards that enhance our internal processes.

YOUR IMPACT

As a Power BI Engineer, you will develop BI dashboards to provide insights into our Tendering and Engineering Department. You will collaborate within a Power BI team to define necessary dashboards, ensure alignment between them, and manage a backlog of BI dashboard requests from the department. Additionally, you will engage with stakeholders to gather feedback, prioritize tasks, and implement improvements.

In this role, you will contribute to the Tendering and Engineering Department with various responsibilities of which the main responsibility is :

  • Developing PowerBI dashboards to support operational excellence within the department.

  • Regularly meet with stakeholders to brainstorm and identify key performance indicators (KPIs) for the dashboards.

  • Analytical thinking to transform the data so it can be used for insights.

  • Proactively tracking and documenting missing business requirements in the current software and communicating these to relevant managers.

  • Ensuring alignment between dashboards and other operational excellent initiatives.

  • Contributing to the continuous improvement of processes and systems while maintaining high data quality.

ABOUT YOU     

You have:

  • A Bachelor Degree in Engineering, IT or other relevant fields.

  • Experience as a PowerBI engineer and therefore you :

    • Understand the limits of the software

    • Have an extensive knowledge of both the front- and back-end of the software

    • Have worked with online and local Power BI

  • Experience with reporting, monitoring and backlog of errors.

  • The ability to interact with the stakeholders and communicate effectively with other team members.

  • Good command of the English language, spoken and written.

  • Ability to explain (complicated) topics in an understandable way to various stakeholders.

  • You are fulltime available (40 hours) and willing to travel daily to our office in Cibubur.

  • (Extra) – Experience in PowerApps or Python

ABOUT VAN OORD

Van Oord is a Dutch family-owned company with more than 155 years of experience as an international marine contractor. The focus is on dredging and marine construction, offshore wind, offshore infrastructure and infrastructure in the Netherlands. Its head office is in Rotterdam. Van Oord employs ~5000 staff with 84 different nationalities, who worked on 194 projects in 43 countries. The fleet consists of a large amount of vessels special-purpose and auxiliary equipment. Van Oord delivers marine ingenuity by using smart, innovative and sustainable solutions to create a better world for future generations.

ABOUT THE TEAM

In the position of PowerBI Engineer you will be part of one of the Van Oord teams in Indonesia. Currently 30 people are working from the office in Cibubur, just South of Jakarta, as part of the Van Oord Tendering and Engineering Department, located in The Netherlands.

(Office address in Cibubur: Citra Gran RCW2 No.15 Jl. Alternatif Cibubur KM4 Bekasi Jawa barat 17435)

WE OFFER YOU

We offer you a position in which you will have an important contribution to our mission 'building a better world for future generations'. In addition, we offer you amongst others:

  • A salary that matches your responsibilities and experience;

  • Employment benefits package like our other Van Oord colleagues in Indonesia;

  • Extensive learning and (personal) development possibilities, including a wide range of online courses via Goodhabitz; 

  • A buddy in Rotterdam of similar age who can help you with all the questions you have.
title: POWERBI ENGINEER

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

1. IT Operations & System Development

  • Oversee the management, monitoring, and development of IT systems to ensure operational efficiency.

  • Assess and define KPIs for IT department.

  • Ensure IT policies and SOPs are comply with company policy.

  • Develop and manage annual IT budget to align with organizational goals.

  • Formulate IT strategic plans and generate monthly & yearly reports related to IT operations & system development.

2. Project Management

  • Lead IT projects from planning to execution, ensuring timely delivery and alignment with business goals.

  • Strong experience in Agile Project Management.

  • Good at documenting requirement, analysis, and report that relate with project(s).

3. Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the liaison between IT, internal and external teams, ensuring seamless collaboration.

  • Work closely with management to address IT-related challenges and business requirements.

4. Leadership

  • Supervise and support the IT team.

  • Conduct routine stand-up meetings to track progress, address roadblocks, and align team goals.

  • Foster a culture of continuous learning and cross-functional collaboration.

5. Infrastructure

  • Manage working license for every employees.

  • Manage IT related infrastructure, physical (laptop, router, switch, etc) and digital (cloud server).

6. Data Related

  • Supervise data pipeline architecture and ensure alignment with business and reporting requirements.

  • Oversee data collection, storage, quality, and accessibility to support business insights and decision-making.

  • Review and guide data visualization and dashboard initiatives managed by the Data Engineer team.

Requirements

  1. Bachelors degree or higher in Computer Science, Information System, or related field.

  2. 3+ years of experience IT operations and/or system development.

  3. Excellent problem-solving, strong critical thinking, and decision-making skills.

  4. Understanding of data warehousing concepts, data flow, and reporting architecture.

  5. Excellent stakeholder communication.

  6. Have experience in leading team (leadership skills).

  7. Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

Bonus Point

  1. Ex Software Engineer is preferred.

  2. Proficiency in ERP management, especially Odoo.

  3. Knowledgeable in Cloud Computing and Automation Tools.

  4. Knowledgeable in IT Infrastructure.

  5. Knowledgeable in Data-related fields (Querying, Analyzing, & Business Intelligence).
title: IT Supervisor

description: We are looking for a hands-on Network Operations Technician to oversee critical data center network infrastructure, fiber deployment, and live operations.This role sits at the heart of operations — ensuring projects are delivered on time, vendors perform to standard, and network uptime is never comp...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a hands-on Network Operations Technician to oversee critical data center network infrastructure, fiber deployment, and live operations.

This role sits at the heart of operations — ensuring projects are delivered on time, vendors perform to standard, and network uptime is never compromised.

Responsibilities

1. Project & Vendor Management (Day 1 – Deployment Phase)

  • Supervise telecom dark fiber deployment, troubleshooting, and commissioning activities

  • Monitor high-risk works across external/internal fiber routes and data halls

  • Track project progress across multiple sites and ensure vendors meet timelines

  • Identify, escalate, and follow up on risks, issues, and solutions

  • Ensure compliance with SOPs, technical standards, and safety requirements

  • Coordinate site access and administrative support for vendors

  • Participate in site surveys and project planning

  • Provide regular progress reporting and continuous improvement inputs

2. Operations & Maintenance (Day 2 – BAU Phase)

  • Provide onsite support during maintenance, upgrades, and change activities

  • Monitor and manage network operations, alerts, and incidents

  • Perform troubleshooting (network, hardware, fiber issues) and root cause analysis

  • Conduct preventive maintenance and inspections

  • Supervise vendors working in live data hall / supercore environments

  • Support network projects (migration, expansion, decommissioning)

  • Assist in switch upgrades, remote setup, and optical cable fault resolution

  • Ensure adherence to SOPs/MOPs and operational compliance

Qualifications & Preference

  • Effective communication and collaboration with stakeholders across functions and levels.

  • Proven troubleshooting, problem-solving, and decision-making skills under pressure.

  • Strong knowledge of data center interconnectionvitiy solutions/metro connect.

  • Ability to work independently and take ownership of outcomes.

  • Flexibility to support after office hours during incident.

  • Willingness to travel extensively across multiple sites (40-50km apart).

  • Willingness to work in challenging conditions with PPE requirement (undeveloped land, outdoor elements).

  • Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, floor plans, and wiring diagrams.

  • Strong knowledge of structured cabling standards and best practices.
title: Network Operation Technician

jobDescriptionHtml:
We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Account Executive to join our team. This role is ideal for individuals who are passionate about technology, enjoy building strong client relationships, and are driven to achieve sales targets. You will play a key role in identifying business opportunities, managing client accounts, and supporting the growth of our IT solutions business.

Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and business partners

  • Identify new business opportunities and develop project pipelines

  • Collaborate with the technical team to address and resolve client needs or issues

  • Execute sales activities and marketing initiatives to achieve sales targets

  • Maintain regular communication with clients to ensure customer satisfaction and long-term partnership

  • Prepare sales reports, proposals, and administrative documentation related to sales activities

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or related field

  • Good command of English, both written and spoken

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills

  • Excellent personality, self-motivated, and target-oriented mindset

  • 1–4 years of experience in Sales or Marketing within the IT industry is preferred

  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team

  • Strong administrative skills, detail-oriented, and positive attitude

description: About the role:As a Data Engineer (Pentaho) you will be responsible for extracting and ingesting data from websites using web crawling tools. In this role, you will own the creation process of these tools, services, and workflows to improve crawl/ scrape analysis, reports, and data management.We wil...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role:

As a Data Engineer (Pentaho) you will be responsible for extracting and ingesting data from websites using web crawling tools. In this role, you will own the creation process of these tools, services, and workflows to improve crawl/ scrape analysis, reports, and data management.

We will rely on you to test the data and the scrape to ensure accuracy and quality. You will own the process to identify and rectify any issues with breaks as well as scale scrapes as needed.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Should be able to perform data extraction, data loading, solve errors, and check filter criteria.

  • Understanding the steps - input, output, and connection to the database.

  • Understanding the job/transformation, inspecting the data.

  • Understanding Salesforce basics - fields, objects, and lookups.

  • Knowledge on schema, database, views.

  • Provide technical knowledge/expertise to support the requirements definition, design, and development of data warehouse components/subsystems, specifically Extract-Transform Load or Extract-Load-Transform technologies and implementations and/or Change Data Capture technologies and implementations.

  • Getting the fallout report and analyzing the bugs and errors, one should understand how to get the output file.

  • Research, design, develop, and modify the ETL and related database functions, implementing changes/enhancements to the system.

  • Design ETL processes and develop source-to-target transformations and load processes.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field, or the equivalent demonstrated experience

  • At least 1 years of experience in Pentaho

  • Experience running large-scale web scrapes

  • Experience with Linux/UNIX, HTTP, HTML, JavaScript, and Networking

  • Experience with techniques and tools for crawling, extracting, and processing data.

  • Must have great communication skills (written and spoken in English)

  • Fresh graduates are welcome

Good to have:

  • Familiarity with system monitoring/administration tools

  • Familiarity with version control, open-source practices, and code review

  • Familiarity with Python
title: Data Engineer (Pentaho)

• Merancang dan membangun infrastruktur pengelolaan data secara efisien

• Mengumpulkan dan mengintegrasikan data dari berbagai sumber agar terintegrasi ke dalam system terpusat

• Merancang dan membangun proses ETL (Extract, Transform, Load), mencakup transformasi, validasi dan cleansing data, alert system, serta penanganan error

• Merancang struktur Data Warehouse yang optimal dan efisien sesuai kebutuhan bisnis dan analitik

• Memastikan data tersedia secara real-time dan siap digunakan untuk keperluan analisa, dashboard, serta model machine learning

• Memastikan data bersih, konsisten, dan siap pakai untuk kebutuhan Data Analyst

______________

Kualifikasi

• Pengalaman 2–3 tahun di bidang data engineering, ETL, arsitektur data dan data warehouse

• Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau jurusan terkait

• Menguasai Bahasa pemgrograman Phyton, PHP dan SQL

• Menguasai proses dan tools ETL serta memahami konsep Data warehouse

• Memiliki kemampuan problem solving dan ketelitian yang baik

• Mampu beradaptasi dan berkolaborasi secara efektif

With teams in Melbourne and Bali, we work as a true extension of our clients — collaborative, curious, and passionate about helping people thrive.Our data team builds a...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Associate Data Engineer

HeyRCG is a marketing and consultancy agency supporting the growth of businesses in tourism and hospitality. With teams in Melbourne and Bali, we work as a true extension of our clients — collaborative, curious, and passionate about helping people thrive.


Our data team builds and maintains data products with quality and scalability at the core. We work primarily on Snowflake and Microsoft Fabric, and we expect everyone on the team to take ownership of what they ship.


Key Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain ELT pipelines for marketing data from platforms like Meta, Google Ads, and regional APIs

  • Write and optimize SQL for data transformation and modelling in Snowflake and Microsoft Fabric

  • Support data quality checks, monitoring, and alerting across pipelines

  • Follow and contribute to team standards for code structure, naming conventions, and documentation

  • Collaborate with analysts to understand data requirements and deliver reliable data products

Required Skills & Experience

  • 1–3 years experience in data engineering, analytics engineering, or a related role

  • Solid SQL skills — you’re comfortable writing complex queries and transformations

  • Hands-on experience with Snowflake or Microsoft Fabric (or strong motivation to learn both)

  • Basic Python for scripting, automation, or pipeline work

  • Familiarity with ELT concepts and version-controlled workflows (Git)

  • Attention to detail — you test your work and flag issues proactively

Nice-to-Have

  • Experience with dbt for data transformation

  • Exposure to pipeline orchestration tools (Airflow, Prefect, or similar)

  • Familiarity with marketing platform APIs

  • Understanding of data modelling patterns (star schema, dimensional modelling)

What We Expect From Everyone on the Data Team

  • Ship with quality — work is tested, documented, and reviewed before it goes to stakeholders

  • Build for scale — solutions account for growth in data volume and client count

  • Follow team standards — naming conventions, Git workflows, and code reviews are non-negotiable

  • Communicate proactively — flag blockers early, ask good questions, and share context with the team

  • Take ownership — you care about the output, not just completing the task
title: Data Engineer

description: Job Description for Production Staff and Production Maintenance Staff:Responsible for overseeing the production process from semi-finished goods to finished products while minimizing waste and process failures.Develop weekly production plans in coordination with the PPIC department, translate them i...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description for Production Staff and Production Maintenance Staff:

  • Responsible for overseeing the production process from semi-finished goods to finished products while minimizing waste and process failures.

  • Develop weekly production plans in coordination with the PPIC department, translate them into daily production schedules, and monitor their execution.

  • Effectively delegate production plans and work assignments to the production team.

  • Review and validate production reports prepared by employees, including attendance records, material usage, machine downtime, and production output.

  • Analyze production problems, identify root causes, and implement corrective actions, either independently or in coordination with relevant departments.

  • Minimize machine downtime and machine waste.

  • Carry out scheduled machine maintenance activities (Preventive Maintenance).

  • Provide machine repair and maintenance training to production staff, operators, and maintenance personnel.

  • Assign tasks and monitor the performance of maintenance employees.

  • Record and evaluate machine spare part replacements.

  • Evaluate production issues by analyzing daily production achievement data and/or OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) data.

  • Coordinate with other departments (QC, Production, Engineering, Robotics, and PPIC) regarding production processes.

  • Implement continuous improvement initiatives for production systems and work methods to enhance effectiveness and efficiency.

  • Ensure compliance with company regulations, 5R principles, occupational health and safety (K3), and SOPs.

  • Improve the skills and knowledge of subordinate employees.

  • Organize and oversee the implementation of ISO 9001:2018, ISO 14001:2018, and HAS 23000 procedures within the Production Department, ensuring compliance with SOPs, work instructions, and quality objectives.

  • Perform all duties related to production/maintenance activities.


Requirements:

  • Min. D3 or Bachelor's Degree in Industrial Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, with min GPA 3.00/4.00

  • Fresh Graduate or 2 year of work experience in FMCG as production or maintenance is preferred

  • Likes working in the field/plant/factory 100%, setting up machines, and understand about industrial system.

  • Initiative, fast learner, and good leadership.

  • Able to work as a team or alone according to the needs of the project.

  • Can work under pressure, is flexible, analytical, and has good problem solving.

  • Willing to work overtime or on holidays if needed.

  • Working Hours: 6 Days, 3 Shifts
    Monday to Friday: 
    Shift 1: 6 am to 2 pm
    Shift 2: 2 pm to 10 pm
    Shift 3: 10 pm to 6 am.
    Saturday: 
    Shift 1: 6 am to 11 am
    Shift 2: 11 am to 4 pm
    Shift 3: 4 pm to 9 pm.

  • Willing to take part in the Recruitment and Work Placement process in Cakung, East Jakarta.

  • Only short listed candidates will be notified
title: Production Staff

description: Responsibilities:Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalabi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.

  • Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).

  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.

  • Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability.

  • Collaborate with:

- Business Analysts on reporting and dashboards

- Data Scientists on feature and dataset preparation

- Software Engineers on data integrations

  • Maintain clear documentation for data pipelines, schemas, and processes.

  • Implement best practices for data security, access control, and governance.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve data pipeline failures or performance issues.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

  • 3–5 years of experience in data engineering or related roles.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL.

  • Experience with at least one programming language: Python, Scala, or Java

  • Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g., BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake).

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.

  • Understanding of data modeling concepts (star schema, normalization, etc.).

  • Experience working with large datasets and production data systems.

  • Experience supporting BI tools (Looker, Power BI, Tableau)

  • Knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus

  • Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines will be preferred
title: Data Engineer
